title: Razan's Fund for Cancer Patients
overview_text:
Razan's Fund for Cancer Patients
International relief organizations have discontinued support for Syrian refugees diagnosed with cancer. It is nearly impossible for refugees to afford treatment on their own. For that purpose, the team established Razan’s Fund for Cancer Patients, which currently sponsors a number of Syrian patients in Lebanon, Jordan, Turkey, and Syria.

title: Education Fund
overview_text: Hundreds of thousands of Syrian children no longer attend school due to displacement. And large numbers of Syrian university students are unable to graduate because they cannot afford their last tuition installment. Through the Education Fund, we aim to provide tuition assistance to Syrian students of all ages.

title: Medical Emergencies Fund
overview_text: The Team receives a number of medical cases that require immediate assistance in countries of refuge. Thus we allocate funds that enable us to address their needs promptly.

title: Dialysis Fund
overview_text: This fund was established to help impoverished dialysis patients in rural areas receive the care they need by covering the cost of transportation to free dialysis centers.

title: Drinking Water Campaign
overview_text: A large number of families in Aleppo lost their primary providers and are unable to get water to their homes. The Team dedicated a vehicle for the purpose of delivering and filling their water tanks with drinking water every other day.

title: Give Warmth 9
overview_text: This recurrent winter campaign aims to provide firelogs and diesel to families in Syria and in countries of asylum. As well as winter clothes and boots especially for children. The campaign will help families in Eastern and Western Ghouta, Hama, Idlib, and Lattakia Countrysides in Syria. In addition to Irsal and Beqa'a refugee camps in Lebanon and Za'atari Camp in Jordan.

title: Madaya- Supplying Food to Besieged Cities
overview_text:
Madaya- Supplying Food to Besieged Cities
Madaya is a city located about 40 kilometers from the capital, Damascus. It has been under siege for over 5 months. 40,000 civilians are currently in the besieged city, including 20,000 displaced residents of the nearby Zabadani. Madaya has been suffering from an extreme shortage of food and medical supplies for nearly 4 months. Its residents have had to eat leaves to survive. Over 100 cases of loss of consciousness are reported daily due to severe starvation. Men, women, and children are unable to purchase food since prices have skyrocketed. 1 kg of rice now costs over $150. Molham Volunteering Team is working on providing food to the besieged city of Madaya, and will deliver all funds received to its desperately-needing residents.

title: Medical Centers and Wounded Civilians Support Fund
overview_text:
Medical Centers and Wounded Civilians Support Fund
In addition to paying for individual medical treatments, Molham Volunteering Team provides the cost of transportation and living expenses to the injured. Moreover, the Team seeks to cover the rent and heating expenses of convalescent homes and rehabilitation centers in Syria and asylum countries. The Team currently pays for the following: - Diesel for medical transportation buses that drive patients to rehabilitation centers in Lattakia Countryside, Syria. - Rent for a convalescent home in Reyhanlı, Turkey. - Operation costs for an emergency center in Eastern Ghouta, Syria.

title: Response Campaign for Lattakia Countryside
overview_text:
Response Campaign for Lattakia Countryside
An emergency campaign to provide bare necessities for families displaced after Russian airstrikes in Lattakia Countryside. Thousands of Syrians fled their homes to the Turkish border and are currently living out in the open with trees their only shelter. They have no tents, blankets, or even restrooms. We are working on delivering tents and blankets for them as soon as possible, as the weather is reaching near-zero temperatures.

title: Response Campaign - Save Aleppo
overview_text:
Response Campaign - Save Aleppo
On February 5, 2016, we launched a campaign to respond to the needs of families in the city and Northern Countryside of Aleppo, as well as the displaced families stranded along the Turkish border. Aleppo has yet again been the target of heavy and brutal airstrikes for the past several days, renewing the need for instant relief. Molham Volunteering Team resumes the campaign (Save Aleppo) to provide basic necessities to families of the dead and wounded and those affected by the constant shelling of the city.

title: You Are My Mother
overview_text:
March 21st marks Mother’s Day in the Middle East. To celebrate the love, strength, and sacrifices of mothers worldwide, Molham Volunteering Team is launching a new campaign under the name: “You Are My Mother.” This year, you can get your mother a unique gift by sponsoring an orphan or supporting our clean water project in her name. You can also choose to honor mothers and wives of martyrs and detainees in and around Syria. Our volunteers will visit those brave, grieving women and deliver your gift under your and your mother’s names. You can make this Mother’s Day special in 3 simple steps: 1- Make a donation in the amount you desire. 2- Send an e-mail to
and let us know your mother’s name, and how you wish to dedicate your gift. We will send you a card in her name. 3- Send the card to your mom and watch her smile! Happy Mother’s Day!

title: Molham's Center for Autistic and Special Needs Children
overview_text:
Molham's Center for Autistic and Special Needs Children
After the only center for autistic and special needs children was rendered out of service in Ezzaz city in Aleppo due to bombing, Molham team decided to re-establish the center so that it can resume its free-of-charge services for this marginalized group. This center aims to provide psychological and social support, physiotherapy, capacity development, and hearing and speech therapy. In addition, this center will provide services for more than 100 autistic and special needs children.

title: Corneal Diseases Fund
overview_text: Corneal diseases are of the worst conditions that affect the eyes and eyesight, which in turn causes many problems such as diplopia, pain, severe light sensitivity, and seeing halos around light to the extent where the patient is unable to work or read and his eyesight continuous to worsen. There are also many other painful symptoms that have not been mentioned. Recently, the team has been receiving many cases of people suffering from such disease. They await your donations to secure their treatments and surgeries, with hopes that they return to seeing life without distortions and clear colours, just like everyone else.

title: Molham Kindergarten

In order for us to re-establish their belonging to their country, Qeba’ and The Syrian Association for Conservation of Antiquities are launching a series of games aimed toward linking generations to Syria's heritage and history. Photo puzzles to include archaeological sites in Syria along with the information on the history of each image.

title: Eid celebration
overview_text: Donations for all team's sections will be stopped for the next 24 hours. This 24 hours will be dedicated to the children who were the main reason for the existence of Molham Team. Donations will only be allowed for the #Eid_Giveaway campaign (traditional Eid giveaway). We wish you be a part of this 24-hour campaign to make the Eid wishes of our children come true The website will go back to normal in 24 hours from now. Let's bring a smile back to the face of a child who lost the meaning of Eid celebration because of war. Help us by donating to bring smiles back to 10,000 Syrian children in refugee camps inside and outside Syria

title: Generations 6
overview_text: With the beginning of every new school year, thounds of Syrian children suffer because they lost their basic right of studying as their parents are not being able to afford their education expenses! We need your help and support to cover their school fees and other required school supplies such as backpacks and stationary.

title: In Response to Idlib
overview_text: After the daily bombardment that Idlib and its countryside have been facing by Syrian regime and Russia, civilians' tragedy and displacement to safer places increased tremendously. Molham Volunteering team is working to collect funds to secure basic needs for those civilians to support them during this humanitarian catastrophe.

title: Act for Deir Ezzour
overview_text: The forgotten Deir Ezzour had been going through an intense military campaigns and its civilians have gone through the bitterness of killing and displacement times and times again. Today, their suffering are indescribable. Hundreds of thousands have been displaced without a home and searching for a place to live in. We are seeking to support them and collect funds for basic life needs such as water, bread, and winter supplies.

title: Molham Giving Day 2017
overview_text: On Molham Volunteering Team fifth year anniversary, we are devoting Molham Giving Day to help families in Eastern Ghouta. Donation to all sections will be closed for 24 hours starting now. During Molham Giving Day, donations of any amount in the next 24-hours will be doubled by a philanthropist. Meaning, if you donate $50, it will become $100 which will go toward food for the children in besieged Ghouta. Last year we raised $35,000 and it turned into $70,000 by matching our donation. Your participation in this campaign enables us to reach more children and provide them with food.

title: Give Warmth
overview_text: Our team works during the winter season to provide fuel, firewood, and blankets to Syrian families inside Syria and surrounding countries of asylum. We will also provide winter clothing and shoes for children. This campaign will provide services in the suburbs of Hama, Idlib, Latakia, Eastern and Western Ghouta, and Northern Homs. In addition, services will be provided to refugee camps in Lebanon and Jordan.

title: Hiba's Jar
overview_text: We were sitting in our office.. A female walked into our office and said: "My name is Hiba, I asked you for an appointment to visit your office" It is normal for a child to walk into our office to ask for support or volunteer some of her time. Welcome! Her story was different and beautiful... "My name is Hiba, two years ago I fled Syria after I was arrested and I had a vision problem and needed medical treatment. Thank God, I was able to get the medical treatment after I reached out to Molham team for their support and the educational team covered all of my needs when I decided to finish my education. I am currently a student and working to support myself. I will never forget what the team did for me to support me, therefore, I decided to start collecting money in a piggy bank to give back as a way of thanking them for standing with me." Hiba pulled out her jar and said "Let's count the money!" Hiba's story is one of the most beautiful stories that we come across. It gives us motivation to continue our work and a assures us that we are making a difference in people's lives. There are lots of people who need our help and your support. This fund is dedicated toward this campaign. Anyone can either match Hiba's donation by contributing $81, or half the amount of $40. Donations collected will be designated to help an urgent medical case.

title: Ghouta's Children
overview_text: Thousands of wounded children in Eastern Ghouta are in need of basic life needs. Jisreen school in Eastern Ghouta was bombed awhile ago. 5 children were killed, and more than 15 were injured and are in a bad physical and psychological condition. We are looking to support them and secure everything their parent need to cover their medical expenses through this campaign.

title: Winter boots for kids
overview_text: During our work with refugees camps inside Syria, we found that children are deprived from suitable winter boots, so we came up with the idea of buying 5000 winter boots for 5000 kids in the camps of northern Syria. Donate with 30$ and you will help us to buy 15 winter boots for 15 kids.

title: Orphans Support Fund
overview_text: We have around 1000 Syrian children from over 25 areas around Syria who lost their parents. In addition to being orphans, they share similar stories of bombardment, destruction, and hope for a better future. We seek your support to bring a smile back to these orphans and improve their lives.

title: Emergency Cases Funds
overview_text: Many medical cases are in need urgent medical funds to get into the hospital, especially in countries of asylum. We seek to allocate funds to enable us to respond quickly to these cases to save lives. Donate any amount to help save a child's life whose parent is waiting patiently for someone to cover the medical treatment expenses.

title: Gifts for Children
overview_text: Children from all around the world receive their holiday gifts at the end of the year, with the exception of children in camps. During our visit to one of the refugee camps, we saw two children playing with a handmade toy. Therefore, we decided to collect $4,000 to purchase 2,000 game to 2,000 children.

title: Education Fund
overview_text: Hundreds of thousands of Syrian children have been deprived of their right to education due to displacement. Many schools and educational centers were completely destroyed and went out of order as a result of the bombing. Further, hundreds of students are in need of help to cover their college tuition fees. The aim of this fund is to support damaged educational centers as well as college students.

title: Emergency Cases Fund Box
overview_text: Many medical cases are in need of urgent financial assistance to get into the hospital, and especially those in countries of asylum. We seek to allocate funds to allow us the opportunity to respond to those medical cases and help them. Contribute any amount and save the life of someone waiting at the hospital for your support to cover their medical expenses.

title: In response to civilians in camps
overview_text:
In response to civilians in camps
Thousands of refugees live in camps in the worst living conditions and in need of basic supplies such as food, water, and basic necessities. Donate to help them.
details_text: Thousands of refugees live in camps in the worst living conditions and in need of basic supplies such as food, water, and basic necessities. Donate to help them.

title: Cure campaign
overview_text: High numbers of Syrian patients are suffering from severe burns and disastrous medical conditions because of the heavy bombings. They are in desperate need for urgent surgeries and medications before further serious complications may occur including permanent disabilities in the future. Donations are needed as soon as possible.

title: The great campaign of Idlib
overview_text:
The great campaign of Idlib
Idlib's campaign aims to support 252434 refugees suffering disastrous life conditions. Donations on our website will be exclusive for this campaign starting from Sunday 01/14/2018, 8 pm until Monday 9 pm. You can still donate anytime after that. Your donations can be the only warm hand for refugee children. Help them, give them some hope!!
details_text: Idlib's campaign aims to support 252434 refugees suffering disastrous life conditions. Donations on our website will be exclusive for this campaign starting from Sunday 01/14/2018, 8 pm until Monday 9 pm. You can still donate anytime after that. Your donations can be the only warm hand for refugee children. Help them, give them some hope!!

title: Screams of Ghouta
overview_text: Due to the catastrophic situation and in response to civilians trapped in Ghouta, we have dedicated this campaign to secure funds for the most urgent medical and humanitarian cases in besieged Eastern Ghouta. We will stop receiving cases from all different regions with the exception of Ghouta during the month of February to be able to help as many cases as possible. Donate any amount to help save a besieged civilian!

title: Support Ghouta
overview_text: This campaign is dedicated for Ghouta, after the intense air attacks launched by Assad and his supporters on Ghouta, hundreds of civilians are under this deadly siege and they all need your help and support. From your family to theirs, you can sponsor a family in Eastern Ghouta for 3 months with the amount of money that you choose, your support will help us provide them with food, medicine, and to repair the shelters they're staying in. Your help is a new hope for them to stay alive. You can donate online via our website or contact us via What'sApp for more info: 00962787843078

title: First Responders
overview_text: We seek through this campaign to secure food and basic needs for first responders who are working around the clock for the 5th day in a row to rescue children and dig out wounded civilians from beneath the rubble. Our duty is to provide to them as a way of thanking them for all that they have done.

title: Mother's Day Campaign
overview_text: You can donate through this campaign for a needy family or orphans to be as as a charity on behalf your mother . We will send you a greeting card to send it forward to your mother as your gift . After Donation please send us on Whats app : 00962787843078

title: For People of generosity
overview_text: Because they are generous, even they have been forced to leave their homes . They are now with thier kin. Thousands of displaced people of Eastren Ghouta to the north of Syria desperatly need basic life needs. We launched this campaign in cooperation with humanitarian associations : _Civil defense ( white helmets) _Rakeen organization _Banafsig organization _molham team _Albunian Almarsos team _Alameen for himanitary aids _Alsalam for humanitary work and charity _ the general association for aid and development _Alwafaa society for development The aim of this campaign is to coordinate the humanitarian aids in response to urgent needs of displaced people from Eastren Ghouta to Northern Syria.

title: Special Needs Children Fund
overview_text: A large number of children with special needs live in refugee camps in Ersal - Lebanon, where they do not receive the special care they need. Such children have conditions that require constant supervision and special living essentials. This campaign aims at providing them with special care and essentials that accommodate their needs.

title: Molham School - Ersal
overview_text: Hundreds of thousands of Syrian children have been deprived of their right to education, especially refugee children. These children - like all children of the world - dream of becoming doctors, artists, engineers, and scientists. Molham Team took the lead to help such refugee children and established Molham School in refugee camps in Ersal, Lebanon. Through your generous contributions, we can continue our mission to give children their right to education and help them achieve their dreams. Investment in the cause of education is an investment in humanity.

title: Response- Northern Countryside of Homs
overview_text:
Response- Northern Countryside of Homs
Shelling in Northern Countryside of Homs on daily basis has exacerbated the tragedies of families and forced them to leave into relatively safer areas. Molham team is working to secure the essential needs for these families, to alleviate this tragedy as much as we can while the world remains silent.
details_text: Shelling in Northern Countryside of Homs on daily basis has exacerbated the tragedies of families and forced them to leave into relatively safer areas. title: Small Enterprise Fund
overview_text: Several displaced families have lost everything they own and many of them have the required skills and experience to start their work again and support themselves. We aim through the Small Enterprise Fund to found productive businesses for these families to become active in their communities on an ongoing basis, which will contribute to providing them with financial income that will enable them to secure their basic needs.

title: Bicycle for amputees
overview_text: Many of the wounded can never move because of amputation and they do not have the price of an electric bicycle or electric chair. We work through this campaign to achieve the dream of a little child who wishes to go to school or a wounded person who needs a vehicle so that he can look for work and support his family. You can see the smile on the face of Abdul Razzaq when he received an automatic bicycle through this link: https://goo.gl/QHX1wQ

title: Fast Breaking - Special Cases - Ramadan
overview_text:
Fast Breaking - Special Cases - Ramadan
As Syrian families are increasingly displaced from their areas inside Syria, their suffering has increased in return and they have lost most of the basic needs of life. And because we are in the holy month of Ramadan, we will distribute food parcels and pre-dawn meals only to the special and neediest cases. During the holy month of Ramadan, Molham Team will focus more on providing housing as well as medication and surgery costs for such needy cases.

title: Zakat - Ramadan
overview_text: We seek through this campaign to receive your Zakat around the year to be spent on urgent medical cases, besieged cities, and afflicted areas that are being shelled on a daily basis, in addition to allocating part of the money to orphaned children who lost their parents during the revolution.

title: Zakat al-Fitr - Ramadan
overview_text: Through this campaign, we seek to receive Zakat al-Fitr from you and your family to be spent in accordance with Islamic law on the displaced people, especially in the camps of northern Syria.

title: Urgent Humanitarian Cases - Ramadan
overview_text:
Urgent Humanitarian Cases - Ramadan
Many medical cases need immediate fund to enter the hospital, especially in countries of asylum, so we seek to allocate funds that enable us to respond quickly to such cases and save their lives. Donate any amount of money and save the life of a child whose parents stand at the hospital door waiting for who will pay for the operation.

title: Providing Housing - Molham Village
overview_text:
Providing Housing - Molham Village
By visiting the website of Molham Village, you will contribute as a charity to providing a decent housing for a family living in a tragic situation. You can pay for an apartment in full or by installments and participate in building a family apartment by donating any amount. Through the project of Molham Village, you will change their lifelong situation.

title: Double your donation- Blessed Ramadan
overview_text:
Double your donation- Blessed Ramadan
All donations recieved today will be doubled by a benefactor. Your 50$ donation will be contributed as a 100$ for humanitarian cases. We aim to help as much cases as we can in The Blessed Ramadan. Bless you,

title: Molhamion In Ramadan
overview_text: A lot of families are suffering of a tragedy humanitarian situations , especially after the last displacement from AL-Goutah , Homs Suburb , and South of Damascus . We endeavor through this campaign to provide urgent assist for them through your donations and your Zakat . Your donate support them and help to change their bad situation .

title: Eid Givings
overview_text: To draw a smile on the faces of children who the war took everything they have. Help us by donating, to draw it back again on the faces of 10,000 syrian children inside Syria and in the refugee camps. We will seek through this campaign to provide clothes for the children to celebrate the eid. We will also provide Eid givings for the children most in need in northern Syria and in the refugee camps.

title: Response to Daraa
overview_text: While the Russian forces and Syrian Regime are attacking hundreds of thousands of civilians in Daraa, tens of thousands were forced to escape from shelling into nearby plains. Let's together stand by these displaced people and help to secure their necessities of water, food and medicine.

title: Dream Fund For University Students
overview_text:
Dream Fund For University Students
Hundreds of Syrian university students who were displaced from their homes had to withdraw from their studies. Also, given their tough conditions in refugee countries, they lost their chance to complete their education. Some of these students have one or two semesters left to graduate and be able to provide for their families. Through this Fund, we endeavor to help the largest number of such students so they would complete their education.

title: Urgent Cases Fund
overview_text: This Fund was found for aiding urgent medical and humanitarian cases. In particular, urgently required medical treatments and urgently needed shelter for displaced persons in Syria and refugees in the neighboring countries. Through this Fund, we endeavor to secure the needed costs that cover these urgent needs in a timely manner.

title: Molham Center for Cerebral Palsy
overview_text:
Molham Center for Cerebral Palsy
Molham Team provides treatment and medical support to a number of children suffering from cerebral palsy and other special needs. In particular, we treat children who cannot afford physical therapy and special education sessions (auditory/speech/cognitive development/behavior modification). We opened a special center in Turkey, which has a group of volunteer specialists, in order to handle those cases and give them the care they need. Your donations will help us be of aid for more children with similar cases.

title: AL-Eid Sacrifice ( Audhiyat Al-Eid )
overview_text:
AL-Eid Sacrifice ( Audhiyat Al-Eid )
Al-Eid Sacrifice campaign ( Audhiyat Al-Eid ) is a campaign we start aims at distribution of sacrifices among Syrians inside Syria and in the refugee countries. In the last Adha Eid we slayed more than 400 sacrifices and distributed them among thousands families inside Syria . Price of a sacrifice is 200 to 220 $ according to the weight.

title: Eid Givings 4
overview_text: To draw a smile on a kid's face after the war has taken his Eid Givings away. Help us and donate, so we can draw it on 10,000 Syrian kids in Syria and refugee camps. We will work to provide Eid clothes and Eid Givings for kids in most need in Northern Syria and refugee camps.

title: Introduce Happiness to their Hearts
overview_text:
Introduce Happiness to their Hearts
We couldn't reach them last eid , due to the difficult situation in their camp . That's why we decided to compensate them and introduce happiness to all in this eid . We chose our present to be a campaign for establishment of a permanent amusement square . Which we will open in AlEid . Your donation for this campaign will change their life to the better and give them a chance to experience childhood happiness like other children . Your donation would introduce happiness to their hearts whatever amount you contribute .

title: Generations 7
overview_text: Hundreds of thousands of Syrian children left their homes and cities to live in camps. As such, they lost their schools and have been deprived of their essential right to education. Through this campaign, we aim to support educational centers and to provide stationary supplies for children in internally displaced persons camps.

title: Molham Orphanage
overview_text: Thirty-five refugee children live in an extremely dire condition in Bekaa, Lebanon, after they have lost their parents. They need housing, education, and other basic necessities. Therefore, we are working on establishing an orphanage for them in order to change their miserable reality. As such, we are currently seeking funds to secure the orphanage's monthly fees. You are welcome to contribute with any amount.

title: Razan Fund for Cancer Patients
overview_text:
Razan Fund for Cancer Patients
Cancer is the second major cause of death around the world. Tens of Syrian families suffer every moment as they helplessly watch the slow death of their loved ones, and this is the reason why we established Razan Fund for Cancer Patients. Many cancer patients rely on this Fund to secure their costly treatment. Your contributions may save their lives.
details_text: Cancer is the second major cause of death around the world. Many cancer patients rely on this Fund to secure their costly treatment. Your contributions may save their lives.

title: Camps' Children
overview_text: The suffering of children in IDPs and refugee camps is unspeakable. Through this campaign, we aim to secure essentials for such children; including winter clothes, shoes, milk, diapers, in addition to self hygiene packages. Any contribution will alleviate some of their suffering.

title: Feed poor
overview_text: A lot of displaced families don't have even the cost to get their food . We aim through this campaign to provide the food packages for those who are in the camps inside and outside Syria.

title: Emergency Response Campaign
overview_text: We endeavor in this campaign to respond to the needs of thousands of displaced and needy families in Idlib, Aleppo countryside, and Lattakia countryside. Our focus is to secure them essentials such as food, shelter, and clothes. In addition, we aim to respond to emergency cases of floods and fires in camps, which usually occur during winter.

title: Support for injured people
overview_text: A lot of injured don't have the cost to move to hospitals or medical centers , especially those who need a medical consultation every week or have permanent treatments . We aim through this campaign to support them and to provide the cost for their moving in addition to give a support to some medical centers with essential medical needs .

title: Give Warmth 12
overview_text: During winter we work to provide winter essentials such as fuel, firewood, blankets, warm clothes, and boots for displaced Syrians families in Syria and in refugee countries. This campaign will target the neediest IDPs camps and Syrian refugee camps of Lebanon and Jordan.

title: Languages Home
overview_text: Many displaced children are getting schooled in camps and a significant portion of them quit their education. In particular, a large number of students in Idlib have very low levels of education, especially in languages. Therefore, Molham Team established the Languages Home in Idlib to provide enrichment courses for primary and intermediate levels. The curricula are being taught in an innovative and interesting way, in order to motivate students to learn and improve their educational level. Our long-terms aim is to close the educational gap of students that resulted from the war situation and increase their desire to learn. One day, we hope these students will be the pillars of a future peaceful Syria.

title: Molham School - Arsal
overview_text: Hundreds of thousands of Syrian children have been deprived of their right to education, especially refugee children. Molham Team took the lead to help such refugee children and established Molham School near refugee camps in Arsal, Lebanon, through rehabilitating caravans that accommodate 250 student. Through your generous contributions, we can continue our mission to give children their right to education. Investment in the cause of education is an investment in humanity.

title: Molham School in Batenta village - Idlib
overview_text:
Molham School in Batenta village - Idlib
About 100 children live in an internally displaced persons' camp in Batenta village of Idlib, after they have been forcibly displaced from their homes in eastern Hama Countryside. They used to take classes in unsuitable tents that did not protect them from heat or cold. We turned simple caravans into classes with proper seats, lighting, and stationery; so that these children would be able to get a proper education in a better environment.

title: AMAN
overview_text: The aim of this fund is securing the needs of abused women. Our approach is to support centers that offer a safe and proper environment for abused women, and to provide those women with psychological and social support as per their needs.

title: Orphans
overview_text: 'Mom and Dad went to bring us some things, but they never came back. I have been told they were both killed by shelling. I am now living with my grandmother. She takes care of me and takes me to school.' This is Oudai's story. It is also the story of many other orphans awaiting your generous contributions in order to be able to move forward with their lives.

title: Molham Giving Day 2018
overview_text: It's Molham Giving Day! A group of benefactors offered to match all donations received during this campaign! The purpose of collecting the donations is to establish an orphanage for refugee children in Lebanon and to support a school for internally displaced children. Your contributions will alleviate their continued suffering.

title: Urgent Cases Fund
overview_text: This Fund was found for aiding urgent medical and humanitarian cases. In particular, urgently required medical treatments and urgently needed shelter for displaced persons in Syria and refugees in the neighboring countries. Through this Fund, we endeavor to secure the needed costs that cover these urgent needs in a timely manner.

title: Patient transport
overview_text: In IDPs camps of Northern Syria, there are many patients and casualties that require urgent assistance. However, they lack the means to travel from their camps to hospitals. From our observation, many of them can get free medical care but end up with a permanent disease or disability due to their inability to afford transportation to far away hospitals! The aim of this campaign is to secure ambulances, means of transportation, and transportation expenses for the neediest medical cases in IDPs camps of Northern Syrian.

title: Displaced people from Yarmouk Camp
overview_text:
Displaced people from Yarmouk Camp
In the coldest months of the year, hundreds of displaced families in an IDP camp in Deir Ballut village - Afrin lack heating fuel needed to keep them warm! You can make their winter less harsh by supporting this emergency campaign that aims at securing heating fuel for them.
details_text: In the coldest months of the year, hundreds of displaced families in an IDP camp in Deir Ballut village - Afrin lack heating fuel needed to keep them warm! You can make their winter less harsh by supporting this emergency campaign that aims at securing heating fuel for them.

title: Little Sham
overview_text: Sham has a heartbreaking story. Her father was arrested years ago and she knows nothing about him. When she was only 8 months old, her mother was executed by an extremist armed group in southern Damascus. When the area became besieged, she left with her grandparents to Deir Ballout IDPs camp in Afrin. Two weeks ago, her grandfather passed away. She now lives with her grandmother and uncle. The aim of this campaign is to collect donations to cover the basic needs of Sham for a full year, as well as of other orphans in the camp who carry other heartbreaking stories.

title: Drinking Water
overview_text: Many displaced Syrians in camps lack access to safe drinking water. The aim of this campaign is collect funds and use them to improve displaced people's access to water. If you would like to contribute in digging a water well in Syria you can donate to this campaign and contact us via WhatsApp (00962787843078) for further information regarding the costs and areas of execution.

title: Arsal Refugee Camps
overview_text: A heavy snowstorm hit Arsal Syrian refugees camps in Lebanon! There are around 106 refugee camps in the area who already live in dire conditions, which the snowstorm has only made worse. They suffer from acute lack of heating supplies and basic necessities, especially since they have been cut off from aid! Our field volunteers in Arsal launched an emergency response campaign, and they are working hard to deliver heating fuel and other winter supplies to the refugees. Please make any amount of donation, since there is an extremely great need for aid.

title: Emergency Fund - Disaster-stricken Camps
overview_text:
Emergency Fund - Disaster-stricken Camps
Several IDPs camps in Lattakia countryside and Northern Syria, as well as refugee camps in Beqaa and Akkar in Lebanon were hit by devastating storms that flooded the camps and had disastrous effects their residents. Hundreds of displaced families have been impacted, as their tents were submerged and destroyed and all their belongings were lost! The aim of this emergency response campaign is to provide relief such as replacement tents, insulators, heating supplies, blankets, and food to the afflicted families on urgent basis.
details_text: Several IDPs camps in Lattakia countryside and Northern Syria, as well as refugee camps in Beqaa and Akkar in Lebanon were hit by devastating storms that flooded the camps and had disastrous effects their residents. Hundreds of displaced families have been impacted, as their tents were submerged and destroyed and all their belongings were lost! The aim of this emergency response campaign is to provide relief such as replacement tents, insulators, heating supplies, blankets, and food to the afflicted families on urgent basis.

title: Humanitarian Cases
overview_text: Thousands of Syrian families live in extremely dire conditions, both those who live in camps or in other places. This campaign is aimed at providing these families with assistance for their urgent needs. The main beneficiaries will be families with no provider and families whose providers were injured and are no longer able to work and support their families.

title: Baby Milk for Deir Ballut Camp
overview_text:
Baby Milk for Deir Ballut Camp
Infants and babies of families who were displaced into Deir Ballut and Al-Mohamadiah camps in northern Syria are in desperate need of baby milk and diapers, since their families live in very difficult conditions and are not able to provide these basic needs for them.
details_text: Infants and babies of families who were displaced into Deir Ballut and Al-Mohamadiah camps in northern Syria are in desperate need of baby milk and diapers, since their families live in very difficult conditions and are not able to provide these basic needs for them.

title: Molham Orphanage
overview_text: The project was launched in response to the urgent need caused by the war in Syria, which left an extremely large number of orphans and homeless children. This project serves orphans who lost both of their parents or either of their parents, as well as displaced children who were abandoned by their parents because of the harsh conditions in refugee camps of Lebanon. The orphaned children were welcomed in the center, which was opened at the beginning of this year after the installation of an integrated building at a cost of $112,000.00, including 8 furnished apartments with a gaming room, cafeteria, and an outdoor yard. All personal needs for the children's living have been provided, in addition to programs and activities. Each beneficiary child has a bed and a personal wardrobe, in addition to educational and recreational materials. Furthermore, there are set schedules for food time, school, sports, sleeping and waking up. Your donations are needed to complete this project and make the center a permanent home for these children.

title: Securing Hearing Aids for Hearing-impaired Patients
overview_text:
Securing Hearing Aids for Hearing-impaired Patients
Lujain is a beautiful child, who fled with her parents from Yarmouk camp in southern Damascus to northern Syria. There, they live in Deir Ballout camp under difficult conditions. Lujain's hearing problems are affecting her communication with others and her education. The purpose of this campaign is to secure hearing aids for those who suffer from hearing problems, so that they can have normal lives.

title: Amal Fund for Children with Growth Impairment
overview_text:
Amal Fund for Children with Growth Impairment
On monthly basis, we receive tens of cases of children with impaired growth, who have suffered a lot from shelling and siege. We endeavor through this campaign to help these children get their special medications (growth hormone injections) through your donations.
details_text: On monthly basis, we receive tens of cases of children with impaired growth, who have suffered a lot from shelling and siege. We endeavor through this campaign to help these children get their special medications (growth hormone injections) through your donations.

title: Iftar Meals
overview_text: In coordination with Fushat Amal organization (HOPE SPOT), this campaign is addressed for the neediest people in northern Syria and and in camps. Throughout Ramadan, you can donate the cost of one meal for a family or more and we will deliver them to the families.

title: Food Parcels
overview_text: Thousands of families in northern Syria suffer from extremely bad living conditions either in camps or in displacement areas. We aim through this campaign to provide them with what they need of basic food necessities throughout Ramadan. You can donate a food parcel for one family at a cost of 50$, or a Suhoor parcel at cost of 25$.

title: Zakat al-Fitr - Ramadan
overview_text: Through this campaign, we aim to receive Zakat al-Fitr from you and your family in order to spend it in accordance with Shariah on the neediest internally displaced persons, especially those in the camps of northern Syria.

title: Zakat al-Mal
overview_text: Through this campaign, we aim to receive your Zakat al-Mal throughout the holy month of Ramadan. It will spent on the neediest Syrian families, especially internally displaced persons in camps and refugees in neighboring countries.

title: Molhamion In Ramadan
overview_text: Countless Syrian families live in dire conditions and have endured displacement, deprivation, and losses. We endeavor through this campaign to alleviate the suffering of as many families as possible, especially the neediest ones.

title: Lend a Hand of Help
overview_text:
Lend a Hand of Help
Lend a Hand of Help is a humanitarian campaign launched by activists in northern Syria to help those who fled the latest aerial attacks of Russian and Syrian regime forces in Idlib and Hama countrysides. Hundreds of families have no shelters and are in need of many basic necessities. Through this campaign, Molham Volunteering Team intends to provide food supplies and other necessities for these families.
details_text: Lend a Hand of Help is a humanitarian campaign launched by activists in northern Syria to help those who fled the latest aerial attacks of Russian and Syrian regime forces in Idlib and Hama countrysides. Hundreds of families have no shelters and are in need of many basic necessities. Through this campaign, Molham Volunteering Team intends to provide food supplies and other necessities for these families.

title: Generations 8
overview_text: Hundreds of thousands of Syrian children were forced to leave their homes and cities to live in camps. As such, they lost their schools and have been deprived of their essential right to education. Through this campaign, we aim to support educational centers and to provide stationary supplies for children in IDPs camps. An investment in education is an investment in humanity.

title: Share a Book
overview_text: In cooperation with Soriana Al Amal group, Molham Team will work on establishing a public library in Aleppo Free University, offering specialized books as references for students coming from different areas of study. This library will provide a safe space for the community of university students from different social and cultural backgrounds.

title: For your Children
overview_text:
As we in Molham Volunteering Team believe that humanitarian work is one the core values that we have to engrave in our children's minds, we founded this this campaign for your own children! Through this campaign, your children can make a donation of any amount and accompany it with a letter to children of camps. Our volunteers will deliver it to the children and in turn, your child will receive a photo or a video that shows their reactions when receiving the amount and letter. Seeing the impact of their contribution, your children will feel proud of themselves! Please send to us your child's name and your WhatsApp number via this e-mail address:
, in order to send you the video and show it to your children.

Our volunteers will deliver it to the children and in turn, your child will receive a photo or a video that shows their reactions when receiving the amount and letter. Seeing the impact of their contribution, your children will feel proud of themselves! Please send to us your child's name and your WhatsApp number via this e-mail address: cam146@molhamteam.com, in order to send you the video and show it to your children.

title: Eid Givings 5
overview_text: Through this campaign, we intend to offer Eid givings and clothes to the neediest children in northern Syria and refugee camps of neighboring countries, so they can celebrate Eid and experience its joy.

title: Eid Sweets
overview_text: Many families are unable to buy Eid sweets, which costs no more than 2$. This Eid al-Fitr, we will work on reaching 1500 families to wish them a happy Eid and offer them Eid sweets. Our aim is to make them feel the joy of Eid. Through your donations, we will offer them Eid sweets and make them experience the joy of Eid and feel that they are no on left out!

title: Medical Point in Deir Ballout Camp
overview_text:
Medical Point in Deir Ballout Camp
Abu Hassan was displaced from his home to Deir Ballut IDPs camp. Until a few months back, there was no where for him to receive medical care. Recently, Molham Team founded a medical point in the camp, the only one of its kind in the area, serving inhabitants of the camp around the clock. For Abu Hassan, who has a serious injury from a missile attack, this medical point has provided him with the necessary medical care. It saved him the trouble of traveling to hospitals outside the area. The medical point is equipped with medical supplies and serves many of the elderly and children in the camp. Your $100 contribution will alleviate pain of 5000 people in the camp, who live in the most difficult circumstances.

title: Ambulance for Violet Organization
overview_text: In tribute to those who lost their lives while rescuing the wounded, and to compensate the loss of Violet organization's only ambulance in Maarat al-Numan due to an airstrike, we will work on equipping the organization with a new ambulance to ensure the continuation of their rescue activities.

title: Rahaf and Ghazi
overview_text: Rahaf and Ghazi are two homeless children who were transferred with their families to the place in the picture. Their family and 25 other families live in a tragic situation, in building that was originally a school, which was bombed several times and is uninhabitable. The purpose of this campaign is to renovate the school and provide some basic necessities for the families. Your donations will transform their miserable realities.

title: Eid Al Adha Sacrifice
overview_text: This campaign launched in cooperation with a local organization, aims at the distribution of sacrificial meat among displaced people in Syria and refugees in neighboring countries. In Eid Al Adha of last year, more than 420 sacrifices were made and distributed among thousands of families in Syria and in neighboring countries. Price of a sacrifice ranges between $200 to $220.

title: Eid Givings 6
overview_text: Through this campaign, we intend to offer Eid givings and clothes to the neediest children in northern Syria and refugee camps of neighboring countries, so they can celebrate Eid and experience its joy.

title: Medical Cases Sponsorship Fund
overview_text: This fund aims at securing monthly medications for the wounded and those suffering from chronic diseases, such as paralysis, diabetes, high blood pressure, and genetic diseases. We work closely with them and follow up on their cases to provide them with the necessary medical supplies to enable them to live a healthy life.

title: Emergency Response for Displaced people - Idlib and its countryside
overview_text:
Emergency Response for Displaced people - Idlib and its countryside
In cooperation with Help Refugees - UK, we launched an emergency response to address the needs of IDPs fleeing from the southern countryside of Idlib and Hama countryside into Idlib city and northern Syria in general. Both food items and core relief items will be provided to the neediest displaced families.
details_text: In cooperation with Help Refugees - UK, we launched an emergency response to address the needs of IDPs fleeing from the southern countryside of Idlib and Hama countryside into Idlib city and northern Syria in general. Both food items and core relief items will be provided to the neediest displaced families.

title: Killi Camps
overview_text: More than 1,600 displaced families are left in barren areas the lack basic necessities in northern Syria. The camps receives families who are fleeing death and bombardment on daily basis. Some tents have two families or three in one tent! There is a high risk of scorpion bites, and the only medical point that serves the camps has very basic medical equipment. In addition, the conditions of the WC are very bad, as women are forced to wait more than half an hour a day to use the bathrooms. No words can accurately describe the dire humanitarian situation there. The aim of this campaign is to secure the basic needs of internally displaced people in Killi camps of northern Syria.

title: Arsal refugee camps cases
overview_text: Sabreen is a 7-year-old child, who lives with her mother and siblings in a tent. She looks after her three brothers who suffer from hydrocephalus. They need diapers, medications, and some other expenses. There are many other similar in Arsal refugee camps. One of them is of a child who suffers from growth impairment and immunodeficiency. He needs a surgery that costs $100, but his mother is unable to afford such amount. We are following many similar cases and trying to provide them with the costs of treatments and surgeries. They are in desperate need of your support. A donation with any amount may save their lives!

title: Response to displaced families
overview_text: Thousands of Syrian families are fleeing bombardment in their cities and seeking refuge in Northern Syria. According to one of our field volunteers, one of the families they visited consists of 9 members, including a sick old man and a girl with special needs. They live in a poor place without a roof. Many other families live in an tragic situation. They have no food and no means to secure food. By donating to this campaign, you participate in securing a shelter for a family for at least one month. It is our collective duty to help the families who have once welcomed the displaced.

title: Amal and Farah
overview_text: Amal is less than 7 years old, was displaced from Aleppo countryside to Saraqip. All that she wishes is to play with children and attend the school like others. She works as a coffee vendor for 2$ daily to provide for her siblings. Your donation for Amal and Farah may secure them a normal life as children... also In this campaign we will offer help to those children who couldn't reach you through the media

title: The International Day of Charity
overview_text:
The International Day of Charity
The aim of this campaign is to secure sponsorships for orphans and education for children who are left without school. Through giving your pay of one day, you would be completely transforming the future of a child who would otherwise have a very dark future. The International Day of Charity is a golden opportunity to help needy children and change their bleak realities.
details_text: The aim of this campaign is to secure sponsorships for orphans and education for children who are left without school. Through giving your pay of one day, you would be completely transforming the future of a child who would otherwise have a very dark future. The International Day of Charity is a golden opportunity to help needy children and change their bleak realities.

title: Amid Olive Trees
overview_text: Thousands of families were recently displaced from their homes. They are literally staying in tents the open air amid olive trees. Their humanitarian conditions are tragic, to say the least. Through this campaign, we aim to build a room for a displaced family, to protect them from the heat of the summer and the cold of the winter. The cost of building a room for one family is $250. As families plead for help, securing decent shelters for them is a priority at this stage.

title: Orphans Support Fund
overview_text: We have around 1000 Syrian children from over 25 areas around Syria who lost their parents. In addition to being orphans, they share similar stories of bombardment, destruction, and hope for a better future. We seek your support to bring a smile back to these orphans and improve their lives.

title: Urgent Cases Fund
overview_text: This Fund was found for aiding urgent medical and humanitarian cases. In particular, urgently required medical treatments and urgently needed shelter for displaced persons in Syria and refugees in the neighboring countries. Through this Fund, we endeavor to secure the needed costs that cover these urgent needs in a timely manner.

title: humanitarian cases
overview_text: We received about 50 humanitarian cases which are in an extremely miserable situation and in critical need for support. As Bushra case, whose treatment was funded but she still in need to offer the transportation fees that her family can't provide. We aim through this campaign to support these cases and to offer them a helping hand. You can donate through the bank account which is mentioned in the heading of the page ( how can I donate?) For more information contact us: 00962787843078

title: School Bus
overview_text: Hussain wishes he can leave his tent early morning and go to school like other children. However, since he was displaced from Yarmouk camp into Deir Ballut camp in northern Syria, he stopped going to school. The school is very far from the camp, and his family does not have the means to secure his transportation expenses. Hussain, as well as his siblings and friends in the same camp are in need of means of transportation to be able to go to school. This campaign is aimed at equipping Deir Ballut camp with a school bus, in order to improve displaced children's access to education.

title: Homeless Children
overview_text: During a night tour in Idlib, our volunteers encountered homeless children sleeping on the sidewalk. They were taken to the team's office since they don't live in the city. When we visited their house the next day, it turned out that they were 11 siblings and their mother, without a breadwinner, sleeping out because they have nothing. They need food, clothes and furniture. Homeless Children Campaign aims to provide permanent sponsorship for these children and bring them back to school. Contribute to changing their reality and future!

title: ACTION FOR SAMA
overview_text: The filmmakers of FOR SAMA wish to turn the incredible worldwide reaction to the film into positive action for people living in opposition- controlled areas of Syria. With no end in sight to the attacks in Idlib, the Syrian medics, healthcare workers and civil society organisations leading the humanitarian response need all the support they can get. This is particularly acute as foreign governments’ funding to Syria decreases year on year, while the needs grow ever greater. Please donate to support the heroic efforts of the humanitarians doing incredible work in Syria.

title: From Student To Student
overview_text: FSTS concerns the Syrian students at Turkish universities who are facing financial problems due to their poor living conditions of displacement and refugee. We endeavor to support these students by supporting them from other students who donate to support other needy students.

title: Give Warmth 13
overview_text: During winter we work to provide winter essentials such as fuel, firewood, blankets, warm clothes, and boots for displaced Syrians families in Syria and in refugee countries. This campaign will target the neediest IDPs camps and Syrian refugee camps of Lebanon and Jordan.

title: Molham School in Qah
overview_text: Many Syrian school-age children are forced to drop out of school due to poor living conditions and lack of schools in the camps where they live. The Qah camps host IDPs from the suburbs of Hama and Homs. The school is to provide primary education for boys and girls up to 6th grade. Your contribution would save the future of children living in the most tragic situation.

title: World Orphans Day
overview_text: This 11th of November is a special day dedicated for orphans - World Orphans Day. On this occasion, we launch this campaign to encourage all to join our orphan sponsorship program, to remind them that when a child misses one parent or both, he is deprived of his childhood and dreams. No child ever deserves to live with a broken heart. Everyone can help with as little as possible. This campaign will shed the light on the lives of orphans and the hardships they endure, hoping that this would contribute to improving their lives.

title: Providing heating supplies for IDPs in Deir Al-Ballout camp
overview_text:
Providing heating supplies for IDPs in Deir Al-Ballout camp
It's been two years since they were displaced. Here is the winter coming back, threatening hundreds of families with its biting cold. They are literally at risk of dying especially after diesel prices have more than doubled. We have received an urgent appeal to secure heating materials for the families awaiting an unknown fate. Through this campaign, we are urgently seeking to provide diesel and firewood for IDPs of Deir Al-Ballout camp.

title: Orphan students
overview_text: Raneem left alone after her parents martyred to live with her little brother in her grandfather home. But after the death of him,they moved to live in the orphanage. Raneem is 18 years old now, and she dreams about going to university and complete her education. There are another 9 students simillar to Raneem living in northren Syria, need to go to university. Each of them needs 200 $ for tution fees in addition to university expenses. We endeavouer through this campaign to support them.

title: Because They're Treasure
overview_text: Muhammad is a premature baby in Arsal refugee camps. He needs special care and hospitalization but his parents can't secure it. Unfortunately, many children die in the Arsal camps because their parents can't afford to put them in incubators. Perhaps at this moment, there is a mother about to lose her newborn baby, which she has long waited for. We launched the project 'Because They're a Treasure' in collaboration with 'Alamatni Kanz' so that we could give many mothers hope and save their babies. Your donation would really save their lives.

title: Emergency Response - Maarat Al-Numan
overview_text:
Emergency Response - Maarat Al-Numan
This is just one family from among thousands of families who were displaced from Maarat Al-Numan. They are looking for vehicles that can carry them and rescue them from the worst fate! Nothing can describe the severity of the situation on the ground. People are in the streets running for their lives. There are no enough vehicles to drive them into safety, nor enough shelters to host them. For a long while, Maarat Al-Numan used to be a host community for people displaced from all over Syria. People from this city now desperately need the favor to be returned.. Please donate with any amount to enable us to prepare warm shelters for them, that can save them from both the bombardment and the cold.

title: A New Year!
overview_text: Countless displaced families dream about having better living conditions. Their only wish is for someone to help them leave their tent and move to a proper room instead, so that they would be able to protect their children from the cold winter. This is a golden chance to start your year with a charitable deed, which would surely positively reflect on your life!

title: For Idlib
overview_text: ‘For Idlib’ is humanitarian relief campaign launched in collaboration with Violet organization, as a continuation of our collaboration in ‘Ahl Al Ezz’ campaign. This campaign shall be supported by Syria TV. It aims at providing displaced people in northern Syria with their basic needs, given that around 270000 civilians, most of which are women and children, were displaced from southern and eastern Idlib in the last few weeks. Remember that your little contributions make all the difference for them!

title: Camp schools
overview_text: Displaced children are forced to live in tents then walk on mud to reach their school, which is also located in the camp. Through your $50 donation, we can work on providing them a better environment to receive their education. Donate via Facebook here.

title: Zakat Al-Mal (Alms-giving)
overview_text: The aim of this campaign is to collect Zakat Al-Mal contributions in order to spend them on displaced, needy, sick, and orphaned Syrians, both in Syria and in neighboring countries.

title: Barisha Medical Point
overview_text: Mohammad is from Kafranbel was recently displaced with his family to Barisha camps in northern Syria. He has vision impairments so he has to cover his eyes to avoid getting the worse situation. All that he needed was a piece of gauze and cotton every day, although he barely could get them every week. This is due to the poor situation of the camp and the absence of a medical centre that can offer basic medical aids. Mohammad is one of many other individuals in the camp even with worse cases lack medical care. That´s why Molham volunteering team decided to establish a medical point as a response to people needs to offer them the medical consultations, treatment, and medicines. Taking into account the miserable situation of the camp where most of the families are injured people and widows having no close medical centre.

title: Sponsor a Displaced Family
overview_text: There's always something you can do something for this mass influx of displaced people, who are fleeing their homes into the open while feeling hungry and afraid! Through your sponsorship of a family for one or two months, you can alleviate some of their suffering. It is very easy - you can subscribe to monthly donations for a displaced family and the amount will be automatically deducted for the period that you choose.

title: Evacuate a Family
overview_text: Thousands of families are spread in the streets, with the risk of being targeted by shelling. They cannot afford to flee the areas of bombardment. All civil defenses team's vehicles have been exhausted and the evacuation groups are unable to evacuate the large numbers of people on their own. Save a displaced family by donating $50 to enable us to evacuate it into a safe place in the border areas.

title: Emergency Response - Arsal Camps 2
overview_text:
Emergency Response - Arsal Camps 2
For the second consecutive year, a snow storm hits Arsal camps, which consists of more than 7000 tents inhabited by Syrian refugees. Hundreds of families and children are at risk of death from the cold due to lack of heating materials and their lack of means to secure them. Last year, we were able to provide all refugees in Arsal camps with heating supplies, thanks to your generous donations. Our volunteers continue working to alleviate the renewed suffering of people there and for that they need your support.

title: Housing Units
overview_text: After the vicious military campaigns led by the Syrian and Russian armies against Idlib’s southern countryside and Mu’arat Al-Nu’man, thousands of displaced families fled away from death and bombardment towards northern safe border areas. Entire cities were emptied from their residents, leaving them with nothing left to even cover themselves with. The displaced families share housing centers and tents. Even farms and warehouses, unequipped for human use, became dream houses to live in. Molham Volunteering Team seeks through this project to build 1000 housing units near the northern border areas to house 1000 displaced families who lost their houses and cities and became without a refuge.

title: Molham Orphanage
overview_text: '' I'm now living alone, after My mother's death '' Imtithal is a ten years old orphan. When we first met her, she said '' I have no one except my mother, my father moved away before my birth and didn't come back, and I have no siblings.'' Her mother passed away recently, and she's now left alone. Imtithal and 38 other kids in Molham Orphanage in Lebanon have heartbreaking stories and they need your support. ( I and the orphan sponsor will be in paradise like these), referring to his index finger and middle finger Prophet Mohammad

title: Medical Sponsorship Fund
overview_text: ''I have to stay alone in my room to protect myself from my sick sister. During my whole life, I have experienced nothing except pain. I'm 26, and I find it very painful to stay separated from my sister who has a mental disorder. I suffer from a chronic dermatological disorder. I live with my displaced family and my brother provides for us. Our misery is indescribable.'' Jawaher seeks relief from her suffering through a monthly sponsorship of 100$. There are countless other sick children like Jawaher, as well as elderly sick people awaiting your help to get their monthly medications and medical supplies. Don't let them down!

title: Dream Fund
overview_text: Fatima is a young woman who was arrested by the regime and endured torture for 7 months. Following her release, she insisted on going back to college to continue her education. Unfortunately, during this period, her father was injured by three shots and became disabled. The young woman is a student at the physics college in northern Syria, and is in need of $300 to pay for each semester. Your support would mean the world for this girl, who has been through the worst and is still determined to continue her education. This fund aims at helping Fatima and students with similar situations.

title: Wishes 2
overview_text: Last year, we were able to make the wishes of 300 mothers come true. On this year's Mother's Day, we would like to give displaced mothers in northern Syria financial assistance, given the dire living conditions, and also with the aim of reducing contact with others as much as possible, and ensuring speedy distribution of assistance before lock down comes into force. A gift consisting of $50 assistance would mean the world to a needy mother!

title: COVID19 - Let's Protect Each Other!
overview_text:
COVID19 - Let's Protect Each Other!
Many Syrian families in northern Syria and in neighbouring countries are not able to secure food due to curfew, whereby factories and shops closed and men are left with no work. If you are safe in your home with food in your fridge, we ask you to contribute with at least with $50 to secure food and antiseptics for needy Syrian families, whose suffering is multiplied during these difficult times.

title: Humanitarian Sponsorship Fund
overview_text: The purpose of the Humanitarian Sponsorship Fund is to secure monthly payments for the neediest families in northern Syria and in neighboring countries. Most of the cases we have received need permanent financial support, since their provider was injured by shelling and is unable to work. Your donations will alleviate some of their suffering.

title: Campaign of Syrian and Arabic pharmacists in Germany
overview_text:
Campaign of Syrian and Arabic pharmacists in Germany
It is a campaign that is set up by a group of pharmacists in Germany to help IDP inside Syria and refugees in neighbouring countries. All donations are going to support Campaign 207 - Eid Givings 7. With this campaign we try to provide Eid clothes and Eid givings for the neediest children in refugee camps and in northern Syria, with special focus on orphaned children. In the past years, during Eid, we were able to bring joy upon thousands of deprived children, and this year we intend to do the same and fill their hearts with joy. Your little contributions will cheer them up and create unforgettable moments for them.

title: Emergency Response for Displaced People - 2020
overview_text:
Emergency Response for Displaced People - 2020
In cooperation with Help Refugees - UK, we launch an emergency response to address the needs of IDPs fleeing from Idlib, the southern countryside of Idlib, western countryside of Aleppo, and northern Syria in general. Food items, core relief items, and shelter will be provided to the neediest displaced families.

title: Food Parcels
overview_text: Thousands of families in northern Syria suffer from extremely bad living conditions, both in camps and other concentrations of displacement. We aim through this campaign to provide them with what they need of basic food necessities throughout the holy month of Ramadan. Cost of food parcel for a family for one month = $50, Cost of Suhoor parcel for a family for one month = $25

title: Zakat Al-Mal
overview_text: Through this campaign, we aim to collect your Zakat Al-Mal during the holy month of Ramadan in order to spend it on eligible recipients; needy and displaced persons in Syria and in neighboring countries.

title: Zakat Al-Fitr
overview_text: We intend through this campaign to collect the Zakat Al-Fitr of you and your family during Ramadan, in order to spend it in accordance with Shariah on the neediest internally displaced persons, especially those in the camps of northern Syria.

title: Iftar Meals
overview_text: This campaign is aimed at providing food meals for the neediest families in northern Syria and in camps. Throughout Ramadan, you may donate the cost of one iftar meal for one family or more and we will ensure their delivery during Ramadan. Cost of one meal = $4

title: 1000 Needy Families
overview_text: Through contributing to this campaign, you can help us restore the smile of a displaced or refugee family who lost everything and alleviate some of their suffering. The aim is to distribute $250 on each beneficiary family to enable them to get what they need the most.

title: Molham Village Charitable Endowment (Waqf)
overview_text:
Molham Village Charitable Endowment (Waqf)
Invest in a Life-long Charitable Endowment (Waqf) in Molham Village! Molham Village is a housing project aimed at providing decent housing for the most vulnerable displaced Syrian families, which are families with no provider, widows, and the wounded, who live in makeshift camps with no protection from severe weather conditions. The project was launched in 2018 in a land in Azaz town in the northern countryside of Aleppo near the Turkish-Syrian borders. Construction works have begun in early 2020, after enough funds were raised to cover the costs of the first building. The model housing unit has an area of 50 m2 and consists of two rooms, a living room, a kitchen, and a bathroom. One housing unit costs $4800, and you may contribute with one share through a $50 donation, or fund a full housing unit through a one-time donation ($4800), two donations over 2 months ($2400 per month), 6 installments over 6 months ($800 per month), or 12 installments over 12 months ($400 per month). The preferred payment arrangement can be chosen through the website. Donate now and help us implement this permanent solution for the displacement catastrophe that has been ongoing for 9 years! For inquiries about the project, contact us on WhatsApp: 00962787843078
details_text: Invest in a Life-long Charitable Endowment (Waqf) in Molham Village! Molham Village is a housing project aimed at providing decent housing for the most vulnerable displaced Syrian families, which are families with no provider, widows, and the wounded, who live in makeshift camps with no protection from severe weather conditions. The project was launched in 2018 in a land in Azaz town in the northern countryside of Aleppo near the Turkish-Syrian borders. Construction works have begun in early 2020, after enough funds were raised to cover the costs of the first building. The model housing unit has an area of 50 m2 and consists of two rooms, a living room, a kitchen, and a bathroom. One housing unit costs $4800, and you may contribute with one share through a $50 donation, or fund a full housing unit through a one-time donation ($4800), two donations over 2 months ($2400 per month), 6 installments over 6 months ($800 per month), or 12 installments over 12 months ($400 per month). The preferred payment arrangement can be chosen through the website. Donate now and help us implement this permanent solution for the displacement catastrophe that has been ongoing for 9 years! For inquiries about the project, contact us on WhatsApp: 00962787843078

title: Collective Relief Campaign
overview_text: In cooperation with some Syrian organizations, we aim through this campaign to secure food and basic necessities for displaced families in northern Syria and for refugees families in Turkey, Lebanon, and Jordan. Your donation for this campaign will leave a massive impact on families lives whose bad living conditions worsened with the imposed quarantine due to COVID19.

title: Eid Givings 7
overview_text: The aim of this campaign is to provide Eid clothes and Eid givings for the neediest children in refugee camps and in northern Syria, with special focus on orphaned children. In the past years, during Eid, we were able to bring joy upon thousands of deprived children, and this year we intend to do the same and fill their hearts with joy. Your little contributions will cheer them up and create unforgettable moments for them.

title: HEAT !
overview_text: Today during our visit to one of the camps in northern Syria, we saw an old man looking for a tree to sit under , because it is unbearable to stay inside the tent. We can help him by providing a fan that costs 20$. It is 40 degrees outside and inside the tents it is even higher since they are made of nylon. We are not exaggerating when we say that cold water or a small fan is the biggest dream for those who lost everything and fled their houses. For everyone who is interested in helping others during this holy month, we have just launched a campaign to buy fans for our families in the camps to help them fight the heat. With only 20$ you will be providing a family with a fan " works on batteries" There is nothing more pure and beautiful than helping other people to overcome their problems and struggels.

title: 50 Orphans - Azaz, northern Syria
overview_text:
50 Orphans - Azaz, northern Syria
50 orphaned children fled their homes with their mothers, under bombardment, into an abandoned building in Azaz town in northern Syria. The children there live amidst deplorable humanitarian conditions, as the building is uninhabitable and lacks basic necessities of life. The aim of this campaign is to give them access to basic needs, including food, clothing, and medical care. We also plan on rehabilitating the building and make it inhabitable.
details_text: 50 orphaned children fled their homes with their mothers, under bombardment, into an abandoned building in Azaz town in northern Syria. The children there live amidst deplorable humanitarian conditions, as the building is uninhabitable and lacks basic necessities of life.
