title: Orphans Support Fund
overview_text: Haneen is a child whose father was killed by bombardment. Reem's father was shot. Since his enforced disappearance, Nour has known nothing about her father and lives like an orphan. These are only a few casesof the 1000 Syrian orphans whom we aim to support through this fund. A group of them lives in Syria, while the rest are scattered in neighboring refugee countries. We plan to secure them monthly sponsorship, through which their basic needs would be met, in addition to clothes and medications. We will also make sure to follow up on their situation. Your donation contributes to changing the life of a child who lives in total deprivation.

title: RESPONSE TO FORGOTTEN CAMPS
overview_text: 45 families were displaced into an IDP camp in this camp in northern Syria. A windstorm uprooted their handmade tents and left them in a miserable situation. Their children are growing up in dire humanitarian conditions, surrounded by insects! We aim through this campaign to respond to the urgent needs of inhabitants of this camp and similar camps in Syria and nearby countries.

title: A LOAF OF BREAD
overview_text: With massive rise in the price of the US dollar against the Syrian pound, all materials prices also greatly rose. Food insecurity is on the rise. Syrians are unable to afford even bread, one loaf of which now costs 1000 Syrian pounds! The monthly salary of a Syrian employee is not enough to buy bread for a family. This campaign aims at helping Syrian families across Syria to secure basic foodstuffs, through either food parcels or bread supply. $10 donation: bread supply for a family for a month. $40 donation: food parcel for a family enough for a month.

title: Campaign of Syrian and Arabic doctors in Germany
overview_text:
Campaign of Syrian and Arabic doctors in Germany
We launch this campaign with the support of a group of Syrian and Arabic doctors in Germany in an effort to alleviate some of the sufferings of our people inside Syria and in refugee countries. All donation will be forwarded to the campaign 212 which is dedicated to offering basic foodstuffs and bread. A donation by 10 $ would provide a family with bread for a month. A donation of 40$ would offer a family with a food parcel enough for one month.
details_text: We launch this campaign with the support of a group of Syrian and Arabic doctors in Germany in an effort to alleviate some of the sufferings of our people inside Syria and in refugee countries. All donation will be forwarded to the campaign 212 which is dedicated to offering basic foodstuffs and bread. A donation by 10 $ would provide a family with bread for a month. A donation of 40$ would offer a family with a food parcel enough for one month.

title: University Students Support Fund
overview_text: Musa (born in 1996) is a student at administration faculty in Idlib university. He has been living in a small tent with his parents for 7 years. Musa was injured by an airstrike, which left him with a deformed body. All he wants is to be able to finish his higher education and then to be able to provide for his parents. The tuition fees for each academic semester are around $100. This is the story of just one student from among 500 Syrian students, who have similar stories of displacement and unfortunate circumstances. The aim of this campaign is to give them the support that they need to continue their journey in higher education, until one day they are able to become the independent providers of their families.

title: The Syrian and Arab Pharmacists Campaign in Germany 2
overview_text:
The Syrian and Arab Pharmacists Campaign in Germany 2
A campaign led by a group of pharmacists in Germany, aiming to alleviate the suffering of our people inside Syria and in neighboring refugee-hosting countries. All donations will be directed to support our various campaigns, including education, relief, and medical cases.
details_text: A campaign led by a group of pharmacists in Germany, aiming to alleviate the suffering of our people inside Syria and in neighboring refugee-hosting countries. All donations will be directed to support our various campaigns, including education, relief, and medical cases.

title: Eid Sacrifice 2020
overview_text: One of the main traditions of Eid Al Adha is the sacrifice of livestock and the distribution of their meet to the poor. For many families, this is the only time of the year that they get to taste meal. With the collapse of the Syrian currency, lack of employment opportunities, and the continuation of the deterioration of humanitarian conditions of displaced people in Syria, the following areas will be targeted in our annual sacrifice (Udhiya) campaign: northern and eastern countryside of Aleppo, Darat Azza and the western countryside of Aleppo, Idlib city and its countryside, and Latakia countryside. Displaced, vulnerable, and needy families will be prioritized in meat distribution. The price of one Udhiya including distribution is $220 for sheep and $1500 for cow. Seven people can contribute in the sacrifice of a cow. There will be an option to document the performance of the sacrifice by video, to be sent to the donor upon completion.

title: Sadaqah Jariyah - Lighting 2 IDP Camps
overview_text:
Sadaqah Jariyah - Lighting 2 IDP Camps
During our last field visit to Deir Ballut IDP camp in northern Syria, camp’s residents asked for help to install lights around the mosque that was built through the donations raised for this purpose last year. Many families in this camp and in Al Mohammadiya IDP camp cannot leave their tents at night because of complete darkness outside and fear from wild animals roaming around. This is why we launched a project to install lights in the streets leading to the mosque and in the main roads of both camps, in order to make the camps' residents easier. It will count as a Sadaqah Jariyah (ongoing charity). Cost of lighting: $150 (includes light- battery-solar panel) You may donate as little as $10 to the camp lighting project. Remember that every donation counts!

title: Urgent Cases Fund
overview_text: "My wife recently gave birth, and she needs good nutrition.. and my children are suffering from the cold weather" Kasser is worried about providing security and warmth to his family and his new born baby, He lives with his family in a house that lacks basic live needs.. A $400 donation will support kasser's family and will cover some of their urgent needs.. We aim through this campaign to help this Case and similar urgent cases.

title: Baby Milk - IDP Camps
overview_text:
Baby Milk - IDP Camps
Zahraa is a little child who suffers from Down's syndrome and lives in a tent. When we asked her grandmother how does she get baby milk for her, we were shocked with her reply: 'I mix water with starch for her to drink!'. $5 can provide milk for one child for five days. $30 can provide milk for one child for a month. $45 can provide diapers and milk for one child for a month. Donate now to enable us to provide these basic supplies for Zahraa and hundreds of children like her in the IDP camps of northern Syria.

Donate now to enable us to provide these basic supplies for Zahraa and hundreds of children like her in the IDP camps of northern Syria.

title: 1000 Medical Cases
overview_text: Abdullah is a baby who sustained serious burns. Deema is a little girl who needs cardiac surgery. Fatimah suffers from congenital hip dislocation. Ahmad had a heart attack. Haifa needs a joint replacement surgery. These are only a few cases from the one thousand medical cases that we aim to support through this campaign. Your donations will alleviate their pain and ease their suffering. Even $10 will make a difference for those needy people.

title: "We Keep It Alive Through the Book!"
overview_text:
"We Keep It Alive Through the Book!"
The campaign aims to support public libraries and cultural centers operating within Syria by providing them with scientific books, educational materials, and academic references. The “We Keep It Alive Through the Book” campaign is dedicated to supporting the Qayem Cultural Library in the city of Al-Bab. You can support the campaign and contribute through a donation—either a monetary contribution or a book. There is no minimum amount required, but donated books should be in good condition, suitable for reading and study.

title: Eid Givings 8
overview_text: The aim of this campaign is to provide Eid clothes and Eid givings for the neediest children in refugee camps and in northern Syria, with special focus on orphaned children. In the past years, during Eid, we were able to bring joy upon thousands of deprived children, and this year we intend to do the same and fill their hearts with joy. Your little contributions will cheer them up and create unforgettable moments for them.

title: Cerebral Atrophy Patients
overview_text: ‘We left everything behind us and fled from death. I am not sad about any of that, I am just worried about my daughter, who was born with cerebral atrophy. She needs special care and supplies that I cannot afford. Nothing is worse than seeing you child, the joy of your life, suffering in front of your eyes..’ These are the words of the mother of Eslam, a child who suffers from cerebral atrophy. The aim of this campaign is to secure monthly sponsorship for Eslam and other cerebral atrophy patients, who need special supplies that are beyond their means.

title: For Beirut
overview_text: Everyone witnessed the devastating blast in Beirut, where a lot of people became homeless and thousands were badly injured. Adhering to our humanitarian duty towards afflicted Lebanese and Syrian peoples, and since Molham Volunteering Team is a registered organization in several countries around the world and operates in Lebanon, we launch an emergency relief campaign under the name - For Beirut - to raise funds via Facebook for the assistance of Lebanese and Syrian people impacted by the explosion. This campaign is going to be implemented in coordination with NGOs working in Beirut. Your donation can make a difference!

title: Water for IDPs
overview_text: With the increase of displacement in northern Syria, many camp and village inhabitants lack access to drinking water and water for daily use, which creates unsanitary living conditions and poor personal hygiene, and consequently accelerates the spread of diseases and epidemics. The aim of this campaign is to secure clean, safe water for displaced families. For those who wish to participate in equipping and digging a water well to provide hundreds of displaced families with clean, safe water as a sadaqa jariya (continuous charity), please contact the following number through WhatsApp for more information: 00905367026447.

title: Basic Services for IDP Camps
overview_text:
Basic Services for IDP Camps
Hundreds of displaced families in makeshift camps with no access to basic services live in unimaginable suffering. Women and children are the primary victims of the lack of access to the simplest necessities, such as toilet facilities! The lack of toilet facilities and sanitary systems create contaminated water pools and an environment prone to the spread of epidemics, such as leishmaniasis, and the spread of harmful insects that threaten the lives of children. Through this campaign, we seek to alleviate the suffering of displaced people by providing them with sanitary facilities and insecticides, as well by equipping camps with sanitary systems. Any amount you give can change their bitter reality.

title: Food Supplies
overview_text: On these days every year, families stock up on food supplies in preparation for the difficult weather in winter. In light of the current drastic increase in food prices, displaced families in the camps of northern Syria are struggling to stock up on any food items. Through this campaign, we aim to distribute food supplies to support camps inhabitants during winter. The following areas will covered: Camps of Idlib countryside and displaced families in Idlib city, camps of northern Aleppo countryside, Azaz and Afrin, Latakia countryside camps, camps of western Aleppo countryside. The targeted number of beneficiaries is 1000 families as a primary stage and 1000 families as a second stage.

title: Sudan is Deep in our Hearts
overview_text:
Sudan is Deep in our Hearts
Sudan, the country known for the friendliness of its people, has been appearing on news taken over by deadly floods. Its people are left to deal with this tragedy on their own. Our hearts go out to them and we grieve for every lost soul. We've launched this campaign to support the Sudanese people and help in alleviating the suffering caused by this disaster. This campaign is for Sudan and for every human who feels the pain of other humans. Donations ways: 1- Online via our website ( PayPal- bank cards- Ideal-sofort) https://bit.ly/3h7LYbi 2- Via Facebook ( in Europe- America- Canada) https://bit.ly/35gzCva 3- From Turkey through the bank account MULHAM Gönüllüler YARDIM Derneği TR39 0001 0019 0472 2518 6850 01 4- From Sweden via Swish 1235893870 (please write campaign no. 230 and your email in transfer notes).

title: Humanitarian Assistance
overview_text: Hatem is is displaced man who lives with his wife and elderly mother. The impoverished man reached a point where he digs within garbage bins in the streets to find something to sell and make money for his family! In the Holy Quran, we learn that: ”Never will you attain the good [reward] until you spend from that which you love. And whatever you spend – indeed, Allah is Knowing of it.” Al-Imran: 92 This is why we‘re launching a campaign to support a large number of the poorest Syrian families that we encounter. Every little donation goes a long way and contributes in alleviating the countless hardships faced by Hazem’s family and similar ones.

title: Living Expenses
overview_text: In northern Syria, many families live in extreme poverty due to the lack of income and lack of job opportunities. Some of these families are indebted, and others are struggling to cover daily living expenses. Through this campaign, we aim to ease the suffering of a group of impoverished, displaced families and to provide them with assistance to support their needs. Every dollar goes a long way!

title: Back to School Stationary
overview_text: As students return to school, in the midst of the difficult living circumstances in Syria and neighboring countries due to the COVID-19 pandemic and the ongoing economic crisis, many of them have no access to essential school needs. Through this campaign, we aim to provide school students in Syria and neighboring countries with stationary and school supplies.

title: Orphaned Children Birthdays
overview_text: When a child loses his father, this loss impacts his life for good, as he loses the irreplaceable kindness and love that only a father can offer. On the child's birthday, having no father hits different. Every orphaned child deserves to have a special time and enjoy their birthday. This is why the sponsorship department works to celebrate the birthdays of all orphans registered in our lists, and this fund aims at bringing joy upon them on their special day!

title: Food Aid for the Poor
overview_text:
Food Aid for the Poor
Many displaced families and refugees struggle to put food on their table. Through this campaign, we aim to secure food parcels and meals for IDP in the camps Syria and refugees in the camps of neighboring countries. Through this campaign, you may pay your 'Kaffarah', as all donations will be used to feed the poor.
details_text: Many displaced families and refugees struggle to put food on their table. Through this campaign, we aim to secure food parcels and meals for IDP in the camps Syria and refugees in the camps of neighboring countries. Through this campaign, you may pay your 'Kaffarah', as all donations will be used to feed the poor.

title: Razan Fund for Cancer Patients
overview_text:
Razan Fund for Cancer Patients
Saeed is a child who suffers from leukemia. He is in Turkey with his father for treatment, but they live in difficult conditions & the rest of the family is left in Syria with no breadwinner. $250 can make a great difference for the child & his family. In 2014, we launched Razan Fund for Cancer Patients to secure the treatment cost for Razan, a little girl who was cancer patient. Thanks to immense donations and support, Razan survived and recovered from spinal cord cancer. As we could help hundreds of similar cases through the fund, our goal is to continue supporting cancer cases.

Thanks to immense donations and support, Razan survived and recovered from spinal cord cancer. As we could help hundreds of similar cases through the fund, our goal is to continue supporting cancer cases.

title: Urgent Cases Fund
overview_text: ''At the time we can't secure our essential needs ,we're desperately in need of our daughter's treatment costs.'' Mariam is a three-month-old baby. After her family lost everything during the emigration trip she lived with her grandparents. She has hydrocephalus and needs emergency brain shunt .700$ can help a father to save his daughter's life. This campaign was launched especially for suchlike medical cases. Mariam and many other patients are wailting for their turn for treatment !

title: Small Project Fund
overview_text: Mohammad was injured by an airstrike hit his house in Damascus. His injury left him paralyzed with bone loss of neck and thigh in addition to severe burns that caused a disability of 50%. Mohammad was enforced to displace to NW Syria where he tried to find a job and never give up, to provide for his family. His insistence to succeed pushed us to offer him a small project ( ALshami Express) that made his family satisfied with a sustained monthly income. We aim through the Small Project Fund to promote and assist the small projects in NW Syria to encourage families to be independent again.

title: Give Warmth 14
overview_text: We all have experienced the cold weather but who has tried to spend winter in a tent? without sheets? or stove? Who can tolerate heavy and continuous rains so all belongings get wet? Have you ever imagine to lose every thing because of floods? Sadly this tragic situation is repeated continuously every winter for people in camps. May be we can't prevent such tragedy but we will stand next to them. Through this campaign, we will offer them warmth and support in winter.

title: Molham School for Orphans - Idlib
overview_text:
Molham School for Orphans - Idlib
There are 180 children who go to this school. Some of them are double orphans, and some of them work after school in order to help out their poor families. One of these children is Ahmad, an orphaned child who sells biscuits after school to help his mother in paying rent. Another is Asma, who lost her parents siblings because of bombardment on Aleppo. She was displaced into Idlib, where she lives with her grandmother in dire conditions. Another case is Sham, who has never seen her father, as he has been detained before she was born. Similarly, Hammoud lost his father and siblings because of bombardment on Aleppo. He was displaced with his mother into Idlib. And there is also Kamal, who lost his parents and lives with grandmother, who as no means to provide any of his needs By giving $25 a month, you can sponsor the education of a child and provide them with school supplies By giving $50 a month, you can sponsor a child and provide their basic needs as well as educational needs.

title: Molham Kindergarten For Orphans
overview_text: Mariam is 4 years old, her father was martyred under torture. She lives with her mother and grandmother. Another orphan is Mustafa. He is 6 years-old whose parents were martyred by Russian airstrikes. More than 90 orphans live in Al-Bab in Aleppo countryside. They need your support to have a normal life and education. We have established Molham Kindergarten for Orphans to offer them all their needs. A donation by 25$ would sponsor education for an orphan while a donation by 50$ would offer him the education and living expenses. Our lovely orphans deserve your support.

title: Grant of a Day Wage
overview_text:
Grant of a Day Wage
The idea behind this campaign is to secure warmth for children in camps, through giving the wage of one working day. The amount might seem very little but it does make a great difference in their miserable reality, especially as winter approaches. Donate what is worth the pay you get per one working day to protect children in camps from the brutal winter and to alleviate the burdens of helpless mothers. Donate to give some peace of mind to displaced people in camps. The pay you get for working one day only could cover winter essentials of a child for the entire season!

title: Electric Wheelchairs Fund
overview_text: Many of the wounded struggle to move because of amputation of their limbs, and they cannot afford to buy an electric bicycle or electric wheelchair that would make their life easier. We work through this campaign to achieve the dream of a little child who wishes to go to school or a wounded person who needs a vehicle so that he can look for work and support his family.

title: Molham Giving Day 2020
overview_text: On this day, a group of donors will match your donation, no matter how much you are donating - you give one dollar and it becomes two dollars! If you want to maximize your donation’s impact and help more children, make sure you donate today. All donations received on Molham Giving Day will be allocated towards securing shelters and warmth to the most vulnerable displaced families. (Matching of donations has ended since 5 December. Donations can still be made to the campaign but without matching.)

title: 1000 Housing Units (2)
overview_text: Very often when we encounter a family in a camp and ask about what they need the most, their answer would indicate that their ultimate wish is to get out of the camp and move into a home. $300 can make this wish come true. With a one-time donation of this amount, you can relocate a displaced family and literally transform their life and make a several years old dream come true for them. By the finalization of the project, each beneficiary family receives a housing unit made up of two rooms, a kitchenette, and a toilet, at a cost of $750. In case your online donation does not go through, please click on the chat box so we can let you know of other payment methods.

title: Emergency Campaign - Refugee Camp Fire
overview_text:
Emergency Campaign - Refugee Camp Fire
The tents of 92 refugee families were burned down by racists. The families and their children ran in mud to flee the fire, leaving everything behind. It is our responsibility to support them through financial assistance for each family. $100 can help an afflicted family secure their basic needs. We will also work on securing heating fuel for camps in the region throughout winter.

We will also work on securing heating fuel for camps in the region throughout winter.

title: COVID-19 and winter Response
overview_text: In coordination with the HandUp foundation, we will supply 5 ventilators for IDPs in NW Syria in a response to COVID-19 to ease the pandemic conditions. Also, we intend to restore 292 tents in addition to digging a well to cover the needs of 472 families in Molham camp in Nayara.

title: Emergency Response to IDPs Camps
overview_text:
Emergency Response to IDPs Camps
The program of response in Molham Team aims to provide relief to thousands of displaced and impoverished families in Idlib, Aleppo countryside, and Lattakia countryside. Through this program, families will be supplied with basic necessities, including food, shelter, and clothes. It also aim to offer urgent response to disasters such as floods and fires that frequently occur in camps.
details_text: The program of response in Molham Team aims to provide relief to thousands of displaced and impoverished families in Idlib, Aleppo countryside, and Lattakia countryside. Through this program, families will be supplied with basic necessities, including food, shelter, and clothes. It also aim to offer urgent response to disasters such as floods and fires that frequently occur in camps.

title: Lost Childhood
overview_text: Mohammad, Bilal, and Ahmad are three children who showed up in the film (Lost childhood) on ARTE TV, highlighting the phenomenon of child labor in Syria. After they lost their fathers in war, the three boys dropped out of school to work and overcome the difficult conditions of living. They had to work in tough occupations for a very low income to maintain their families. We want to lend them a hand to get back to schools and secure them shelter, food, clothes, and medications to improve their conditions. This campaign is for them and for all children who endure the same suffering.

title: Zakat Almal
overview_text: The campaign is to collect your Zakat over the year to be distributed for beneficiaries of needy and displaced people in addition to patients, orphans, and students inside Syria and in neighboring countries. The distribution will comply with the Islamic rules of Zakat dispense.

title: Wishes
overview_text: During our daily work, we meet many mothers, fathers, and children who wish for things that we take for granted. Examples include: washing machine, water tank, games, mobile, certain type of food, bicycle, etc. Through this campaign, we plan on soothing their tired hearts and compensating them for their hardships by asking about their wishes and through your donations, turning their wishes into reality.

title: Molham Center for Physiotherapy
overview_text: Asmahan started taking her first steps after she was deprived of movement because of spina bifida. She underwent physiotherapy at Molham center which was the reason that made her able to walk alone without relying on the medical device! Asmahan is one of the hundreds of cases that need physiotherapy due to diseases or war injuries that are abundant in northern Syria, and the city of Idlib. Today more than ever, the need to open Molham center for physical therapy is critical. The center will provide its services for free to the poorest and most affected patients. Hundreds of patients are waiting for your contribution to start their treatments. Donate now and support Molham center for physiotherapy.

title: Abo Hurairat Alaqsa campaign - Abo Alayman
overview_text:
Abo Hurairat Alaqsa campaign - Abo Alayman
Palestinian people were the first supporters of displaced Syrian people in Syria and in neighboring countries. They have been a part of many campaigns of Molham team as donors and volunteers. This campaign was launched upon the request of a group of young Palestinians to collect donations for housing unit building. The campaign was named Abo Hurairat Alaqsa campaign - Abo Alayman. Donate for the campaign via PayPal or via bank account. One room costs 300$ and a housing unit of 2 rooms, bathroom, and a kitchen costs 750$. A donation by any amount will have an impact on the reality of camps inhabitants. For more information about the project contact us on Whatapp: 00905367026447

title: Emergency Response - Arsal Refugee Camps
overview_text:
Emergency Response - Arsal Refugee Camps
For the third consecutive year, around 8000 tents in Arsal refugee camps are subject to heavy snowstorms. Hundreds of refugee and impoverished families are to face the bitter winter cold in the midst of the lack of heating supplies. For the past two years, Molham Team has been contributing towards securing heating supplies for refugees in Arsal camps. This year, we will also work to provide them with diesel fuel and other winter supplies to help them cope with winter.

title: Matched Donation - Housing Units
overview_text: Matched Donation - Housing Units
details_text: Donate 300$ to secure a room for IDPs on Molham volunteering team website and this donation is going to be matched by Awtad charity. Donate 750$ to build a housing unit for IDPs and Awtad charity will guarantee the building of another one. It was an incredibly joyful moment when we ripped off the useless tents during the relocation of families into housing units. Thanks to your donations, more than 472 families were relocated into housing units in the 3rd phase of the 1000-Housing Units project. Today we launch the 4th phase of the 1000-Housing Units project in coordination with Awtad charity who sponsored to duplicate your donations. Tens of families are still in makeshift camps surrounded with mud, lacking sanitary systems and water wells. Their struggle with floods in winter is continuous and sickness exhausted their children. Many families deserve to get their dream of leaving the tent and to be in a decent shelter. For more information contact us on Whats-app: 00905367026447 Note: Donate by any amount and we guarantee that all received money will be dedicated to building housing units with required infrastructure, taking into consideration all possible changes in prices or in the planned design.

title: Campaign of Syrian and Arabic doctors in Germany
overview_text:
Campaign of Syrian and Arabic doctors in Germany
All donations will be used for the project of building housing units for displaced families, with the aim of moving them from tents to the housing units. One room costs 300$ and a housing unit of 2 rooms, bathroom, and a kitchen costs 750$. A donation by any amount will have an impact on the reality of camps inhabitants.

title: Urgent Humanitarian Cases
overview_text: ''Four of my children are sick. I was unable to buy them the expensive medications. Now, they are well but still have one newborn who has the same symptoms.'' Sulaiman was born with muscular atrophy and his treatment is very costly. A donation of 300$ would support the family. This campaigns aims at securing urgent relief to Abdullah and similar urgent humanitarian cases.

title: Mosque, School, and Infrastructure
overview_text: Following the establishment of the housing units and the relocation of 472 families into the housing complex, we are planning to build a school and a mosque within the complex. In addition, we are working on providing it with the needed infrastructure, and purchasing a nearby land to expand the housing project. For those who would like to give Sadaqa Jariyah (continuous charity) for the mosque, school, infrastructure, or the purchased land, you can donate any amount for this campaign.

title: Gift for a Child
overview_text: For anyone who would like to gift a child in a camp, you may donate to get them gifts for the following costs: bicycle: $50 - toy: $5 - ball: $3 - play kitchen: $10 - Barbie: $5.

title: For Your Children
overview_text:
Because we believe that humanitarian work is one the core values that we have to engrave in our children's minds, we launch this campaign for your own children! Through this campaign, your children can make a donation of any amount and accompany it with a letter to children of camps. Our volunteers will deliver it to the children and in turn, your child will receive a photo or a video that shows their reactions when receiving the amount and letter. Seeing the impact of their contribution, your children will feel proud of themselves! Please send to us your child's name and your WhatsApp number via this e-mail address:
, in order to send you the video and show it to your children.

title: Wishes - Action For Sama
overview_text:
Wishes - Action For Sama
On the tenth anniversary of the Syrian revolution, to honour the mothers of those killed by the barbaric violence of the Syrian regime, Molham Volunteering Team has launched a joint campaign with Action For Sama to provide for the needs of these devoted mothers and their families. We respectfully acknowledge that nothing could ever be of equal value to their continued sacrifice, never-ending even in the harsh conditions brought on by displacement, loss and being a refugee. This campaign will aim to secure their basic needs, by providing essential support to these mothers who deserve so much more.

title: From Student To Student
overview_text: Revolutions are formed through ideas and survive through education and awareness. With that in mind, the Syrian Students Union at Sabahattin Zaim University in Turkey, in cooperation with Molham Team, celebrates the tenth anniversary of the Syrian Revolution through launching 'From Student To Student' campaign, which aims at supporting university students in NW Syria in their educational journeys.

title: Medical Point - Aziz Housing Complex
overview_text:
Medical Point - Aziz Housing Complex
Hussein and his family live in one of the housing units of Aziz Housing Complex in Azaz, northern Syria. The family waits for Hussein every day to come back home from work. One day, he did not come back because there was a fire accident at work, which left him with third and fourth degree burns. Hussein's case requires continuous treatment in order for him to restore his old life. Aziz Housing Complex is home for many displaced families who need treatment for various injuries and health conditions. Given the long distances to hospitals, their hope of of recovery is often shattered. To overcome this problem, a medical point was established in the area to give families access to health care and emergency medical services.

title: Urgent Cases Fund
overview_text: Will I always look like this mom? The people around me are bullying me for how I look.. Sham’s smile has been replaced with pain after the fire she got into and left her with burns that cause a disfiguration in her forehead, and the loss of part of her hair.. $1200 will cover the treatment expenses she needs.. this fund is dedicated to help this child and similar other urgent cases who need medical treatment.

title: With You - Deir Ballout
overview_text:
With You - Deir Ballout
More than 1200 displaced families from southern Damascus live in Deir Ballout and Almohamadiya camps in dire conditions. In collaboration with Molham Team, volunteers from all around the world will work on securing the basic needs of the inhabitants of these camps.

title: One Dollar for One Orphan
overview_text:
One Dollar for One Orphan
One dollar might seem invaluable, but it is enough to be a one-day allowance for an orphan at school in Syria! A donation of 30$ will secure a school allowance for an orphan for a whole month. And 50$ will cover an orphan's basic needs for a month. Donate any amount and give an orphan a chance to enjoy a better life.

Donate any amount and give an orphan a chance to enjoy a better life.

title: Iftar Meals - Ramadan 2021
overview_text:
Iftar Meals - Ramadan 2021
This campaign is aimed at providing food meals for the neediest families in northern Syria and in refugee camps. Throughout Ramadan, you may donate 6$ to provide an Iftar meal of one family of 5 persons. You can also donate to more than one family and we will ensure delivery of meals during Ramadan.

title: Food Parcels - Ramadan 2021
overview_text:
Food Parcels - Ramadan 2021
Thousands of families in NW Syria in camps live in the midst of dire conditions. We will work on supplying them with essential food supplies in Ramadan. Give $50 to provide a food parcel for a family for the entire month of Ramadan, or $25 to a provide Suhoor parcel for a family for the entire month.

title: Zakat Al-Fitr - Ramadan 2021
overview_text:
Zakat Al-Fitr - Ramadan 2021
We intend through this campaign to collect Zakat Al-Fitr of you and your family during Ramadan, to spend it in accordance with Shariah on the neediest internally displaced persons, especially those in the camps of northern Syria. We will allocate the received donations to distribute the Zakat in the form of food items (rice, bulgur, lentil, freekeh) during the last week of Ramadan. You can take out Zakat AL-Fitr according to the announced values in your country.

title: Heal A Broken Heart
overview_text: Mahmoud has been through a tough displacement journey, that made his situation even worse with all the diseases that he has.. He suffers from diabetes that resulted in the amputation of both of his legs and one of his arms. He also suffers from decompression and has lost his vision. He also went through multiple heart attacks within the last week! When we asked about what are his needs he said that all what he want is to know that his family is doing well.. $400 guarantees to provide them with all what they needs and lifts a huge load off his shoulders.. Your donation will secure Mahmoud's needs over the holy month, as well as that of many similar families who live in tragic conditions.

title: '..And whoever saves one..'
overview_text: '..And whoever saves one - it is as if he had saved mankind entirely.. ' (5:32) One of the greatest charitable deeds that you can do during the Holy month of Ramadan is donating towards saving a soul, relieving the pain of a child, or restoring hope to a patient who cannot afford treatment. Throughout the Holy month of Ramadan, we aim to support 250 of the most critical medical cases. You may contribute with $100 or any amount you see fit.

title: Home
overview_text: During the Holy month of Ramadan, you may invest in an endowment to provide shelter for a displaced family and relocate it from a tent, as part of the upcoming housing units project of Molham Volunteering Team. You may donate 100$ or any amount to participate in the project and transform the life of a family.

title: Sponsor a Student
overview_text: Despite all hardships of displacement and living in tents, hundreds of students in NW Syria are determined to continue their university education. They believe that it is the best way to guarantee a better future for their families. We are hoping through this campaign to support 100 hardworking university students in NW Syria. You can donate 100$ to sponsor a student in NW Syria for one semester.

title: Zakat Almal
overview_text: As one of the most preferred actions in Holy month, and through this campaign we are blessed to receive your Zakat Almal to dispense for beneficiaries of needy, displaced, patients, orphans, and students inside Syria and in neighboring countries according to the Islamic rules all over the holy month.

title: Share your meal with Syria
overview_text: It is narrated in an authentic hadith that good deeds are multiplied by 70 times in the holy month of Ramadan. Make the most of your Ramadan by providing iftar to Syrian families in need. Proceeds will be going directly to families in Syria that have been affected by the war as well as Syrian refugee camps. Take part in providing relief and support to families in need this Ramadan.

title: Ramadan with Palestinians
overview_text: Palestinians showed a high commitment with a great desire to donate for supporting displaced Syrians in Syria and in neighboring countries. This year and in Ramadan we adopted this campaign to receive donations from Palestine for Syrian in NW Syria. We call you to join us and present joy to many needy families during this holy month.

title: Eid Givings 9
overview_text: This campaign is dedicated to securing Eid givings (Eid money gift) and clothes for needy children in NW Syria and refugee camps, particularly orphaned children, to make their Eid joyful. Throughout the past years, we were able to bring Eid's joy to thousands of deprived children. Nothing can match the joy made by your little donation. The amount of Eid giving is 3$ and Eid clothes cost 20$.

title: Eid Desserts
overview_text: Since many poor families and their children are deprived of celebrating Eid, we launched this campaign to distribute Eid desserts for 2000 needy families in NW Syria and in neighboring countries. Through this campaign, we hope to share the happiness of Eid with them but in our own way. 7$ donation will provide a needy family with Eid desserts and joy.

title: Orphan Housing Endowment (Waqf)
overview_text: Our brothers and sisters, their shelters are tents.. Their cries break the silence of night.. With every drop of rain they hope their tents to stay still in the ground.. They dream of warmth and shelter.. Their stories aches the hearts.. This is the condition of those who lost the home warmth.. How about those who lost both home and family? In accordance with the saying of our merciful prophet (PBUH): “Whoever removes a worldly grief from a believer, Allah will remove from him one of the griefs of the Day of Resurrection. And whoever alleviates the need of a needy person, Allah will alleviate his needs in this world and the Hereafter. Whoever shields [or hides the misdeeds of] a Muslim, Allah will shield him in this world and the Hereafter.” We released our project, to build housing units in Azaz in rural Idlib “Sanbel Al Khair” team in partnership with Molham Volunteering Team announce in this month of mercy their third project: Orphan Housing Endowment (Waqf) Which aims to build housing units to secure at least ten orphan families One housing unit cost is 5000 US dollars, but our partners at Mulham Volunteer Team promised to contribute 2500 dollars for every 2500 dollars we collect. So every 2500 dollars can build a decent house that shelters orphans with their mother.. The space is 52 square meters, consists of two rooms with a kitchen and a bathroom, the building is a multi floor baton with complete water and electricity infrastructure.

title: Amnah's Park
overview_text: One of the many forms of suffering of children in NW Syria is the lack of recreational and fun activities. Because one of children's basic rights is the right to engage in play and recreational activities, we worked on establishing a park to give children in Aziz Housing Complex a safe and fun place to hang out in and We called it Amnah's park to remember her story. We also plan on using the rest of the donations to this campaign to establish other parks in NW Syria and equip them with playgrounds.

title: For Palestine
overview_text: We have always sensed the physical and moral support of Palestinians throughout all campaigns we launched. Today we would like to return their favor and launch ''Palestine'' campaign and use all our all our social media platforms and bank accounts to support them. Through this campaign and in collaboration with Molham Team in Palestine and other partners there, we intend to help the afflicted Palestinian people in addition to secure them the basic medical and non-medical essentials. All incoming and spent donations can be tracked in the Transparency file on our website.

title: The proceeds of (Fundamentals of Crowdsourcing and Crowdfunding) Book
overview_text:
The proceeds of (Fundamentals of Crowdsourcing and Crowdfunding) Book
The campaign is dedicated to selling the book (Fundamentals of Crowdsourcing and Crowdfunding) and the proceeds will be donated to the education department in Molham Volunteering Team. You can buy this book by buying this book and donating one dollar or more. After you donate you will receive a copy of the book by email. The book talks about the basics of Crowdsourcing and Crowdfunding on a practical basis and it is considered as the first reference of this discipline available in the Arabic version. Crowdsourcing and Crowdfunding is a modern manner of management of people groups in problem-solving via the internet. Also, the book concerns how to develop the solutions, in addition, to have creative services and products with low prices and fastly comparing to traditional manners of work. In our Arabic world, we experience exceptional conditions and a dire need to develop all ways of production. In these crisis circumstances, we need knowledge and initiatives to improve Crowdsourcing and Crowdfunding to establish major positive changes in our world. Crowdsourcing and Crowdfunding can imply the skill of young generations in the proper way to solve problems and also it helps to provide our needs regarding education, relief, and reconstruction.

title: HEAT 2
overview_text: “The same tragedy happens every summer. We run into the tent to hide from the sun but find it more hot inside because of how its fabric locks in the heat. My kids spend their day trying to find a cool place under a tree to have some sleep!” Razan and Hamouda are just like thousands of other children in the displacement camps who spend their day sleeping from the tiredness and harsh conditions of summer. Their dreams in this hot season is as simple as finding a shadow to spend their day in. “Heat” campaign has lessened the suffering of many families during the summer, and many more are still awaiting your support to get the cooling means they need. Join our efforts to relieve such families this summer by donating $20 to secure a fan to a family living in a tent. A fan is for $20, a battery of 20 amp is for $20, a water cooler is for $20, and an ice bag is for $2.

title: Chronic Pain Healing Fund
overview_text: Mohammed suffers from high blood pressure, diabetes, heart diseases, and hyperglyceridemia and his condition is worsening each day.. Ahmad, a young man, who has lost all his childhood and its energy because of his suffering from cerebral atrophy since he was born.. Both Mohammed and Ahmad need daily long-term medications, in addition to many similar medical cases from the injured and displaced people that aren’t able to afford their medications.. And for such cases, Molham Team has decided to start a campaign to secure long-term medications displaced families. Your donations will be the reason they are able to continue their treatment..

title: Eid Sacrifice 6
overview_text: As Eid Al Adha approaches, internally displaced people in NW Syria and refugees in Lebanon continue to live in extremely difficult conditions, especially with the worsening economic situation. Therefore, Eid Al Adha sacrifice distribution will target displaced families in Syria who live within Molham Team's areas of operations: the Northern and eastern countryside of Aleppo - Darat Izza and the western countryside of Aleppo - Idlib and Idlib countryside - Latakia countryside. It will also target refugees families in Lebanon (Arsal - Beqaa - Tripoli). Priority will be for the most vulnerable displaced families in camps. The cost of one Udhiya including the slaughter, butchering, and distribution is 230$ for sheep. For cows, the cost is $1600, including the slaughter, butchering, and distribution, which can be shared by up to 7 persons. Each Udhiya process will be documented with the name of the donors via a video record to be sent by email following the completion of execution.

title: Save A Life
overview_text: Abo Ahmad was urgently administered into ICU due to a snake bite he got while he was in his tent. Sadly, his case is so severe. As the weather is getting hot, people in tents are more vulnerable to scorpions and snakes bites. Particularly, in Lattakia countryside, the nature of the area makes them exposed to the risk of these bites while hospitals lack the antidotes or antivenoms. Based on the critical need for antidotes, Molham Volunteering Team launches a campaign to provide hospitals with antidotes to rescue people's lives, And the camps will be sprayed with insecticides to reduce the spread of snakes and other similar creatures. A donation will protect them from death related to these fatal bites.

title: Ghaith Laboratory for Medical Analysis - Idlib
overview_text:
Ghaith Laboratory for Medical Analysis - Idlib
''We have to run the medical tests as soon as possible to verify the cerebral atrophy diagnosis.'' "Abdullah, my son, needs urgent medical tests, but I can't afford them. My work barely covers our daily living expenses. My son has been at the hospital for 10 days, and I'm unable to help him." These are the words of Abdullah's father. Donate to the campaign of ''Ghaith Laboratory for Medical Analysis'' to secure treatment for Abdullah and many other cases in Idlib city.

title: Eid Givings 10
overview_text: This campaign is dedicated to securing Eid givings (Eid money gift) and clothes for vulnerable children in NW Syria and refugee camps, to make their Eid joyful. Throughout the past years, we were able to bring Eid's joy to thousands of deprived children. Nothing can match the joy made by your little donation. The amount of Eid giving is 3$ and Eid clothes cost 20$.

title: Transform Their Life
overview_text: We are currently conducting field visits for many families in NW Syria who live in tragic conditions. During these visits, we will be recording photos and videos of some but not all families, due to several reasons. This campaign is dedicated to them. It aims at transforming their reality from the roots. Any amount you give will serve this noble purpose. The received donations will be allocated towards relocating families to better homes, providing medications for critical medical cases such as burns, and securing long-term sponsorships for families in need.

title: Urgent Cases Fund
overview_text: He has eye cancer. Every time it comes to my mind, I break down in tears. My baby is the joy that turned into tragedy. I can't tolerate seeing him crying because of pains. Khalil, a 6 months newborn who is awaiting your help with 1500$ to get the treatment. This Urgent Cases Fund is aimed at providing treatment for Khalil and many similar medical cases that require immediate help. Your donation saves lives!

title: Humanitarian Cases
overview_text: Reem is 4 months newborn who got dehydration, intestinal obstruction, and COVID-19. Her father is a displaced man who has cancer. Reem needs baby milk and medical essentials cost $250. Your donations will help Reem and hundreds of similar cases.

title: Talents Support Fund
overview_text: In the past 10 years, an entire generation was born in war conditions; children stripped of their most basic rights. Besides education, they were deprived of all kinds of support for their talents in sports, literature, and art, which is necessary to allow these talents to nurture. We believe that these talents are as important as education in children's character development. This is why we launch a campaign dedicated towards nurturing the talents of deprived and vulnerable children and youth who live in IDP camps and in neighbouring countries. Each donation you make contributes in building a strong generation with a bright future.

title: Humanitarian Sponsorship Fund
overview_text: “Our father died in front of our eyes because of an aerial attack. We have no one to take care of us. My siblings Mustafa & Aya have a genetic disease, and can only move their eyes.” Martyrdom, displacement and rare diseases are the daily miserable reality that these 8 orphans go through. They lost their father and await your support through monthly sponsorship of $100. The Humanitarian Sponsorship Fund is dedicated towards providing long-term sponsorship for this family and similar ones.

title: With Turkey
overview_text: In solidarity with the Turkish people who are facing devastating wildfires that hit large parts of Turkey, Molham Team launches an emergency campaign to help those who were impacted from it with basic needs and to contribute in the reforestation and rehabilitation of homes.

title: Housing Units 3
overview_text: Today will begin the fundraising campaign for the fifth housing project in Molham Team. Your donations will change many displaced families' live by providing safe houses for them to settle in. Your support with a one dollar donation will contribute in making a lifelong impact for a displaced family. The cost of one share in a house is $250. The total cost of one concrete block house ready for a family to move in is $2500.

title: Help me help others
overview_text: "English below" ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- Zaterdag 4 September 2021 organiseren wij een fietstocht voor onderwijs van Syrische kinderen. We gaan 99km fietsen: wij starten in Brussel om vervolgens, via Louvain-la-Neuve en Nivelles, in Mons te eindigen. Om een betere wereld te krijgen, willen wij graag onze aandacht geven en onszelf inzetten voor de toekomst van Syrische kinderen. Wij zouden graag hebben dat jullie daarin mee deelnemen. Syrische kinderen hebben boeken nodig, ze hebben vreedzame boeken nodig, want ze hebben genoeg bloederige verhalen gelezen. Deze keer fiets ik samen met Mohamed Idelbi en Omar Shaikhani. Uw sponsoring is zeer belangrijk en is een vrijwillige bijdrage. Elke cent kan een wereld van verschil maken voor een kind. Deel dit via Facebook, Instagram, Twitter of e-mail. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ On September 4th, 2021, we are organizing a bicycle tour to support Syrian children’s education. The tour will be 99km, from Brussels to Mons, passing through Louvain-la-Neuve and Nivelles. In order to build a better world, we would like to offer the best future we can to Syrian children by giving them our attention and commitment. We would love for you to participate! The Syrian children need books, beautiful and peaceful books, because they have already known enough violence. This time, I will be cycling alongside Mohamed Idelbi and Omar Shaikhani. Your sponsorship means a lot to us, and the amount is voluntary. Each cent can make a world of difference for a child. Don’t hesitate to share this on Facebook, Instagram, Twitter or e-mail.

title: A mosque and educational institute in Mersin
overview_text:
A mosque and educational institute in Mersin
Fahd Raie has launched a campaign to secure a building to be an endowment ( waqf) for students of religious sciences in Mersin. The institute will involve more than 1000 students to learn Alqura'an, Fiqh, and religious fundamentals in addition to a mosque for Fridays. We call everyone who would like to have sadaqa jariyah to donate for the endowment. The endowment costs 3 million Turkish Lira, one million is already collected.

title: Back to School Stationery2
overview_text: Due to the economic crisis that people endure in Syria and in neighboring countries, many children are deprived of education. As the scholar year is so close, Molham team launched this campaign to offer scholar stationery for students in Syria and in refugee countries, in addition to the class desks, boards, and other essentials for schools in camps.

title: Give What You Love
overview_text: Allah said in the holy Quran, '' By no means shall you attain to righteousness until you spend (benevolently) out of what you love; and whatever thing you spend, Allah surely knows it.'' Ali ‘Imran 92. This campaign is dedicated towards helping the most vulnerable displaced families. Give any amount you can and lessen their burdens.

title: Medical Sponsosrships
overview_text: ''None of the doctors have given us any hope of recovery for his condition.'' One of the most painful dermatological diseases is pemphigus where the child suffers pains with every movement. Saif Aldeen was born with all these intolerable pains in addition to his desperation of being able to play and move like other children. Many medical essentials of gauzes and antiseptics are basic in the management of his case. Your support of $75 every month will ameliorate his pains. This campaign aims at helping Saif Aldeen and similar cases.

title: Urgent Humanitarian Cases
overview_text: "My baby had a cardiac arrest while she was under surgery! Since we arrived Turkey, my only daughter has been in the ICU with a peacemaker. I have no means to rescue her, also I have no idea how my family is doing back there in Syria alone in the tent..'' These are the words of Asma'a father. The one-year-old baby was born with hydrocephalus and cardiac congenital defect. Her father carries heavy burdens and a donation of $400 would alleviate some of them. Through this campaign, we aim to offer support for Asma'a and similar cases in urgent need of help.

title: Joud's Dream
overview_text: On September 7, 2021, a Syrian regime's missile fragment hit Joud Shreet in her heart and killed her dream at 21 years of age, just one week after finishing her BA in Psychology. Joud’s dream was born one year ago when she decided to open up a K-4 school in Idlib province, Syria. She worked day and night to make the school a reality and to make it one of a kind: Joud created the first nonprofit school to follow a Montessori method and help kids growing up during the war learn while having fun and enjoying a break from their cruel reality. While undertaking college coursework in this cruel reality herself, Joud conceived and created her school from scratch. It became an immediate success, prompting her to flip an admin space into an extra classroom for additional interested students. Joud Shreet meaningfully impacted 140 children through her school, children who carry forth her vision toward a better future for Syrian children. This fundraiser intends to keep Joud’s dream alive and expand her impact on the children who need it most. Please help us make it a possibility!

title: Molham Scholarship
overview_text: ''Being born with no arms never impeded me. I chased my hope since birth to pursue my studies. I got the high school certificate despite all the terrific conditions of displacement and being away from my family living in the tent. Completing my degree, graduation, and starting my career is my only dream for now.'' Nahla is a university student whose dream of changing her family's life wouldn't be true unless you supported her. Donate the campaign of Molham Scholarship, and your sponsorship is her only hope for that. You may donate from your Zakat or as Sadaqah Jariyah (ongoing charity) to help these students move on with their lives and transform the reality of their families.

title: A Breath - COVID19 Emergency Response
overview_text:
A Breath - COVID19 Emergency Response
NW Syria is facing a wave of COVID-19 delta variant infections at an alarming rate, accompanied by a high mortality rate. Meanwhile, the healthcare system is unable to cope amidst the scarcity of life-saving and preventative medical supplies. In other words, the healthcare system is on the brink of collapse! This necessitates a large-scale, prompt response by the community. Therefore, and in collaboration with the Civil Defence, Violet organization, and several doctors and journalists, we launched the campaign of ''A Breath''. Within the first phase of this campaign, we aim at securing 1000 oxygen cylinders. Your donation will rescue a breathless patient with no means to face the deadly virus.

title: Urgent Cases Fund
overview_text: Nayef is a displaced man who lives in a camp. His only wish is to speak, as he lost his larynx due to cancer! The man is devastated and needs $650 to secure a medical device that will help him regain his ability to talk. This Urgent Cases Fund is aimed at providing treatment for Abdulrazzak and many similar medical cases that require immediate help. Your donation saves lives!

title: Emergency Response for Camps
overview_text: 'Our tents collapsed in front of our eyes. Within a moment, 35 people became homeless! Being displaced from our homes left us vulnerable, but no words could describe our devastation from what occurred to us now..' Abu Muhammad is the main provider of eight families, most of whom are widows and orphans. He tried to describe the immense pain he felt when watching his grandchildren sleeping on the street, while he can't protect them from the cold or insects! To ease the helplessness of this family and other families who are experiencing the same conditions, we launched this campaign to respond to their most urgent needs; shelter.

title: The Path to Light - Orphans Support Fund
overview_text:
The Path to Light - Orphans Support Fund
“I can’t forget the scene of my dad’s body full of blood. I sit alone in a room and cry everyday trying to forget what I have seen but the pain of my loss grows more! After his martyrdom, we were displaced to a tent and I was responsible for securing my family’s needs. This all caused me to be behind in my education as I wasn’t able to focus on it anymore!” Hiba endured huge pain due to her father’s martyrdom because of bombardments. Her mental health condition worsened and started to be very secluded, this caused her to be bullied from the children around her. A monthly sponsorship of $50 can compensate for what Hiba has been through, and guarantee her a brighter future! Hundreds of orphans have stories similar to Heba story, and it is our duty to sponsor them to offer them the chance to live a decent childhood!

title: Molham Village Charitable Endowment (Waqf)
overview_text:
Molham Village Charitable Endowment (Waqf)
Through this campaign, you may contribute in providing a decent shelter for IDPs and orphans in NW Syria within Molham Village, which is a long-term charitable endowment “Waqf”. The project consists of 300 apartments, in addition to a mosque, a school, and other facilities. Each apartment costs $4800. You may make a one-time donation of any amount, or pay the full price of an apartment by instalments over several months. You may also give any amount to support building the facilities that will serve the inhabitants of Molham Village, such as a school and mosque. For more info about this project, please contact us on WhatsApp: 00905367026447.

title: A Loaf of Bread 2
overview_text:
A Loaf of Bread 2
As the prices of basic food supplies continue to increase and the economic situation of the IDPs camps in Syria worsens, displaced people struggle to put food on the table. This campaign aims at helping impoverished Syrian families with basic food supplies in the form of food parcels and bread. A donation of $10 will provide one displaced family with bread for a month.

title: Behind Closed Doors - Humanitarian Cases Fund
overview_text:
Behind Closed Doors - Humanitarian Cases Fund
We come across many people in desperate need of help, but never ask for help. They just go on with their lives, working tirelessly to make a living for their families. Once we get to visit their homes, we witness the most extreme forms of deprivation. This is the reality of tens of families in NW Syria who experience immense suffering from behind the closed doors of their homes. This campaign is dedicated to shedding the light on their stories and alleviating their suffering. Every little donation you make goes a long way.

Once we get to visit their homes, we witness the most extreme forms of deprivation. This is the reality of tens of families in NW Syria who experience immense suffering from behind the closed doors of their homes. This campaign is dedicated to shedding the light on their stories and alleviating their suffering. Every little donation you make goes a long way.

title: Heal A Broken Heart
overview_text: This beautiful photo was taken for Abu Ibrahim while he was taking his daughter to school on the bicycle. His photo went viral on social media. We visited him today and asked about his living conditions. We found out that he was displaced from Aleppo and that he teaches Quran in a mosque. Therefore, we would like to provide him with better means for transportation, and also to get a present for his daughter. All incoming donations in this campaign will be dedicated to allowing him to start a new life. It is worth mentioning that this father never asked for anything, we reached him on our own initiative!

title: Give Warmth 15
overview_text: “She isn’t able to talk or communicate with us since she was born, but despite all, she still goes everyday from the early morning to gather firewood” Batoul’s mother sorrowfully explained to us about her tough conditions, and inability to talk and communicate. She also talked about their suffering due to their displacement to Latakia countryside camps, and how Batoul helps through their struggles despite her illness. Batoul and thousands of other children and displaced families need your help, your donation to “Give Warmth 15” will ease their burdens. A donation of $50 will secure winter supplies for a family for a month. A donation of $20 will provide winter clothes for a displaced child. Every little donation goes a long way.

title: World Orphans Day
overview_text: This 11th of November is a special day dedicated for orphans - World Orphans Day. On this occasion, we launch this campaign to encourage all to join our orphan sponsorship program, to remind them that when a child misses one parent or both, he is deprived of his childhood and dreams. No child ever deserves to live with a broken heart. Everyone can help with as little as possible. This campaign will shed the light on the lives of orphans and the hardships they endure, hoping that this would contribute to improving their lives.

title: Fruit Plate
overview_text: In one of our field visits to a displaced family, we asked a child what would he like, and the answer really struck us. He said, “I want an apple”. The majority of us take many things we have at home for granted, but the very same things are wishes for families in camps. This campaign aims at offering fruit plates for displaced families. You may think providing fruits shouldn't be a priority, and this is exactly why we launch this campaign! These families always think about essentials when they receive financial support, and so they would probably never think about getting fruits for their children. A $7 donation will provide a fruit plate for a family and bring joy upon its children.

title: Sponsorship of Humanitarian Cases
overview_text: "I'm feeling overwhelmed, and all of the world's concerns are forced on me due to Mustafa's medical condition. After God, no one could help him except his brother and me. Mustafa was born with quadriplegia and hadn't had a good day since birth." Mustafa is suffering from challenging health and living conditions. His mother is helpless and in pain because she has no one to turn to. Your $100 sponsorship will help secure the family's basic needs, alleviating their hopelessness. Your donation can make a difference. Your donations to this campaign will help Mustafa family and hundreds of other families

title: Butterfly Garden
overview_text: On the fifth birthday of Kanz, we launched a campiagn to build a butterfly garden for children! Half of the needed amount has been raised, and we still need around $10,000 for the playground and trees.

title: Bany
overview_text: Bany's platform has the initiative to support the orphans for education and occupational training in addition to financial support. In this campaign, we will spread over the value of businessmen's commitment to afford a part of their profits to participate in this campaign monthly. The happiness that a charity creates is unique, have you experienced it before? We can't change their reality but surely we can offer them a better future.

title: Molham Village School for Orphans - Azaz, NW Syria
overview_text:
Molham Village School for Orphans - Azaz, NW Syria
"I don't have friends, I don't go to school, and I cannot walk. Moreover, we were displaced from our house and I lost my father. I had to go through this suffering and I am only 11 years old. I don't know what the future hides!" Nusaiba is an orphan girl who suffered from kidney failure. She also suffers from psychological and health problems. She went through harsh conditions that deprived her of her basic rights, such as playing and studying. She needs a monthly orphan sponsorship of $50 and an educational sponsorship of $25. Many children in Molham Village School are waiting for your support to show them that there is still hope. The aim of this campaign is to provide education to Nusiba and children with similar stories of orphanhood and deprivation.

title: Save a Premature Baby
overview_text: It goes without saying that premature birth puts the infant’s life in danger, and may lead to permanent illnesses due to hypoxia. Sally is one of these newborns, and she now suffers from lung immaturity and respiratory distress syndrome. The newborn badly needs start treatment as soon as possible, before her condition worsens. She needs to take a pulmonary surfactant injection, which would help regulate her breathing. Sally’s parents helplessly watch their first baby suffering, without being able to secure her treatment. For sally and tens of other newborns, we launched a campaign dedicated to these cases NW Syria, with the aim of helping premature newborns overcome the critical stage of their life. Any donation you make will contribute in saving the lives of tens of premature babies each month.

title: Winter Clothes for Children
overview_text: Winter is a living nightmare for children in camps. They’ll once again experience the freezing cold weather that leaves their fragile bodies shivering seeking some warmth! But you, and at the comfort of your home, can change their winter experience with only $20! With $20 you can secure winter shoes, a coat, a shawl, a beanie, gloves, socks, and a pair of pants for a child. Your donations for this campaign will save hundreds of children that are expecting a harsh winter full of sufferings and illnesses!

title: Zakat Al-Mal
overview_text: Through this campaign, we will collect Zakat Al-Mal and distribute it to the intended recipients; the needy, sick, orphans, and displaced people, in addition to students and homeless families in Syria and in neighbouring countries. The disbursement will take place year round, in accordance with the guidelines of Shari'ah.

title: Until the Last Tent
overview_text: We met Salman and his family and asked them about their circumstances during winter; the man cried while describing the struggles they have been through. He told us that a benefactor purchased a piece of land for them, but they couldn't afford to build a room on it. He also told us that he has recently lost his 8-year-old granddaughter, Saja, while she was going to school due to a car accident. His sorrowful story has deeply touched us. We promised to help him and all the families in the camp, by building them housing units to replace their tents. Our ultimate aim is to compensate them, in some way, for their immense losses. 'Until the Last Tent' campaign is dedicated to transforming tents into housing units to put an end to displaced families' multilayered suffering. One room = $500. One share = $100.

title: Urgent Humanitarian Cases Fund
overview_text: "My hand was cut off while I was helping my dad at work! I wasn't sad about myself, but I was sad for my dad and family that I could not help them anymore with mashing stones and sand. Despite my condition, I started collecting nylon to sell it and help my family with a small income." Ahmad, who's only 7 years old, lives in these harsh circumstances! Ahmed and his family are still suffering, and their reality is more difficult. They need your support with $450 to secure their basic needs! The family awaits support with $450 to secure medications and expenses.

title: Give warmth - Palestine
overview_text: Every time we launch a campaign to help the people in NW Syria and countries of asylum, the Palestinians never fail to be one of the greatest supporters. And because people are suffering from the tough winter conditions, we have launched “Give Warmth - Palestine” campaign. As we believe that people who’ve experienced the same pain will always give their best to lessen the pain of others. $50 secures the winterization supplies for a month. $20 secures a child’s winter clothes.

title: House Rent
overview_text: “We’ve been through all kinds of struggles, but the worst of them all is seeing my children in pain and not being able to secure their medications. Since our displacement to this house, our sufferings became greater, and we sometimes don’t get to buy food just to save for its rent. But we always end up not securing the full amount.” Abu Abdullah lives within his 3 special-needs children in an uninhabitable house. One of their major sufferings is securing its rent. There are thousands of people, including families of widows and elderly people, like Abu Abdullah who’re waiting for your support to be relieved of their burdens. We’ve launched “House Rent” campaign as a part of our quest to lessen the sufferings of these families. Donating with any amount will be the relief thousands of families are in dire need for.

title: Rebirth! - Medical Cases Support
overview_text:
Rebirth! - Medical Cases Support
Every day, countless medical cases in Idlib end in death or deterioration due to extreme shortages in medical resources. Mohammed's brother is a newborn who passed away due to a lack of intensive care unit for newborns, which could have rescued the baby from acute respiratory distress! Mohammad is in the same condition right now at ALIKHA'A hospital, and his chance of survival completely depends on your support.. Through this campaign, we intend to offer the support that the hospital needs in order to help, treat, and save hundreds of patients like Mohammad.

title: New Year
overview_text: Start the New Year by changing a child’s life! Fatima is a child who doesn’t go to school, and we’ve started to build a school in the housing complex that she and a thousand other children live in. Your $50 donation will allow Fatima to go to school. This campaign is dedicated to allowing children to go back to school, in addition, to securing a school bus for the orphans in Idlib. We wish you a happy and peaceful year!

title: Amna - Sadaqah Jariyah
overview_text: Amna passed away after a long journey of suffering from her illness. She had always strived to help the children in NW Syria. We have dedicated this campaign to be a Sadaqah Jariyah (continued charity) in her name, and all donations will go to the Shelter Department that aims to build homes for displaced families in NW Syria.

title: Palestinians for NW Syria
overview_text: Palestinian people have always been on the forefront of those who help displaced Syrians, both in Syria or neighbouring countries. They have always participated in many campaigns with us, both as donors and volunteers. This campaign was launched at the request of Palestinian youth groups, who are working on collecting donations to provide heating supplies for displaced and refugee Syrian families, and to build them block housing rooms to alleviate their annual suffering in winter. You can donate to this campaign electronically through PayPal or your credit card. The cost of heating supplies for a family for a month is $50 (heater + heating supplies), and the cost of building one room is $500. Building a housing unit consisting of two rooms, a bathroom, and a small kitchen will cost $1500. Your donation of any amount, no matter how small, will contribute towards making their dream of leaving a tent and living in a warm and safe home come true! For more information about the project details, you can contact us via WhatsApp at 00962787843078.

title: Rehabilitate an Empty Home
overview_text: "Living in this house compounded our suffering, whereas we were hoping to find some relief after our displacement. It is completely empty and lacks basic life necessities. I have to make the children gather plastic scraps to burn to get some warmth, but nothing can surpass the freezing cold weather!" Mohammed sorrowfully explained to us the family's desperate living conditions. He suffers from a heart disease, and is the only provider for his widowed daughter and orphaned grandchildren. We have launched this campaign to help Mohammed and hundreds of other families who were forced to live in unfinished houses. Any donation will contribute in easing the burdens of these displaced families in NW Syria.

title: Molham School For Orphans - Idlib
overview_text:
Molham School For Orphans - Idlib
Shrooq is an innocent girl with a lovely smile. Her father died from a heart attack following the family's displacement. She was left with her siblings in an unfinished house with no sponsor. This is just one story from among 250 stories of orphaned children who go to Molham School for Orphans in Idlib. They all include similar elements of suffering and deprivation. By supporting this campaign, you contribute to enabling an orphaned child to pursue his or her education. A monthly amount of $25 provides education for an orphaned child, and $50 per month secures an orphaned child education as well as living expenses.

title: Molham School - Aziz Housing Complex, Azaz
overview_text:
Molham School - Aziz Housing Complex, Azaz
Narjes dreams of becoming a teacher in the future, whereas Mais Narjes dreams of becoming a doctor to provide treatment for injured people and to help her elderly father. Following a long period of being out of school due to displacement, all these dreams started to become achievable when these girls went back to class in Molham School of Aziz Housing Complex, Azaz, NW Syria. Please help Narjis and Mais and hundreds of other displaced children to access education through giving any amount. You also can sponsor a student with $25 per month.

title: Winter Response for Arsal Refugee Camps - 2022
overview_text:
Winter Response for Arsal Refugee Camps - 2022
For the fourth year in a row, more than 8000 tents were completely submerged in snow after a heavy snowstorm hit the camps in Arsal region, Lebanon. Thousands of poor and refugee families are incapable of securing heating supplies for their children. For 3 years, Molham Team has responded to these families by providing them with diesel for heating. This year too, we're dedicating this campaign to secure them diesel and other winter supplies and ease their suffering.

title: IDP Camps Response - Give Warmth 15
overview_text:
IDP Camps Response - Give Warmth 15
A heavy snowstorm hit northwestern Syria, impacting hundreds of unprepared displaced families in the IDP camps. Their tents can barely provide any protection from the snow and the bitter cold. We are working hard on responding to the needs of as many families as possible, and providing them with essential winter supplies. Any donation you make goes a long way.
