We are working hard on responding to the needs of as many families as possible, and providing them with essential winter supplies. Any donation you make goes a long way.

title: Until The Last Tent
overview_text: We launched a live broadcast from a camp in NW Syria to show you the suffering of the families during the bitter cold. During the broadcast, we’ll be relocating families from the camp into apartment buildings. You can watch the live broadcast to live with us the experience of the relocation and donate to contribute to ending the suffering of the displaced people.

title: Tamra Complex Project
overview_text: A group of our Palestinian friends have decided to end the suffering of another 500 displaced families! The people of Tamra city in Palestine launched the “Tamra Complex” project that is to include 500 apartments, in addiiton to all service facilities such as: a school, a mosque, a park, markets, and a medical center. This project will be implemented in cooperation with Molham Volunteering Team. *The cost of each apartment is $4000, but every donation makes a difference and goas a long way!

title: A Small Help Can Do Alot
overview_text:
A Small Help Can Do Alot
More than 159 displaced families endure the bad living conditions in AlMagaba camp in Baseqa due to the drop of temperature to freezing points. They lack all warmth supplies, and for this reason, a group of German young people launched this campaign to collect donations for those families in the mentioned camp. This campaign is to help them to get the warmth supplies and your donations would change alot.

title: Equipment of Awtad-Molham School - Azaz, NW Syria
overview_text:
Equipment of Awtad-Molham School - Azaz, NW Syria
Through the generous support of hundreds of donors, we were able to complete the first stage of the construction of Awtad-Molham School, which will serve Aziz Housing Complex and Molham-Awtad Joint Housing Project in Azaz ciy, NW Syria. It is estimated that the school will receive more than 1000 students at the primary and elementary stages. At this point, donations are needed to prepare and equip the 20 classrooms in the school. You may donate in honour of a beloved one to provide the school with desks, chairs, lockers, and whiteboards. The full equipment of one classroom costs $2000. You may also donate to equip the labs, playgrounds, and activities rooms. Any contribution you make will help give access to education to hundreds of displaced children. For more details, please contact us via the email:

title: Urgent Humanitarian Cases Fund
overview_text: "She's been in the hospital since the day she was born. My hands are tied and I'm losing her!" Riham is a one-year-old child who's suffering from severe cerebral atrophy. She's now hospitalized and in a coma with continues seizers. Her father, Ahmad, is asking you to help end his poor kid's suffering with nothing more than 250$. Hundreds of people such as Riham are waiting for a kind soul to help them through their troubled days.

title: Urgent Medical Cases Fund
overview_text: “Will she spend her life like this? Will she be able to see? Does this hurt her? These are all questions that hunt me when I first saw my newborn with full blue eyes, and was later told that she suffers from a cornea disease..” Fatima is 5 month old baby who needs to undergo a surgery to save her sight. Your donation with $700 is all what she needs to overcome her disease. Your donation to the Urgent Cases Fund will help Fatima and hundreds of other medical conditions.

title: Fund for Orphans Sponsorships (Norway) - Norsk Sponsorfond
overview_text:
Fund for Orphans Sponsorships (Norway) - Norsk Sponsorfond
Norwegian Below ********************************************************************** More than 80 donors in Norway, most of them high school and university students, are participating in this campaign to sponsor 37 orphans. This campaign is to encourage those who want to donate on a permanent basis with an amount of less than $50 per month. All these small donations will be collected to provide a monthly sponsorship for an orphan. ********************************************************************* Foreldreløse sponsorfond for givere fra Norge er dedikert til trettisju barn, med mer enn åtti faste givere fra universitetsstudenter og videregående elever i Norge.

title: Wishes 4
overview_text: Our feeling of despair becomes our companion whenever we encounter a forcibly displaced woman or a mother who recounts how her life became miserable after the loss of her son. Their words about the misery in the camp are long-winded. For us, it is priceless to put a smile upon their weary faces and to listen to their honest prayers. Like every year, we launch the Wishes 4 campaign to meet the wishes of most mothers. Your participation truly will compensate them with a bit of everything they have lost.

title: Camp Services 2
overview_text: How do people go about their daily lives in tents? How can children, women, and the elderly survive when they lack the most basic necessities? We may overlook details that pose significant challenges to thousands of displaced people living in camps. For example, the lack of sanitation services and the occurrence of polluted stagnant water leads to the spread of insects and infections, most notably leishmaniasis. We have launched Camp Services 2 Campaign to provide and facilitate these services in order to help improve the lives of displaced people and avoid related health issues. Your contributions can make a big difference.

title: Food Parcels-Ramadan 2022
overview_text: For every displaced family that stands helpless in front of their children, and for the families of the injured, killed, and widowed, we have launched a campaign of Food Parcels. It aims to secure and deliver food baskets to thousands of families during the holy month of Ramadan across the camps of Northern Syria as well as countries of asylum. $65 could support a family for the whole month, or at least help them cover their Ramadan needs of food essentials or financial support. Your donation will help those needy families live a better Ramadan. Donate now!

title: Iftar Meals-Ramadan 2022
overview_text: The holy month of Ramadan has arrived with all its blessings and spirituality. Yet for the families living in camps, Ramadan is only days of reliving the helplessness and pain! For those families we have launched the Iftar Meals Campaign! Throughout the holy month, we work harder to reach the highest number of displaced families and provide them with baskets of fresh vegetables and meat that are sufficient for the families for two days. Additionally, we host a group Iftar inside the camps. With only $7, you can secure the family's iftar meal!

title: Happy Iftar
overview_text: The smile of an innocent child can bring joy to our hearts as well as make us smile! Creating happiness and joy for children in camps also will create a lot of those smiles. Therefore, we launch this campaign to secure and distribute Iftar meals special for children during the holy month. We will let every child choose what he/she wishes to have in this meal. With only $2, you can change this month into a whole different month where they feel full and content!

title: Heal A Broken Heart In Ramadan
overview_text:
Heal A Broken Heart In Ramadan
''Seeing him in pain is heartbreaking. I fall sick every time I recall that day when he was surrounded by fire. My pain is immense when I see him hiding and running away from everyone, avoiding their bullying. My son is struggling and I feel desperate and unable to help him.'' Ahmad has been in bad psychiatric condition after he sustained severe burns. His family plea for financial support of $200 to help their son. During Ramadan 2021, we were able to reach out to more than 500 deserving families and offer them financial support. We've felt the impact of this support through their innocent prayers and tears. In Ramadan 2022, we strive to support more than 500 decent families in NW Syria and in neighboring countries. Furthermore, we want to involve teachers in this campaign in honor of their dedication to their work and to compensate them. Another group that will be targeted through this campaign are the daily workers to give them a helping hand in the holy month. Your support will ease their life and heal their hearts within the holy month.

title: Orphans Support Fund
overview_text: During the holy month of Ramadan, we aim to secure sponsorships for 300 unsponsored orphan children. By donating $50 per month, you can sponsor an orphan and secure their living expenses inside Syria. in addition, you can follow up on their educational status and other needs or send them a gift through the care program provided by the orphan department. You can also make a one-time donation to support the orphans.

title: Sponsor A Student
overview_text: Despite displacement and harsh living conditions, there are hundreds of students in Northern Syria who still have hope and determination to complete their studies because of their belief in the importance of education in providing a brighter future for them and their families. Through this campaign, we seek to help 100 university students in Northern Syria to continue their education. You can also sponsor a student in the primary stage at one of the Molham Educational Team centers, which includes more than 1,500 students who receive education free of charge.

title: Deserve To Live
overview_text: Fatima is a cancer patient whose father was martyred when she was 6 months old. Three years ago, she was diagnosed with cancer, her condition quickly worsened, and she lost her sight. Fatima now needs a bone marrow transplant that had been postponed many times due to a health relapse. Currently, Fatima needs $300 for an urgent chemotherapy session. During the holy month of Ramadan, the campaign aims to support people and children with cancer residing at hospitals who need immediate assistance in order to complete their chemotherapy courses. This includes; urgent medication prior to chemotherapy (e.g. pills and costly injections), chemotherapy sessions or medical essentials that are not covered by government hospitals (e.g. oxygen devices and laryngoscopes) for critical cases (throat cancer - lung cancer). Through this campaign, you can help Fatima and many other similar cases.

title: Shelter For Displaced Families
overview_text: During the holy month of Ramadan, you have a great opportunity to provide support to displaced families by moving them from camps to decent houses as part of a construction project supervised by the team. You can donate $200 or any other amount you find suitable. Alternatively, you can support with $4000 to secure one complete apartment. You can also donate to other service facilities such as mosques, schools, healthcare centers, and gardens.

title: Zakat Al-Mal 2022
overview_text: During this holy month, you have the opportunity to carry out one of the greatest good deeds, Zakat Al-Mal. Through this campaign, we hope to collect your Zakat and distribute it among the groups that desperately need it, including the needy, patients, displaced people, orphans, students, and homeless families inside Syria and in neighboring countries. This will be in accordance with the guidelines of Shari'ah law.

title: Zakat Al-Fitr - Ramadan2022
overview_text: Starting from the beginning of Ramadan, we collect Zakat Al-Fitr which is then distributed to the displaced people in the last week of Ramadan and until the Eid Al-Fitr prayer. This Zakat can also include food items (rice, lentil, groats .. etc). Last year, the donations exceeded $187K and were distributed among 15,000 displaced families.

title: Dose Of Healing
overview_text: A campaign lunched by Help Team to support 100800 displaced people in Syria with free medical assistance in cooperation with Molham Volunteering Team trough its platform.

title: Bread
overview_text: A campaign launched by Help Team to secure bread for 234, 000 families inside Syria for the entire year in cooperation with Molham Volunteering Team trough its platform.

title: Share Your Meal With Syria
overview_text: It is narrated in an authentic hadith that good deeds are multiplied by 70 times in the holy month of Ramadan. Make the most of your Ramadan by providing iftar to Syrian families in need. Proceeds will go directly to families in Syrian refugee camps. Take part in providing relief and support to families in need this Ramadan.

title: A Piece Of Date
overview_text: Snabel Alkher Team launched their fifth project, "A Piece of Date," in collaboration with Molham Volunteering Team, to support Syrian refugees in Lebanon's camps. Each pack (which includes food and Ramadan essentials) costs $65. It is enough for one family for one month. With a total of $6500, the project hopes to assist 100 families. Participate and join us via: - Encourage everyone around you to spread the word about the project. -Share the information about the project on social media. Donate via: - Master or Debit card _ PayPal _ G pay _ Facebook _ Giropay _ Sofort _ Swish - Bank transfer (within Germany and Turkey)

title: Eid Giving 11
overview_text: Unfortunately, thousands of children don’t have the luxury of experiencing the Eid vibes of getting new clothes or Eid money gift. For this reason, we’re launching an Eid giving campaign just like every year. $30 will secure new Eid clothes, and $3 is the value of an Eid gift for a child in NW Syria and neighboring countries. This small donation will give children the chance of having a cheerful Eid!

title: Eid Desserts 3
overview_text: Families gather and celebrate this happy occasion, but people in the camps of NW Syria and other countries never get this chance as it reminds them of their long-standing sufferings due to their displacement. Just like every year, we launch this campaign to reach out to thousands of families to replace their sadness with happiness and hope. By distributing Eid desserts, $7 will allow a displaced family to feel the joy of Eid.

title: Molham Giving Day 2022
overview_text: Your donation will be matched on Molham Giving Day. In the final ten days of Ramadan, we announce the Molham Day of Giving, in which every donation received will be matched by a group of donors. No matter how much you are donating, Donate any amount to maximize your impact and to reach more people in need.

title: To Pursue Their Dreams
overview_text: The Molham Team launches this campaign in collaboration with the Student Union at Free Aleppo University to alleviate the burdens of university students who are displaced and living in tents. Hundreds of students in Northwest Syrian camps are looking forward to graduation. They believe that education will provide a better future for their families.

title: Molham-Awtad School
overview_text: Muna is an orphan among 1,000 displaced students attending Molham-Awtad primary school in northwest Syria. The majority of children in camps were forcibly displaced with their families, forcing them eventually to live in tents and drop out of school. This campaign will provide them with access to their right to education, and guarantee a brighter future for them. Donate $50 to fund a year of education for a student at Molham-Awtad School.

title: Molham Dental Clinic
overview_text: Paying for dental care procedures and treatment is one of the challenges for people in NW Syria. The expensive cost of such treatments is beyond their means. We, as the Molham team, took the initiative to help them by opening the Molham Dental Clinic in the Lattakia countryside to offer them a free service. In addition, the clinic will perform the necessary surgeries for mandibular deformations and other dental disorders. Molham Dental Clinic receives 500 patients per month and offers them long sought after relief. Your donation to this campaign will help us to relieve their pain.

title: Small Project Fund
overview_text: Many displaced families have lost everything they once had and have become helpless. Nevertheless, many of them have got the potential and skills required to start over and work hard to provide for their loved ones. For this, we have launched the " Small Project Fund" campaign where we offer those people the opportunity to start their own businesses and be productive in the community they live in. This will contribute to providing families with a long-term, stable source of income rather than intermittent donations.

title: Lost Childhood
overview_text: As the children are deprived of their childhood, they lead a harsh life full of distress. Children are forced to undertake unbearable work to survive in this war-torn country. A human’s childhood effects and memories last forever. Children in northern Syria need sympathy and support so that they can live a dignified life full of happiness. Your donation to this campaign will put the children on the right track in life and revive their hope.

title: Emergency Response For Camps 2022
overview_text:
Emergency Response For Camps 2022
As a response to the displaced families in Idlib, the countryside of Aleppo, and the countryside of Latakia, we have launched an emergency campaign. This campaign aims to provide food, shelter, clothing, and other basic necessities to the most vulnerable families. The campaign is also designed to respond quickly to emergency situations such as tent floods in the winter and fires in the summer. Any contribution to this campaign will be reflected as a relief in the lives of families.

title: Food Aid For The Poor 2022
overview_text:
Food Aid For The Poor 2022
Thousands of poor families wish they could have a delicious, fresh meal every day like everyone else. Participate in and contribute to this campaign to provide food baskets for displaced families living in camps. It is also possible to donate money to have your Kaffara distributed to the poor and needy.

Participate in and contribute to this campaign to provide food baskets for displaced families living in camps. It is also possible to donate money to have your Kaffara distributed to the poor and needy.

title: Providing Drinking Water For Camps 2
overview_text:
Providing Drinking Water For Camps 2
In the camps of northern Syria, displaced families lack the bare necessities of life. Women and children walk for miles in the hope of obtaining even a single liter of water. Diseases and plagues spread due to a lack of water, particularly among children. Through this campaign, we aim to secure drinking water for as many families as possible. You can donate to be a Sadaqah Jariyah to dig a well that provides water for hundreds of displaced families. Contact Whatsapp number 00905367026447 for more information about the location of the well and the cost of digging it.

title: Response To Forgotten Camps 2
overview_text:
Response To Forgotten Camps 2
Even within camps, the level of tragedy varies. Some make shift camps have indescribably terrible living conditions. People who live there have been abandoned and lack any type of relief that might reach camps in slightly better conditions or locations. This campaign is dedicated to those who suffer in silence, with no spotlight on their situation or even without being covered by the media. Your contribution to this campaign will serve as a reminder of the forgotten camps.

title: Urgent Medical Cases
overview_text: This heart-breaking photo is nothing compared to the sorrowful situation that Manal lives amid. Sadly, a stove exploded while Manal was preparing food for her children. She sustained severe fourth-degree burns that dominaed her body. Manal is expreiencing unbearable pain. She needs several surgeries to recover. Donate to help Manal recover soon and alleviate her pain You can donate here to help Manal and hundreds of similar medical cases

title: Food Supplies 2
overview_text: People in camps struggle to provide daily food, and they eventually can't secure winter supplies. This campaign aims to help displaced people in; Idlib and Idlib countryside camps, northern Aleppo countryside camps, Azaz and Afrin, Lattakia countryside camps, and western Aleppo countryside camps. Your donation will enable them to secure food supplies for the winter and keep them from going hungry.

title: Loaf Of Bread 3
overview_text: When children have nothing to eat but dried bread, this means they live in extreme poverty. Thousands of families in tents and ramshackle houses in northern Syria cannot afford bread. Prices have skyrocketed following the recent Russian-Ukrainian war. Your $10 donation to this campaign will help provide fresh bread for helpless families for a month.

title: Long-Lasting Deeds
overview_text: The Holy Qur'an is memorized and learned by many of our orphaned youngsters. We launched the "Long-Lasting Deeds" campaign to help and urge orphaned children to learn and memorize the Holy Quran to support them in all possible ways. By contributing to this campaign, you will be helping to bring pleasure to the hearts of numerous orphans by covering educational expenses and in-kind gifts.

title: Donate To Build Mosques
overview_text: We have devoted this campaign for those who would like to donate for (Wakf) Endowment to build mosques in the housing complexes supervised by the Molham Volunteering Team in Northern Syria. You could donate to help build and clad a mosque as well as costs of maintainance.

title: Let's Plant It
overview_text: "If the Final Hour comes while you have a shoot of a plant in your hands and it is possible to plant it before the Hour comes, you should plant it." Based on our social responsibility in protecting the environment and reforestation, we are launching a campaign to plant trees in housing projects developed by the Molham Volunteering Team in Northern Syria. One tree costs only $10; help us make Syria green again.

title: Orphans Support Fund
overview_text: Her sincere tears really touched us. Poor Mirna is still too young to bear such a suffering , especially after her father died. Words failed her this time. Sponsor Mirna with $50 per month to provide for her major needs and help her lead a better life. You can also contact us for further details of sponsoring orphans. Contact us via: https://wa.link/5cbf7a

title: University Students Support Fund
overview_text: Nagham and her family were left without a breadwinner to provide for their necessities and care for them when her father died. Nagham was able to attend the university with the support of some friends, but she had to quit her study owing to her health condition, since she suffers from hypoglycemia, a neurological disorder, and a broken back. She borrowed money to treat her diseases. Her health has improved, but she is unable to work to pay off her obligations, and she is unable to borrow additional funding to cover her university fees! Nagham is a pharmacy student who has suffered the grief of losing her father, poverty, and sickness. But she has a dream in her heart, she is diligent and determined person, and she surely deserves a chance to improve her future! By donating to the University Students Support Fund, you can help Nagham and hundreds of other students with similar stories have a brighter future!

title: Urgent Humanitarian Cases Fund
overview_text: "My name is Bara', and I'm 6 years old. My dad told me that I'm a young, strong fighter who has to win, but I'm quite ill and exhausted. My siblings battled cancer as well, but they didn't survive. I hope to beat cancer so that my parents won't be heartbroken." With these words, Bara' told us about his ongoing struggle with cancer, which had drastically altered his life and caused excruciating pain. In addition to food, Bara' needs long-term treatment, which can be provided for $300, but his father is unable to cover these costs. Your contribution can help Bara' and many other urgent cases

title: Sponsorship of Humanitarian Cases 2022
overview_text:
Sponsorship of Humanitarian Cases 2022
"No word on earth can really describe my broken heart. Watching them in pain and bleeding wounds every day increases my helplessness. I wish I could treat them once and forever." Shareef lives amid poor living conditions in a miserable house that lacks the minimum essentialities of life. He is a hard-working farmer. Sadly, he has children who have Pemphigus which deprives them of their childhood. The bad news is that Shareef is helpless and cannot afford major needs for his children such as gauze, antiseptics, and ointments. Donate to help the children and many other needy cases.

title: Molham Orphanage - Azaz
overview_text: Abdulkader was born on 24/6/2015 in Aleppo. His father passed away in 2016. He lives with his mother and sister in Molham Orphanage, which houses 27 children in 17 rooms. Molham Orphanage in Azaz provides orphaned children and their mothers with free housing, food, medical care, education, clothes, and psychological assistance. In the orphanage, mothers can receive technical and psychological support, allowing them to become self-reliant in the future. We also work to create a healthy and safe environment for children at all social, medical, educational, and psychological levels. Your donations to the campaign can help dozens of children who have nowhere else to live.

title: Simple Dreams
overview_text: During our work in camps and towns, we frequently meet children of various ages and names; we learn about their heartbreaking stories and the hardships they have endured. Through the Molham Events department, we aim to spread happiness among children; therefore, whenever we visit a camp, we will ask them about their wishes and dreams, and then work to make them a reality. Every day, Alloush (Ali) comes out of the tent and enjoys playing with his plastic vehicle toy. When we asked him what he wished for, he said, "My dream is to get a bicycle!". Their dreams are simple, and we will make them come true. With your contributions to the campaign, we will be able to buy Ali a bicycle and bring joy to the hearts of many deprived children who have lost their childhood.

title: Eid Sacrifice 7
overview_text: Every year on Eid Al Adha, we try hard to help displaced people in camps feel the joy of Eid. This year, we also launched the " Eid Sacrifice 7". Eid Al Adha sacrifice distribution will target displaced families who live within Molham Team's areas of operations: Priority will be for the most vulnerable displaced families in camps. The cost of one Udhiya including the slaughter, butchering, and distribution is 230$ for sheep. For cows, the cost is $1600, including the slaughter, butchering, and distribution, which can be shared by up to 7 persons. Each Udhiya process will be documented with the name of the donors via a video record to be sent by email following the completion of execution.

title: Medical Sponsorships
overview_text: "Whenever I go to sleep, I recall the bad memories of that horrible day. I could still watch the fire burning them. I could still hear their screams. I try to forget all about it, but in vain. The signs of burns are still on their bodies. They do not lead a normal life. It looks like life has stopped at that moment. Oh son, no single word can describe it. May God protect all." Abdulqader burst into tears while he was telling us about the horrible fire caused by a gas cylinder explosion at home. His family members sustained varied burns that reached 70 percent of their bodies. Abdulqader and his family lead a miserable life. They need long treatment and $250 per month to provide for their daily necessities. Donate to help alleviate the burden of the family. By donating to the medical guarantees campaign, you will be a balm for the pain of Uncle Abdelkader's children and for hundreds of other similar cases.

title: Eid Givings 12
overview_text: Unfortunately, thousands of children don’t have the luxury of experiencing the Eid vibes of getting new clothes or Eid money gift. For this reason, we’re launching an Eid Giving campaign just like every year. $30 will secure new Eid clothes, and $3 is the value of an Eid gift for a child in NW Syria and IDPs camps. This small donation will give children the chance of having a cheerful Eid and provide the opprtunity to draw a smile on their faces!

title: Eid Desserts 4
overview_text: Families gather and celebrate the happy occasion of Eid, but people in the IDPs camps in NW Syria and other refuge countries never get this chance, since it reminds them of their long-standing sufferings and displacement. Just like every year, we launch this campaign to reach out to thousands of families to replace their sadness with happiness and hope. Only $7 will allow a displaced family to feel the joy of Eid by distributing Eid desserts.

title: Solidarity
overview_text: Today, Russian airstrikes on the countryside of Idlib killed four young siblings. No word can describe their parents grief. What a disaster! In response to this heartbreaking massacre, we are allocating the team website today for the purpose of raising funds in solidarity with the grief-stricken parents. This initiative is totally arranged by the team with no previous contact or information about the family situation right now. We didn't ask their permission for such a step to turn a media case into one for raising funds. We are quite aware that their loss is uncompensable. But we yearned to take action and show solidarity with the family in this grief.

title: Baby Milk 2
overview_text: Hundreds of babies are born in poor camps and tents. They lack all the essentials for living, basically, baby milk and diapers. These pressing needs place a heavy burden on families during the sharp rise in prices. Each baby needs $25 to cover diapers and milk. Your donations will make their lives easier in these difficult times.

title: Save al-Rukban Camp
overview_text: Bread and water for displaced families in al-Rukban Camp on the Syrian-Jordanian border. Weeks ago, we operated the bread bakery in the camp and distributed bread to 1,000 families for a month. No single word can really describe the poor conditions the families live in. You can donate to help us provide bread and drinking water for the families in one of the poorest camps in the world. Everyone is aware of the quite miserable conditions over 10,000 people live in the desert-camp. Those people fled death.

title: Lend A Hand of Help
overview_text:
Lend A Hand of Help
“Oh dear, imagine God forbid that you lose some of your children, but those who remain alive suffer unbearable chronic diseases!” My child has Pemphigus and is suffering around the clock. I am completely helpless about him. It breaks my heart just watching him in pain.” Hiyam burst into tears while telling us about the suffering of Abdulrahman, her remaing child. Sadly, she lost five children to Pemphigus. Poor Hiyam is so worried about Abdulrahman. You could donate 350$ to help provide special ointments and nutrition for Abdulrahman. Don’t let Abdulrahman and his mother down

title: 9 Campaign
overview_text: There are many ways to do good. Education is the basis for the nations' advancement and recovery from crises and disasters. Therefore, we launched the 9 Campaign which aims to support education and secure the expenses of school and university students for an academic year. In addition, 9% of all donations received to Molham Volunteering Team during September will be allocated to support education. Each and every donation you make during September will help students continue their education and pursue their dreams.

title: The Painting of Sema
overview_text: You have the chance to participate in Rouh Showcase that aims to support the orphans. Several Syrian artists took part of this showcase and shared their art pieces. We’ve chosen this painting of Sama, the youngest orphan in our Sponsorship Department, to start an auction. We’ll ship this drawing to the person who wins this auction. Be positive that any donation will make a great difference for the orphans!

title: Urgent Medical Cases
overview_text: We couldn’t help posting these painful photos that imply unbearable bitter reality for a poor child. We always discover shocking cases of burnt children that are more terrible than previous ones. Poor Abdulrahman is a child, who sustained dominant 4-grade-burns when a stove exploded on him as he was trying to get warm. The bad news is that he has been through indescribable pain for six months. Sadly, he isolated himself from people who felt scared of him, causing his psychology to deteriorate. You could donate to alleviate the pains of Abdulrahman and help him through his long treatment.

title: Pemphigus
overview_text: “I am house-bound all the time. I can't even touch those dear to me because of Pemphigus which causes me to suffer around the clock as well as skin ulcers and permanent bleeding.” Poor Mahmoud is a young man. He lives with nine family members amid miserable living conditions. Unfortunately, they have no source of income. Mahmoud was born with a disability. He also has Pemphigus, dry eye, and skin ulcers. Mahmoud needs your urgent help to alleviate his pain. In response, we have launched a campaign for people with Pemphigus to provide for their major needs such as skin ointments and gauzes, hoping to alleviate the pains they experience around the clock.

title: Al Awael School
overview_text: To build future generations, every child has the right to education. Al-Awael School for Syrian students in Beqaa, Lebanon needs support. Your contribution can help the school cover its expenses, allowing it to admit more students. Helping students get to school can keep them out of trouble, ignorance, and child labor.

title: Proceeds from sales of the International Arab Book Fair in Istanbul
overview_text: Proceeds from sales of the International Arab Book Fair in Istanbul
details_text: Molham Volunteering Team is participating in the 2022 International Arab Book Fair in Istanbul. The proceeds of all the pieces displayed at the fair will be dedicated to supporting the education of children in northern Syria. You can also buy the pieces online from anywhere in the world through the catalog by following the link: Follow this link to view our catalog on WhatsApp: https://wa.me/c/905526278367

title: Heartwarming Gathering
overview_text:
On October 22, 2022, a charitable cultural meeting will be held under the title "Heartwarming Gathering" with the participation of many effectors. The meeting encompasses many cultural, social, and other aspects. If you are living in Germany and would like to do good, we invite you to this meeting and to donate at least $50 for this campaign. You may send us the receipt of your donation via:
The meeting will involve many special activities, and what is most important is that all the donations received will be dedicated to the "Give Warmth 16" campaign to offer winter supplies to people in northwestern Syria. Note: All tables and all tickets are preserved, but you can donate any amount to support the campaign.

title: An Ongoing Charity (Endowment) for Dr. AlMotasssem Kazkaz
overview_text:
An Ongoing Charity (Endowment) for Dr. AlMotasssem Kazkaz
All incoming donations to this campaign will be a fund to sponsor orphans and build a mosque as an ongoing charity (endowment) for Dr. AlMotassem Kazkaz, who passed away in the United Kingdom while completing his studies and specializing in pediatrics.

title: Respond to Arsal
overview_text: Emergency response: A fire broke out in a camp in Arsal today. The fire completely damaged over 75 tents as well as over 25 ones that were partially damaged. As a result of the fire, 100 families lost their shelter. We have launched this campaign to help the families. We will instantly distribute cash money to the families and provide clothes and major necessities for them.

title: The Barisha Camps Medical Clinic
overview_text:
The Barisha Camps Medical Clinic
The Barisha Medical Clinic is one the most important of our clinics. The clinic provides medical services and first aid for the inhabitants of the Barisha camp who suffer from unbearable diseases and need medicine. Doctors at the clinic also diagnose the inhabitants’s diseases. Sabiha visited the clinic. She was diagnosed with Hypoxia due to medical negligence during birth. Hypoxia caused her acute fever that in turn caused Sabiha cerebral atrophy. Sadly, Sabiha cannot even have food normally just like other children. She needs special nutrition, medicine, and permanent care. You could donate for the campaign to help provide free treatment for Sabiha and other cases.

title: Cancer Patients Aid Fund
overview_text: “It all started with a simple leg pain which upgraded to a cancer tumor all over my body.” Poor Ahmad had never thought that a simple leg pain would just lead to idiopathic Thrombocytopenia which in turn led to Myeloma. Myeloma caused tumor lumps to spread all over his body. Day by day, Ahmad tries to overcome his illness. Unfortunately, his father is helpless and can do nothing to provide for his treatment. Donate to help Ahmad receive treatment and alleviate his pain. There are thousands of people, including many children who are suffering from cancer around the clock. They are unable to afford treatment and this increases their suffering. We allocated the fund of this Campaign to those people to alleviate their suffering. Any money you donate will for sure make a difference for them

title: Jamil Tamim School
overview_text: We are about to finish building the apartments at the Molham Village residential project to accommodate 378 displaced families. As for now, we are planning to build a model school for children at the project. Those who would like to donate a Sadaqa Jariyah, can donate any money for the campaign.

title: Urgent Humanitarian Cases
overview_text: "Each dialysis she receives leaves her more depleted. I feel helpless, not being able to relieve her pain or help her." Nour Alhuda has kidney failure and receives dialysis on a regular basis. Her mother feels desperate when faced with her daughter's unrelenting pain and fatigue. Nour and her family are in dire need of your help. A donation of $200 can help her meet her needs and alleviate her suffering. Your donations to this campaign will help Nour and hundreds of similar cases.

title: Almutanabbi School
overview_text: We were lost for words with that news about Almutanabi School. But for a student, it was the final straw so he can't pursue his studies despite taking all challenges to do so. In the last few days, one of the ancient secondary school besides many others were closed due to fundings cut. Molham Volunteering Team takes the initiative to support the re-opening of Almutanabi secondary school and many others in Idlib by providing the operating costs for one year. This is to persuade other business and initiative entities to allocate funding for the education sector. To help us to do this, donate $25 and help a student to receive education for a scholar year.

title: Heal A Broken Heart
overview_text: Jameel lost his car due to yesterday’s shelling attacks. When we asked about how he was doing, we found out that he was upset not only for losing his car but also for the goods it had in it that he bought in debt. A car for Jameel is not a luxury but a necessity as it’s his only means to work and support his family. It’s our duty to be by his side and get him a new car to get back to work as soon as he heals from his injuries.

title: Give Warmth 16
overview_text: Winter makes their lives exponentially tougher. For a decade, tents inhabitants have faced chilly nights, freezing temperatures, and stormy days. Most heartbreaking is how fragile those pieces of sheet, their tent, are and how they can't withstand the winds or floods. In the middle of nowhere, they find themselves and their children alone, facing freezing to death. In solidarity with them, we launch "Give Warmth 16" to offer winter supplies to Syrians in Syria and in neighboring countries. As we intend to uproot this misery forever, we will dedicate a part of this campaign to building dignified housing units for them. Your donation will diminish their suffering. One share: $65 (diesel stove and charcoal) NFI basket: $125 (tarpaulin + charcoal + mattresses + blankets + carpets + diesel stove) One share: $200 ( x20 donors) to build a house in Molham Village.

title: Save a Premature Baby 2
overview_text:
Save a Premature Baby 2
Obviously, premature birth puts the infant's life at risk, and hypoxia can cause permanent illnesses. Zahra is one of these newborns, suffering from lung immaturity and respiratory distress syndrome. It is essential to have the newborn treated as soon as possible, before her condition worsens. She needs to take a pulmonary Surfactant injection, which would help regulate her breathing. Zahra’s parents helplessly watch their first baby suffer, without being able to secure her treatment. We launched a campaign dedicated to Zahra and dozens of other newborns in NW Syria. A key objective of this campaign is to help premature newborns survive their critical development stage. With every donation you make, you will contribute to saving the lives of tens of premature babies each month.

title: Step of Hope Voluntary School
overview_text:
Step of Hope Voluntary School
A group of donors has launched this campaign to help 100 students complete their education at the Step of Hope Voluntary School in northern Syria. Your donations to the campaign will support children in the camps to have a better future.
details_text: A group of donors has launched this campaign to help 100 students complete their education at the Step of Hope Voluntary School in northern Syria. Your donations to the campaign will support children in the camps to have a better future.

title: Tenth Anniversary Campaign
overview_text: Molham Volunteering Team launched this campaign during the 10th Anniversary Conference "A Decade of Giving." It seeks donations to construct housing units for displaced people in northern Syria through one of Molham Team's housing projects. This campaign will get any donations received during the conference. Each unit costs 4000 USD.

title: Children’s winter clothes 2022
overview_text: As winter approaches, children in particular are among those who suffer the most in miserable camps. They feel cold and lack heating supplies. Anyway, you can donate 30 per month to buy each child a winter clothes kit. Donate for the campaign to help the poor children feel warm in winter.

title: Heal A Broken Heart 1
overview_text:
Heal A Broken Heart 1
Despite being uprooted from their homes, they still hold out hope for a better life. ''I owned a taxi that enabled me to provide for my family, but I had to sell it out to pay for all the compensation after an accident without intention.'' - Ahmad It has been a miserable living situation for Ahmad and his family since he lost his car. There is no way for him to get back on his feet. You can heal their broken hearts and revive their hope for the future by contributing to this campaign.

title: Urgent Medical Cases Fund
overview_text: "I couldn't hold my daughter's hands or hug her. The disease took her away from me!" Hebatallah was born prematurely and she has a congenital duodenal obstruction. She is at serious risk and must undergo urgent surgery! Due to her family's poor financial situation, it is difficult for them to afford the costs of surgery. Your donation of $600 will relieve Heba's pain and help her to live a normal childhood like others.

title: 1000 Poor Families Funding
overview_text: The little girl in the photo is Rawan. Her mother told us that she managed to save her from the fire that burned their tent. Had it not been for God's mercy, Rawan would not have been alive! Rawan is still crying and shivering from the cold after her family has lost their tent. Everything they owned was burned this morning! Rawan's family is one of the poorest families in the camp, and they have lived in a tent for 6 years. Rawan and her family need your support. Your donations can ease their distress.

title: Winter Response for Arsal Refugee Camps 4 - 2022
overview_text:
Winter Response for Arsal Refugee Camps 4 - 2022
Arsal camps are one of the most miserable for refugees. The freezing winter threatens over 8000 families living in tents without heating supplies or any kind of warmth resources. In 2019, we launched our first campaign to provide heating fuel and supplies to people in Arsal. Our response to the Arsal camps will continue this winter and we will try our best to protect them from harsh weather. You can alleviate their misery and warm their shivering hearts with your donation.

title: Supporting Orphans' Education
overview_text: "My entire family was killed in the bombing. The last time, I stayed under the rubble for hours waiting for my death, but I never imagined that I would live and continue my life without my family. Now, my dream is to continue my studies." Jihad is a student at Molham School for Orphans. He was displaced with his aunt after his entire family died due to the bombing. They live in an unfinished house that lacks the all essentials and they don't have a stable income. Molham Team believes that education is an essential pillar in building societies and their renaissance. Therefore, it provides support to education through its Education Department. The team launched long-term educational projects, including schools and centers for children and teenagers aiming to bridge gaps in the educational sector. Projects such as the Molham School for Orphans in Idlib and Molham School for Orphans in Azaz provide education and recreational and sports activities and holds competitions with other schools. Your support for the campaign will help hundreds of orphans continue their education and give them an opportunity for a promising future.

title: Molham's store
overview_text: The major aim of the campaign is to support orphans financially by selling the Molham Team’s products and enabling the children to benefit from the profits of the project.

title: Zakat al-Mal
overview_text: Through this campaign, we will receive your Zakat over the year to be distributed to beneficiaries of needy and displaced people in addition to patients, orphans, and students inside Syria and in asylum countries. The distribution will comply with the Islamic rules of Zakat dispense.

title: Give Warmth 16- Palestine Campaign
overview_text:
Give Warmth 16- Palestine Campaign
Palestine is among the first countries to help and generously donate to us whenever we launch a campaign for supporting the displaced families in NW Syria. Today, as harsh winter strikes miserable camps amid increasing need for humanitarian aid, the Molham Team Volunteering Team’s volunteers in Palestine launched the "Give Warmth 16- Palestine" Campaign to provide heating supplies for the poor families in the camps. A part of the campaign donations will be allocated for building houses to translocate the families, hence ending their repeated misery. The families are waiting for your crucial donations. The cost of a stove and heating coal is 65$, whereas $125 is the cost of an NFI box that includes (A tarpaulin, coal, mattresses, a blanket, a carpet, and a stove). 20 people could donate $200 to help build a house in the Molham Village. A $30 donation will be enough to buy a child winter clothes.

title: Unitl the Last Tent
overview_text: In early 2022, we launched the “Until the Last Tent” Campaign during a live stream in a camp, NW Syria. The aim of the campaign was to translocate the displaced families from miserable tents to houses. Now, time has come to reap the fruit of the first stage of the campaign as we translocated new families and put an end to their unbearable suffering they have lived in for several years in poor camps. You can donate $5,000 to build an apartment or $200 to participate in constructing the apartment (multiple persons can participate in donating) to translocate a displaced family.

title: Urgent Medical Cases Fund
overview_text: “Spinal cord meningomyelocele accompanied by bilateral clubfoot’ is what the doctor told me my daughter has … I don’t know what it means but I know she’s suffering and I can’t help her.” Alya is an infant who was born with continuous suffering and pain … her health condition is extremely poor, her father lost his job due to the earthquake and is unable to provide her with treatment and the necessary shunt device for her brain anymore. Your donation will help reduce her pain and contribute to providing the device she needs, and many others cases.

title: Urgent humanitarian cases
overview_text: " My daughter is suffering and struggling infront of me and I'm unable to do anything !" Said Brother Kasser, expressing his helplessness infrotn of his child's illness. She suffers from head enlargement and fluid in the brain. Brother Kasser works in stone breaking, which doesn't provide him with sufficient income to meet the needs of his family, or the medications for his daughter. Their living condition is very poor but your donations can support them and provide their basic needs as well as their child's medications. The #humanitarian_cases campaign is a helping hand to hundreds of families with similar circumstances to brother Kasser's family. So don't leave them without support because they need you!

title: Enough
overview_text: Despite living in dire need, they prefer to suffer silently as they are overwhelmed with burdens. We launched the “Enough” Campaign to support the elderly and provide for their needs. Donate for the campaign to help the elderly lead a dignified and comfortable life.

title: Compensation
overview_text: The major objective of this campaign is to enhance business stakeholders’ sense of social solidarity and responsibility. Those can participate in the campaign by allocating a share of their profits for a specific period to support the displaced children in miserable camps, or by installing donation boxes and hanging posters about the campaign in their shops. As a client, when you shop at one of the shops participating in the campaign, it means that a part of the profits from your shopping will directly go for supporting the displaced children. You can also donate for the campaign directly with any money through donation sites in the shops. The profits of this campaign will be allocated to supply the displaced children with heating supplies and safe housing.

title: Expanding Fahd Ra'i school
overview_text: The major objective of this campaign is to expand the Fahd Ra’i school in Northern Syria by building a third floor and expanding 10 classrooms to receive 500 new students due to expanded nearby residential compounds.

title: Heal A Broken Heart
overview_text: In cooperation and partnership with Floka Association, the " Heal A Broken Heart" weekly show provides aid to poor displaced families in north Syria camps. We also launch campaigns to secure bread, clothes, shoes, firewood, and food baskets to support these families and secure their basic needs. Through this joint campaign, we aim to help families living in tents feel warm. Your donations can ease their suffering.

title: Gift for child-2
overview_text: Those who would like to delight a displaced child by buying him a bike, a small car game, or even a baloon, can donate for this campaign. A bike is for $50, a game is $5, a football is $3, a kitchen kit for girls is $10, and a Barby toy is $5.

title: Supporting the orphaned 2023
overview_text: When children lose both of their parents or one of them, they definitely lead a difficult life, having no supporter. Children don’t deserve to live such a miserable life. We launched this campaign to shed light on the orphaned children and improve their life. Your $30 donation will provide school money for an orphaned child over a month. Your $50 donation will sponsor a child for a month. Any money you donate will help alleviate the orphaned children’s suffering.

title: Humanitarian Sponsorships 2023
overview_text: In a case like this, words sometimes can't describe the pain. Faheds life is full of pain due to his suffering from rheumatoid arthritis and an immune deficiency. $180 a month can provide the necessary treatment for him. Your donations to the campaign with can help him and hundreds of families.

title: Responding to displaced people in Arsal camps-2023
overview_text:
Responding to displaced people in Arsal camps-2023
The displaced families in the Arsal camps appealed to save the children and elderly from a real disaster that repeats every winter amidst heavy snow and storms that destroy the tents. This is the case nowadays in Arsal. We launched an emergency campaign to respond to the families and provide them with heating supplies. Your generous donations will for sure help us reach as many families as possible like every year to alleviate their suffering during this harsh winter.

title: Snowstorm Response 2023
overview_text: Every winter, tents are destroyed due to storms and snow. People in north Syria camps struggle to secure heating supplies. Some of the tents are burnt due to the use of unconventional heating materials. Elderly people, widows, and children in camps are facing additional distress and they need support. This campaign aims to alleviate the suffering of these people. Your donation to the campaign can immediately help afflicted families and ease their distress.

title: An Emergency Campaign - Earthquake Response
overview_text:
An Emergency Campaign - Earthquake Response
The people in Turkey and NW Syria witnessed a tough night like no other as a 7.5 strong earthquake hit the region. It resulted in thousands of victims, injured ,and people who’re trapped under the destruction. Not that only, but the Syrian Civil Defense announced the northern Syria region as a Disaster-Stricken Region. Thus, the displaced families in Turkey and Syria are in dire need of help, we will do all we can to compensate them for what they’ve been through and provide them with accommodation. We’re launching “Earthquake Response” Campaign that aims to lessen their suffering and provide them with the necessities they lack.

title: An emergency campaign - earthquake relief
overview_text:
An emergency campaign - earthquake relief
Since the first day of the earthquake in northern Syria and southern Turkey, which claimed thousands of lives and led to northern Syria being declared a disaster zone, we have launched a campaign to support those affected. Despite the ongoing pain, we will continue in the hope of rebuilding. Our first goal is to raise $20 million to secure 4,000 homes at $5,000 each. In addition, sources indicate that northern Syria needs $100 million for reconstruction, and we call on all local and international organizations to help us reach this goal.

title: Gift to the young survival - Earthquake 2023
overview_text:
Gift to the young survival - Earthquake 2023
We all know that children were the most affected by the earthquake that occurred in Syria and Turkey, and they are the ones who survived the most from under the rubble, but they are now orphans in hospitals or waiting for their parents to come out as martyrs from under the rubble. After many visits as part of our field work inside hospitals, we found them in a very difficult psychological state, so we decided to buy toys for them, especially tablets for children who will stay for a long time in hospitals. Those who want to comfort these children should donate to this campaign.

title: A doctor's campaign to support the healthcare system at Northern Syria
overview_text:
A doctor's campaign to support the healthcare system at Northern Syria
We launched this campaign to provide the healthcare system in Northen Syria with everything they need and are missing as a response to a group of Doctor's request around the world. They will be responsible to take care of the campaign with the help of Molham's volunteers and the directorate of health in Northen Syria to respond to the hospital's needs there.

title: 1000 Afflicted Families by the Earthquake
overview_text:
1000 Afflicted Families by the Earthquake
We tried to but couldn't understand how many family members she lost. Um Ali went through one of the hardest days in her life, every time she hoped To find a survivor, she learns that they're dead. Her son Ali passed away along with his wife after he saved their children. She also lost her other son, his wife, her newly wed daughter and son in law. Now she has her grandchildren, among them is Ghazi who witnessed the death of his mother, father, and younger sister. It doesn't stop there, Um Ali lost her father, mother, sister, brother and his family. Every time we listen to her story we feel unimaginable helplessness. This video shows her story told by her. Your donation to our campaign will help support her family and secure a shelter for them along with other impacted families.

title: The Earthquake Survivors
overview_text: The survivors of the earthquake are tired! The most affected survivors by earthquake were the families that were forced to move from their cities due to the war, they know exactly what displacement means, and the feeling of losing the house and the shelter at the same moment. In north Syria the number of tents and camps are increasing, and for them we’ve initiated and launched the campaign “The Survivors” to relieve their pains and to assist them with the needed necessities (food, money and tent supplies). Inside the tents there are people waiting for your help, don’t forget them.

title: Japan Bridge ジャパン ブリッジ
overview_text: 2023年（令和5年）2月6日明け方に発生したマグニチュード7.8の大地震は甚大な 被害をシリア北部、トルコ南部へもたらしました。現在、トルコとシリアでは少 なくとも6,100人のシリア人の死者が確認されています。多くの建物が倒壊し、ほ とんどの人々はテント生活を送り、激しい寒さの中、多くの人々が長引く厳しい 生活を強いられています。 多くの人々が家を失ったとみられ、住まいの確保が緊 急の課題となっています。この状況にいち早く対応するため、日本在住のシリア 人と日本人で結成されたジャパンブリッジは、この大地震に対する義援金募集を スタートしました。第一の目標は10家族が耐えてきた絶望的な状況をできるだけ 早く改善し、コンクリート造りのシンプルな新居に移ってもらうことです。この 真新しいコンクリート造りの家は、トルコ及びシリアにてある慈善団体Molham team(モルハム・チーム)により提供されており、Molham teamはシリア領土内に居 住可能な施設を大きく拡大しようと懸命に活動しています。新たな住居を建てる には1棟あたり5000ドル(約670,000円)かかります。この度のジャパンブリッジの キャンペーンはMolham teamのwe can という国際キャンペーンの一環です。今の シリアには、皆様お一人お一人のお力添えがどうしても必要です。どうぞよろし くお願い致します。 Japan Bridge ジャパン ブリッジ A 7.8m earthquake hit Southern Turkey and north-west Syria on February 6th, 2023 and caused enormous damage to many cities near the Turkish-Syrian borders. More than 6100 Syrians in died in Turkey and in different parts of Syria (SNHR). Millions of people lost their homes, and securing housing is an urgent need now. Japan Bridge is a group of Syrians and Japanese volunteers who are willing to send the donations collected in Japan to a secure housing for the most vulnerable families in the most affected areas. Our target is to securing safe dignified concrete housing for 10 displaced families through our partners there. This fundraiser is a part of, “We Can,” a bigger reconstruction project initiated by our partner Molham Team to build 4000 apartments for the ones who lost their shelter during the Maraş Earthquake. They have recently built two residential projects, “Molham Village” and “Al Kout Compound,” and were able to successfully move hundreds of families from their scattered tents in north-west Syria to concrete apartments. Since it’s a non-profit, each apartment costs only $ 5000 (about 670,000 yen) and will provided for a family of 5 members average (Shelter Cluster)

title: Response To The Earthquake Victims
overview_text:
Response To The Earthquake Victims
"He is a sensitive boy. The boy is ten years old. He is trying to hide from us his amputated legs because he is shy around us!" This message was sent by one of our volunteers from the team after visiting a child who lost his father and siblings, and was rescued from under the rubble after six days!! The volunteer continued and said: "I asked him if he wanted a tablet or a PlayStation, he said no.. I just want my legs”
details_text: "He is a sensitive boy. The boy is ten years old. He is trying to hide from us his amputated legs because he is shy around us!" The volunteer continued and said: "I asked him if he wanted a tablet or a PlayStation, he said no.. I just want my legs”

title: Orphaned by the Earthquake
overview_text: They were just like us, enjoying a peaceful life filled with love, tenderness, and care from their parents. But in a moment, everything changed! They survived, but a part of their souls remained trapped under the rubble, to ascend to their Creator. Some of them lost a wing, and some lost both. But the pain of orphanhood is the same for all of them. We are now responsible for them and on the Day of Judgment, we will be asked about them. The aim of this campaign is to provide care for 250 orphaned children in disaster-stricken areas and ensure that all their needs are met. Your donation of any amount will alleviate their suffering.

title: Zakat Almal
overview_text: Allah SWT said: “And perform the prayer, and give the purifying alms. Whatever good you forward for yourselves, you will find it with Allah. Allah is seeing everything you do.” Quran 2:110 This campaign is meant to accept the Zakat from your money (compulsory giving/charity). It will be spent according to the laws of shari’a (Islamic laws) throughout this year. It will go towards victims of the earthquake and to everyone who lost their house, family, and money. They are the most in need of it under these harsh circumstances.

title: Al-Hikma Village — Molhamز
overview_text: Phase One: Construction of 48 apartment units Construction of a school Construction of a mosque

title: Dose of Hope - for the cancer patients affected by the earthquake.
overview_text:
Dose of Hope - for the cancer patients affected by the earthquake.
The overall picture of the disaster appears harsh enough to prevent us from delving into its details, but deep within the details, lie the most painful stories and the most severe suffering, one of them is the suffering of cancer patients in northern Syria, a suffering that has increased with the disaster. Not only that, but their pain has been going on for years. For a time, they held onto a ray of hope through the opening of a crossing. However, the earthquake shattered that hope and took away their last chance by closing the crossing. Haifaa suffers from a malignant mass inside the eye, in addition to upper savage pterygium, with pupil dilation and absence of light reaction .. Her family's financial conditions are very poor and it is difficult for her father to secure her high treatment costs, but your donations will contribute to securing the costs of her treatments, such as medicine and medical tests That's why we launched the "Dose of Hope" campaign to alleviate their affliction. Your donations will give them new hope and alleviate their pains.

title: Sponsor a family afflicted by the earthquake
overview_text:
Sponsor a family afflicted by the earthquake
Noor, the little girl who lost her brother and parents. Noor spent 3 days in complete darkness under the rubble of her house. She survived with her older brothers but left behind her parents and little brother. Noor is at the hospital right now proceeding with her treatment after undergoing several surgeries and getting her arm amputated. Meanwhile her brothers are with her grandparents in a shelter centers located in a different city. Noor needs your support to overcome this difficult time. Your donations to this campaign will help out Noor and thousands of similar humanitarian cases.

title: Together... hand in hand
overview_text: Dar Al Farah organization in Switzerland collects donations to help the victims of the earthquake in northern Syria. Many people lost their homes and properties and they need our help. We are working hard in cooperation with Molham Volunteering Team to reach those in need. With your support, we can save lives and give affected people in Syria a new life. Let's stand together, hand in hand, with people in Syria. Every donation helps give them a better future.

title: Molham's fund to support earthquake survivors in Turkey - Mawqif Initiative
overview_text:
Molham's fund to support earthquake survivors in Turkey - Mawqif Initiative
More than 54 institutions in Turkey participated in the Mawqif initiative, the largest Arab-Turkish initiative to support the Arabs affected economically by the recent earthquake in Turkey. Through this fund, we seek to provide temporary salaries for the earthquake survivors who lost their jobs, work equipment and logistics (phones, laptops, programs, or cameras,..etc) or to support some small businesses. Your donation of any amount to this campaign means your contribution to restoring hope and supporting many survivors. Help us spread the word and be a partner in the good!

title: Iftar Meals - Ramadan 2023
overview_text:
Iftar Meals - Ramadan 2023
The hearts haven’t healed of the displacement they have experienced, for the earthquake to come with pain and plant it in every house in Northern Syria. As pain and loss persist, the month of Ramadan returns, and we continue searching for ways to alleviate the effect and heaviness of suffering. With the iftar meals campaign, we will be working on providing fresh baskets including vegetables and chicken enough to support a family for two days. Each basket costs 15$ in addition to making group iftars inside of the camps, By donating, you’re proving that despite how huge the disaster is, you’re the greater good.

title: Food Parcels - Ramadan 2023
overview_text:
Food Parcels - Ramadan 2023
Ramadan usually comes to those exhausted by their circumstances and situation whether in their camps or displaced, but Ramadan is different this year … because the tragedy of the earthquake is greater and the pain is wider. The food parcels campaign to provide baskets and distribute them during the holy month to thousands of families aims to alleviate their suffering. 65$ is enough to support an entire family for a month, including basic food items as well as suhoor supplies, or what the family needs to secure their needs for Ramadan with a cash donation. Your donation is support for those who have nothing but pain and exhaustion.

title: Happy Iftar - Ramadan 2023
overview_text:
Happy Iftar - Ramadan 2023
The smile of the northern Syrian kids isn't our only aim. Their small and broken hearts need our support to alleviate the pain and loss they have experienced, whether it was the loss of their families due to bombing, earthquakes, or even just being witnesses to tragedy and disaster. The "Iftar and Smile" campaign is a campaign for thousands of children in northern Syria, through which food packages will be distributed during the month of Ramadan including all the things a child loves, at a cost of $3 per person. Your donation to the campaign is a smile for a child, and even more!

title: Food Aid For The Poor 2023
overview_text:
Food Aid For The Poor 2023
When they lost their home, they lost all aspects of life with it, including the daily family bond over meals. The continuous suffering and the earthquake were reasons for more displacements and losses. All we can do is try to limit the spread of tragedy, and one of our attempts is to provide meals and food baskets for displaced families. You can donate to this campaign to reach the largest number of families. You can also pay the amount of Kaffara (penalty for breaking a fast) related to feeding a poor person to be distributed to those who are eligible.

title: Food kits for orphan families - Ramadan 2023
overview_text:
Food kits for orphan families - Ramadan 2023
Ramadan has come and families are gathering for iftar and suhoor. Unfortunately, many families lack their basic needs and some find it hard to secure food for their children. Your donation of 60$ can provide a Ramadan food basket for a family of orphans. The basket contains food items enough for suhoor and iftar during Ramadan.

Your donation of 60$ can provide a Ramadan food basket for a family of orphans. The basket contains food items enough for suhoor and iftar during Ramadan.

title: Help with goodness - Ramadan 2023
overview_text:
Help with goodness - Ramadan 2023
“I cannot play because I’m in pain and I don’t know if I will get better to go back to playing ” Mu'taz told us those heart-breaking words. The child who suffered a lot under the rubble after the earthquake was the most devastating and painful event he’s ever experienced. His brother Mohammad's words and the water he would bring him to stay alive were his sole remaining hope after losing his family. He developed compartment syndrome and unfortunately had to have his legs amputated, after staying under the rubble for 3 days! Our brave and patient child needs us to alleviate his pain and be by his side to provide him with a little part of the life he lost. To stand by this family’s side, help them, and alleviate their suffering, your donation will contribute to providing for the family’s needs and their living expenses as well as their children’s treatment.

title: Zakat al-Fitr - Ramadan 2023
overview_text:
Zakat al-Fitr - Ramadan 2023
By the beginning of the holy month of Ramadan, you can pay your Zakat al-Fitr through Molham team to be distributed for families in northern Syria and asylum countries. In the last week of the month, our team will distribute your donation as staple foods like rice, bulgur, and lentils to the families until before the Eid prayer. The amount to be paid for the Zakat is determined according to your country of residence; your donation of the same amount or more will be the reason for many families to celebrate Eid this year.

title: Zakat al-Mal
overview_text: During the holy month of Ramadan and through this campaign, we can receive the zakat of your money and distribute it according to the Islamic rules. It will be given throughout the year to those in need, including the displaced, the sick, orphans, students, and homeless families throughout Syria and countries of asylum.

title: Share Your Meal 2
overview_text: It is narrated in an authentic hadith that good deeds are multiplied by 70 times in the holy month of Ramadan. Make the most of your Ramadan by providing iftar to Syrian and Turkish families in need. Proceeds will be going directly to families in Syria and Turkey that have been impacted by natural disasters. With the 2 devastating earthquakes that recently happened, your support is needed more than ever. Take part in providing relief and support to families in need this Ramadan.

title: And whoever saves one- 2
overview_text:
And whoever saves one- 2
We named her Farah (joy/happiness in Arabic), hoping happiness would be her destiny. However, she hasn’t experienced much joy, she’s always crying due to the burns and she hurts herself without knowing what to do.” The tears of Farah’s mother informed us of our little princess’s poor health condition. Their happiness turned into great sorrow and helplessness after she got burned by the heater, her eyes were effected and her eyelids changed positions! But the hardest parts are the deformations that are now hiding her beautiful expressions, and her family’s difficult circumstances are in the way of her treatment journey! Farah needs us to be able to secure the costs of her treatment. Your donation in any amount today will be the support for Alin to regain her health, brighten her family's home, and grow up like other children.

title: Support Orphans
overview_text: " I keep thinking about where Aseel will stay if something happened to me, who's gonna care for her when I'm gone? I'm worried about her ... I'm scared her smile will fade. " Aseel's parents passed away due to the earthquake, and Aseel is now alone without her mother to hug her when she cries and her father to care for her ... She only has her elderly grandfather , who's trying his best to take care of her and comfort her left, and with every passing day, his fear for her grows ... Aseel needs help after becoming an orphan, she needs good hands to provide her needs and make her grandfather see that Aseel isn't alone, and that someone is looking after her. Your donations to the campaign will be hers, and hundreds of other orphans' support ...

title: Relieve a Distress
overview_text: Sometimes hardships intensify, and life tightens its grip on those burdened with worries. At that point, stories become painfully heard, and life appears to be nothing but dark for those experiencing it. In northern Syria, these stories abound and increase, affecting families, individuals, and even children. The "Relieve a Distress" campaign is dedicated to them, aiming to alleviate their suffering and provide for their needs. Your donation is the light and hope for hundreds of families who are currently dwelling in darkness.

title: Sponsor a Student- Ramadan 2023
overview_text:
Sponsor a Student- Ramadan 2023
Education is the only means that can rebuild destroyed countries. Unfortunately with every catastrophe, the most affected group is students, although they try so hard to keep going in very poor conditions. This why in Ramadan 2023 we will launch a campaign to help 100 students in Northern Syria, to show them that we are supporting them with all the efforts they put in to keep seeking education. Your donations to this campaign will help these students accomplish their goals!
