Your donations to this campaign will help these students accomplish their goals!

title: Fahed Rai School
overview_text: What give people hope is seeing kids in their proper place which is school, sitting on school desks, and writing in their notebooks. Fahed Rai School in Azaz is providing this and more to over 1000 students. One of these students is Aisha, who was displaced with her family from Ariha and stopped attending school after that. But today Aisha is attending Fahed Rai school. You can contribute to Aisha completing her education as well as other hundreds of students by donating $25 which you may think is not enough, but this amount will have a long impact to cover one student for one full semester!

title: Molham Village School
overview_text: The Molham Village in Azaz countryside has received hundreds of families including orphan children, who had one dream; of continuing their educations. Molham village school was indeed built, which accommodates hundreds of students, including Fatima. Just like the rest of the students who lost their families, Fatima lost her father in a bombing when she was only a few months old. Fatima and other students have dreams that will not come true unless they are helped, $25 sponsors a student for a whole term.

title: Orphans School - Idleb
overview_text: Difficulties did not stop at the young age of Aya, bombing took away her father, illness took away her health and well-being, and displacement left her living in the worst living conditions. Aya suffers from liver enlargement and lung fibrosis, but she is considered one of the most successful and active students. Aya and other students will have a better life if they continue their academic and educational journey. Your donation of $25 will contribute to securing what they need most, a better reality and a safe future.

title: Eid Givings 13
overview_text: They're patiently waiting for it, only knowing the joy it brings with it, but they don't realize the financial difficulties their families are facing. The Eid givings campaign is for the children we’re talking about. This Eid Campaign provides Eid clothes for $30 and an Eid gift for $3 for children in northern Syria and refugee countries. Your donation to this campaign is the joy that any child awaits on Eid, and the ability to alleviate the helplessness of their families.

title: Eid Desserts 5
overview_text: How is Eid welcomed, besides by creating joy and happiness? Thousands of displaced and affected families by the earthquake don’t even have the opportunity to think of ways to bring joy to themselves and their children. But we try to reach every family each year, plant joy in their hearts and do the same for other families. You can also create joy for a family by providing Eid sweets for only $7.

title: Let's Go On
overview_text: Syrian means you have been suffering for a long time. It means death and survival, destruction and reconstruction as well as despair and hope. Students inside Syria worked hard through times of siege, bombardment, and displacement. The " Let's Go On" campaign aims to help medical students to continue their studies. It will support them to continue their specialization in North Syria hospitals. This will help make up for the shortage of medical staff in hospitals. It will also reduce the need to refer patients abroad.

title: Save them
overview_text: "I feel sad when I see children my age playing and going to school while I'm at home unable to move because of my illness." Abdul Qader was diagnosed with cancer a year ago. His health condition is deteriorating without treatment. Abdul Qader is one of the thousands of cancer patients in northern Syria who can't have treatment. It got particularly worse after the borders with Turkey were closed after the earthquake leaving patients to their destiny. In cooperation with the Health Directorate, oncology centers, and the Medical Office in Bab Al-Hawa Border Crossing, we evaluated the current situation and discussed the best and most sustainable solutions to save the lives of cancer patients. The " Save Them" campaign aims to provide radiographic equipment ( eg. pet ct) which may cost two million dollars with installation. We also aim to secure chemotherapy doses for three months which will cost half a million dollars. The " Save Them" campaign aims to provide the necessary equipment for cancer treatment in northern Syria. It will save the lives of thousands of cancer patients who can't have treatment.

title: Eid clothes for orphans - Eid Al-Fitr 2023
overview_text:
Eid clothes for orphans - Eid Al-Fitr 2023
Eid Al-Fitr is coming. You can provide Eid clothes for orphaned children. 30$ can secure clothes without shoes. 35$ can secure clothes with shoes. Thanks to your donation, we can make an orphan happy.
details_text: Eid Al-Fitr is coming. You can provide Eid clothes for orphaned children. 30$ can secure clothes without shoes. 35$ can secure clothes with shoes. Thanks to your donation, we can make an orphan happy.

title: One Body
overview_text: Sanabil Al-Khair 🌾 in cooperation with Molham Volunteering Team 🌿 announce the launch of📢 our sixth project "One Body" with its first phase in the last ten days of Ramadan. 📜 Allah's Messenger (ﷺ) said, "You see the believers as regards their being merciful among themselves and showing love among themselves and being kind, resembling one body, so that, if any part of the body is not well then the whole body shares the sleeplessness and fever with it." The project aims to install prosthetic arms🦾 for mothers and fathers in 📍 earthquake-affected places in northern Syria. The cost of one prosthetic arm is $1000 (mechanical with four movements- opening and closing of the elbow and opening and closing of the shoulder). 🎯 The goal of our project during the first phase is to alleviate the suffering of 10 people 👥 We are waiting for your support to reach our goal and more, Allah willing. 💪🏼

title: "Qutayba" Sports Field
overview_text: Qutayaba.. the child who lost his life due to the devastating earthquake that hit Antakya. He is our dear friend's, Fuad Sayed Issa, child who had us all touched after hearing his story from the videos he posted that showed how talented and full of life he was and how much he loved to play football. We all loved him and wished we got to know him more, but unfortunately he left us and is now in a better place as we all pray for him. To honor Qutayaba and keep his name going, and because football was on of his favorite hobbies, and for all the children in NW Syria, Molham Team in cooperation with Violet Organization, launches a campaign to build a Sports field in Idlib. Your donation of any amount will make us one step closer to establish "Qutayba" Sports Field.

title: Reviving Hope
overview_text: Most people overcame the tragedy of the earthquake, but the suffering of our people in Karkh Khan in Hatay province and their heartbreaking stories continue, burdening even the hearts of their children. Aisha, a ten-year-old girl, caught our attention as she carried her little brother on her back because he didn't have shoes after they emerged from under the rubble, losing everything they owned! 800 families are experiencing a shortage of basic necessities for survival, living in tents that offer little protection from the summer heat. These 800 families, with their young children, lack drinking water, food, and even clothing. Diseases threaten them from every corner, leaving them unable to carry on with their lives in a normal manner. This campaign aims to support these families to ease their misery and assist them in continuing their lives under better living conditions.

title: A fruit basket 2
overview_text: The campaign was launched to grant a displaced child's wish, an apple! Our goal wasn't only to grant his wish but to also reach the displaced families that view fruits as a luxury they can do without. Imagine how a family's reaction would be when delivered a fruit basket to their tent, knowing that someone remembered their forgotten details? This is exactly what your donation does! The cost of one basket is $7

title: Plants and Saddaqas
overview_text: Have you ever thought of planting a tree or aeven a plant in another place, Imagine what if that place was NW Syria camps? Those camps and other areas lack greeneries due to bombardment, hence there are not enough greeneries for children and families to relax in. The Molham Volunteering Team enables you to donate only $5 to buy a tree or many trees so that you have a Saddaqa Jariyah that benefit the displaced people. It is great to plant a tree, and save a planet !

title: House Rent Campaign
overview_text: Home represents safety and comfort, but for displaced families searching for a new place to settle, they face an overwhelming burden that drains their strength and causes distress. In northern Syria, hundreds of families share the worry of affording house rent and the constant fear of becoming homeless once again. However, the "House Rent" campaign seeks to directly assist these families, reaching out to them to alleviate their fears and provide them with much-needed financial support. Your contribution makes it all possible! With just $50, you can make a significant impact by helping secure one month's rent for a displaced family or contribute towards their housing expenses.

title: Eid Givings 14
overview_text: Every year, the Eid Giving campaign proves to be one of the most important and needed campaigns, ensuring that the Eid celebration doesn't pass by a displaced child as a normal day, but rather brings joy through this campaign! With a donation of $30 per child, we will provide them with new clothes for Eid, and distribute gifts of $3 per child. This is the way to bring happiness to the children of northern Syria and refugee communities. Don't hesitate to contribute!

title: Eid Desserts 6
overview_text: We eagerly await the holiday seasons to find some personal space away from all the hardships of life. However, for a displaced or earthquake-affected family who lacks the means to bring joy to themselves and their children, it becomes an exhausting period. But the "Eid Dessert" campaign aims each year to wipe away feelings of loneliness by providing Eid desserts to as many displaced families as possible. A donation of $7 ensures Eid sweets for a family, reminding them that they are not alone!

title: Eid Sacrifice 8
overview_text: Displaced families have suffered displacement for years in addition to the earthquake disaster a few months ago depriving them of the joy of their events. Every year, the "Eid Sacrifice" campaign targets displaced families in North Syria and countries of asylum by distributing Udhiya shares during Eid al-Adha. The cost of one Udhiya including the slaughter, butchering, and distribution is 300$ for sheep ( +60kg weight). For cows, the cost is $1900, including slaughter, butchering, and distribution, which can be shared by up to 7 persons. Each Udhiya process will be documented with the name of the donors via a video record to be sent by email following the completion of execution.

title: Eid clothing for oprhaned children- Eidul al-Adha-2023
overview_text:
Eid clothing for oprhaned children- Eidul al-Adha-2023
The joy of Eid lies just in its fine details like a child's smile while she shows her new dress off, a boy's dance while counting his Eid giving, and children's photos in their new clothes. As everyone has the right to be feel happy, you can contribute to a child's happiness by donating $30 to help him have Eid clothing without a pair of shoes. You can also donate $35 to provide a child with Eid clothing plus a pair of shoes.
details_text: The joy of Eid lies just in its fine details like a child's smile while she shows her new dress off, a boy's dance while counting his Eid giving, and children's photos in their new clothes. As everyone has the right to be feel happy, you can contribute to a child's happiness by donating $30 to help him have Eid clothing without a pair of shoes. You can also donate $35 to provide a child with Eid clothing plus a pair of shoes.

title: Shawarma
overview_text: If you are fond of Shawarma… remember that you could share your happiness while having your first bite of the juicy sandwich, which is full of love and garlic sauce, with the children who are deprived of their minimum rights in NW Syria and refugee camps. The aim of this campaign is to distribute Shawarma sandwiches periodically to the children who can’t afford it. You can donate $10 to buy 5 sandwiches, or any money you see fit. We will distribute your donations to those who deserve them.

title: Support Palestine
overview_text: We and our people in Palestine are one nation. We stand by civilians who suffer from persecution and injustice as a result of the recent incursions in Palestine. Therefore, Molham Volunteering Team has launched the "Support Palestine" campaign to help the affected civilians by securing the necessary basic supplies of food, non-food and medical items. We will work to determine the need in the affected areas in cooperation with Molham Team in Palestine and partner civil organizations hoping to ease their pain.

title: Urgent Humanitarian Cases
overview_text: One can never imagine how little Majed suffers due to the burns he sustained in the fire. On the earthquake eve in Syria, a horrific fire broke out in their miserable tent, causing major burns all over his body. The fire turned Majed’s life upside down. Now, Majed rests in hospital away from his family as his father accompanies him to Turkey for treatment. The doctors made him breathe through a hole in the trachea. He hasn’t been able to speak for months. He can’t even weep and cry, as the burns are severe. This negatively affected his psychology. Majed’s father tries hard to pay off the debts and send money to his family in Syria; however, he is helpless because he has to take care of Majed around the clock. Majed misses his mother so much, but the sole thing he can do is cry silently. You can donate to help alleviate Majed’s suffering and help his family overcome their distress. Urgently donate to help Majed as well as hundreds of other similar cases.

title: Loaf of bread-4
overview_text: “All of us in the camp suffer in terms of obtaining bread, which is almost inedible and insufficient.” This is how Um Ahmad answered when we asked her about the situation of bread in the camp. Not all the families are able to afford bread due to displacement and skyrocketing prices. The starving children are forced to search for whatever food to fight hunger. To change this miserable reality, you can donate $12 for the “Loaf of bread” Campaign to provide bread for a family over a month.

title: Forgotten camps
overview_text: Poor families living in miserable camps feel helpless due to poor living conditions, especially as no one conveys their suffering. It is our duty to search for and reach those families. Given that, we've launched this campaign to help the displaced families in NW Syria camps and the refugee countries which lack necessary services. You can donate for the campaign to show solidarity with those families and their children.

title: Heat-3 Campaign
overview_text: Hamoudi and his sister Razan didn’t find a comfortable place to sleep in the tent because it was too hot due to the high temperature. They are an example of thousands of displaced children in the camps who got used to different hardships in different seasons of the year. They spend the summer in poor tents amidst increased diseases and unbearable suffering. You can donate $20 for the “Heat-3” Campaign to help provide a fan, $20 for a power battery, $20 for a 20-liter water container, $50 for a solar power panel, and $2 for an ice bar per family. Your generous donations will help poor families live a moderate summer.

title: Food Supplies 3
overview_text: Displaced families try hard to make a living, especially as they miss preparing food supplies for winter just like what they used to do before they were forcibly displaced from their cities and towns. Given that, we’ve launched the “Food Supplies-3” Campaign in NW Syria to help the poor families provide for food supplies for winter. Your donation will make the big difference to those families.

title: Emergency Response 2023
overview_text: Suffering for displaced people doesn't end with displacement itself; rather, it starts. The suffering continues in times of disasters, floods, and fires. Therefore, Molham Team has launched an Emergency Response campaign to meet the needs of displaced families in Idlib, Aleppo countryside, Latakia countryside, Daret Ezzeh, and other areas of operation. Your donation can alleviate the suffering of displaced families and help us rapidly respond to them.

title: Medical Sponsorships
overview_text: “I wish I could hug her one more time! I can’t hug her because her skin, with any friction, bleeds and her pain increases. Her tears break my heart seeing her condition getting worse..." Abeer is a little girl who suffers from the most hard and painful disease! Bullous epidermolysis is her health and her best days! Abeer needs special care but her family can't afford the expenses of her treatment. Your sponsorship of 50$ a month can ease her pain. You can donate for the “Medical Sponsorships” Campaign to help hundreds of patients receive permanent treatment on a monthly basis. Don’t let them down

title: Rouh Fund
overview_text: The " Rouh" campaign is dedicated to receiving donations for orphans who are sponsored by Molham Volunteering Team. You can donate the value of the selected artwork from the Rouh website by entering the amount due in the box below. Then, you send the receipt to the Rouh team on WhatsApp via the number 00905358147802 to complete the process of receiving the art pieces. Thanks to your donations, we were able to sponsor 33 orphans through the works of Rouh artists. The proceeds of all products and pieces will be used to sponsor the orphans.

title: Al-Taawun Association.
overview_text: Al-Taawun Charity Association is dedicated to supporting the needy and displaced, and to meeting people’s essential needs—actions that have a profound impact on the wellbeing of society. Following the guidance of our beloved Prophet ﷺ, who said: “If anyone relieves a Muslim believer from one of the hardships of this worldly life, Allah will relieve him of one of the hardships of the Day of Resurrection." He also said: "He who provides a fasting person something with which to break his fast, will earn the same reward as the one who was observing the fast, without diminishing in any way the reward of the latter." Your contribution to the projects of the blessed month of Ramadan—even a single dollar—can help ease the suffering of our people through the distribution of bread, iftar meals, food baskets, and cash aid.

title: Providing water-3
overview_text: Have you ever thought what kinds of suffering would you witness, if you ever visited a camp?. It would touch your heart to see children walking far distances to secure little water, and families that can do nothing due to the lack of water. Given that, the Molham Volunteering Team has launched constant campaigns to provide water to hundreds of families. The campaign also allows those who would like to have a waqf as a Sadaqa Jariyah. You can donate the cost of digging a water well to enable the displaced families from having potable water. You can contact the following Whatsapp number for further details: 00905367026447

title: 100 houses Campaign
overview_text: This campaign is dedicated to providing houses to 100 displaced families, including members with special needs. The families are now living in small rooms covered with tarpaulins. You can sponsor a family by paying $4,000 for transporting the family into a house, hence you can have a life-long waqf. You can pay the money cash or in installments over a year, where you pay $350 per month in the monthly deduction system.

title: You’re not Alone
overview_text: The "Save Cancer Patients" campaign announces the launch of its second phase, following the successful completion of the first phase - "Cancer Doesn't Wait". Our mission goes beyond facilitating the urgent cases of cancer patients entering Turkish hospitals; we aim to be a support system for all cancer patients in northern Syria. Their total number reaches approximately 3,200, all in need of assistance to afford chemotherapy, medical treatment, and living expenses. Hence, the theme of the second phase is "You Are Not Alone," as we strive to give a dose of hope to these patients before they receive their chemotherapy. We are also pleased to share the following donation links to receive contributions for the benefit of these patients. Rest assured that all donations will be carefully managed and monitored by the campaign's administration, with priority given to the most urgent needs of these patients.

title: Neurosurgery Operating Room
overview_text: The joy of Abdel Moneim and his twin brother's birth was lost adding to his family's suffering. Their tragedy began when they were displaced from their home. Their little daughter had cirrhosis of the liver. Furthermore, Abdul Moneim's twin passed away. Abdel Moneim is suffering from hydrocephalus and spinal meningocele. His family cannot afford the costs of surgical treatment making his life at risk. The case of Abdel Moneim is not the first and will not be the last. Because this tragic case has been repeated many times on the doorsteps of hospitals, we are launching the “Neurosurgery Operating Room” campaign to create an operating room dedicated to neurosurgery. With your support, it will give hope to many patients like Abdel Moneim.

title: Education Empowerment Fund.
overview_text: I lost my 10-year-old brother in the earthquake. Typically, in our scholarship program, we assess students primarily based on their academic achievements. Nevertheless, this year, as we delved into their narratives, a profound sense of sadness washed over us, as we empathized with the pain and hardship they had endured. The students' academic performance had noticeably declined, primarily attributed to the challenges they faced in the aftermath of the earthquake. Consequently, we recognized the need for significant adjustments and a complete overhaul of the evaluation system. Ribah, a student, tragically lost her ten-year-old brother, Mahmoud, in the earthquake. Her father suffered a leg injury, rendering him unable to work, and her tuition fee stands at $715. Instead of turning her away, we pledged our support and vowed to expedite her scholarship application, sharing her story to ensure her funding promptly. Your generous donation to the campaign for earthquake-affected students will offer them vital relief during these challenging times as their stories are heart-wrenching.

title: Urgent Medical Cases Fund
overview_text: “He was all about helping me... He wanted to alleviate my burden. If I had known that would happen to him, I would not have let him leave the house. This is our fate and I can't do anything to change it!” said Damen's father. Damen is a little kid who took it upon himself to support his family. He started selling firewood on his small bike to help his father secure the needs of the family. Sadly, he had an accident and has gone into a coma since. Little Damen is in a critical health condition. He urgently needs your help to continue his treatment, recover, and go back to his family. Your donation can make a big difference in his long treatment journey.

title: Baby Milk 3
overview_text: Families face different types of suffering like displaced families who can't afford baby milk and proper food for their infant children. Hundreds of infant children cry of hunger because their families can't secure their only necessary food. Your donation of $25 can provide baby milk for an infant of a displaced family. Your support can alleviate their suffering.

title: 9 Campaign
overview_text: Because a majority of the displaced have been deprived from one of their most basic rights: Education. Both school and higher education which are equally important in our era, we have launched the "Nine" campaign in its second year, symbolizing the ninth month; September, which is full of preparations for children for their new academic year and the enthusiasm of youth for university. With this campaign, we will be hand in hand to support and stand by them. Don't hesitate to donate, as a little from you will undoubtedly change the lives of many for the better.

title: Light initiative
overview_text: I am Noor al-Tabaa, specialized in psychological support and familial guidance. I am a volunteer in relief societies and orphanages. We’ ve never stopped following up with and supporting the afflicted people following the earthquake in Southern Turkey and Northern Syria. Over the recent months, we’ve provided necessary support for the amputees. And within the great efforts to pursue them in a special and effective manner. Our follow-up extends both within hospitals and within the camps and homes where they live. We are working to secure the necessary financial support to secure physical treatment for affected individuals, as well as the basic medical support they need. Our efforts go beyond only physical assistance, as we seek to provide psychological and therapeutic support to them to address the psychological and mental challenges that accompany such difficult situations. We urgently need your continued and generous support to be able to continue our efforts in providing the best services to those who need them. Your donation will contribute to the reconstruction of the lives of the injured and affected, help them reach safety and stability, and build their economic capabilities. Through this fund you can donate and help to the needy situations that we are constantly helping, thanks for your support, and we look forward to achieving better opportunities for those affected and rebuilding their lives with every strength. With a lot of thanks

title: Ghaith Medical Analysis Laboratory
overview_text: Asmaa has never realized how critical her health condition is. She thought that her pain was merely a setback. Anyway, she had an analysis and checkups which revealed that she was in critical conditions. Although checkups have nothing to do with treatment, they are a key step. The Ghaith Laboratory has a key role in facilitating patients’ treatment, especially as it provides analysis and checkups for hundreds of patients, including children in NW Syria. The laboratory also plays a role in earlier detection of unknown cases, hence facilitating their treatment. The laboratory is equipped with the best and most sophisticated medical devices for analysis.

title: Stationery for orphaned students in 2023
overview_text:
Stationery for orphaned students in 2023
A new school year is on the way. Students began preparing educational necessities with joy and enthusiasm. Anyway, the orphaned students feel sadness because they can’t afford to buy even the minimum of their education necessities. Given that, we’ve launched a new campaign to provide stationery for the orphaned students to put a smile on their faces. You can donate to the campaign to help change their miserable reality.
details_text: A new school year is on the way. Students began preparing educational necessities with joy and enthusiasm. Anyway, the orphaned students feel sadness because they can’t afford to buy even the minimum of their education necessities. Given that, we’ve launched a new campaign to provide stationery for the orphaned students to put a smile on their faces. You can donate to the campaign to help change their miserable reality.

title: Be With Them
overview_text: Ali will never see again. He lost his sight. He and I live alone and we rely on the help of good people every now and then.” - Um Ibrahim, Ali’s sister. Between every tent and another, and between one destroyed house and another, there is a family of a person with special needs. Whether due to bombing, genetic diseases, etc., these families still have hope for a better life but it's becoming harder for them. For Ali and hundreds of other families of persons with special needs, we have launched the “Be With Them” campaign. The campaign aims to check their conditions and meet their needs whether daily supplies, medical supplies, or any other form of aid. Your support is their hope for a better life.

title: Action for Libya
overview_text: We are always pained by the silence of the international community when disasters occur. Today, people in Libya are in a tremendous tragedy. The empathy they showed us after the earthquake that struck northwestern Syria was immense. They sent both in-kind and financial assistance that helped alleviate our pains and wounds. Libya needs us to lessen their suffering, in the face of the major catastrophe caused by the Daniel Hurricane, which resulted in mass casualties and significant damage. Therefore, Molham Team is launching a campaign to respond to the affected people in Libya, through its platforms for fundraising, and licensed banks in the team's name around the world. These platforms will be dedicated to the response campaign for 48 hours. The campaign aims to secure food and other types of necessary emergency relief.

title: Hand in Hand to Help Morocco
overview_text:
Hand in Hand to Help Morocco
Tents scattered, and heartbreaking stories... Molham Volunteering Team has arrived to Morocco, specifically to the Hoz City . Hundreds of families inhabit the tents, bewildered and unable to recover from their shattered lives, like Mohammed's family. His family consists of five members. His daughter and her husband passed away, leaving their child orphaned with his grandfather, who lost his sole source of income in the earthquake and has neither a home nor a job, along with his wife who is unable to move. The family lives in a dilapidated tent unsuitable and urgently needs assistance to secure a better tent and a some cash to start a job that will provide them with income. There are hundreds of families like Mohammed's family waiting for your help, so don't let them down when they need you the most!

details_text:
Help Little Ibrahim Fight for a Better Life

Little Ibrahim has been suffering since birth from hypoxic brain injury, which has caused severe brain atrophy.

Doctors discovered his condition after noticing several symptoms, starting with convulsions in his eyes and lips, which over time extended to his entire body.

Ibrahim is now in urgent and dire need of medical support, including medications, a medical stroller to ease his mobility, regular care, and monthly living assistance to cover his essential needs and ensure continuity of treatment.

An amount of $400 could make a real difference in covering these heavy monthly expenses, bringing hope and change to the life of Ibrahim and his family.

Your kindness today can change a child’s tomorrow.

title: Urgent Humanitarian Cases
overview_text: “Leaving home in the morning, hoping to secure decent work by evening to address this small issue, I find no one to hire me due to my leg problem. I started to sell scrap iron, I manage to meet basic needs, but affording the necessary treatment for my little one remains beyond reach.” With a heavy heart, Samer shares his struggle with his own situation and the congenital deformity in his daughter's Anaam hands, necessitating expensive physical therapy. Facing dire living conditions, the family grapples with tragic circumstances, making it challenging for Samer to provide even the essentials. Today, he seeks our support during this difficult time, extending a compassionate hand to ease the burden on his heart. Your donation of $300 can significantly impact the family’s situation.

title: Building a Dream
overview_text: Moamen is a second-year university student studying mechanical engineering. He and his family had to move because of the earthquake. He also had to travel to another city to study. Moamen is the oldest of his siblings. He works to provide for his family of 6 people and to cover part of his university expenses. There are many students facing the same conditions as Moamen. Thankfully, we were able to support 22 students to continue their studies and pursue their dreams. You can support the campaign by donating via the link or by sharing the campaign with other people. Help us build the dream of a student.🤍#Building_A_Dream

title: Educational fund
overview_text: In cooperation with Choose Love, this fund will be allocated to support the operational costs of the Fahed Rae School in addition to the training and qualification of school staff.

title: Idlib Under Attack (Together we share the losses)
overview_text:
Idlib Under Attack (Together we share the losses)
We know that nothing can compensate for the loss of a soul, but we must make an effort to stand with them as much as we can. Those whose homes were damaged or lost their cars in the recent bombing campaign, or those who were injured and are unable to work, donate to this campaign to alleviate their suffering. In Idlib, words lose their meaning as wounds run deeper and harsher. It is subjected to relentless shelling by regime forces, a bombardment that shows no mercy as it targets children and women. The city and its people who have always hosted the displaced and the weary, are getting displaced once again! For Idlib, we have launched the “Idlib Under Attack” campaign to respond and help the families and the injured.

title: For Children in Gaza
overview_text: The number of victims has now exceeded 8,000, with most of them being children and women, and more than 30,000 injured. A significant level of destruction has been described by the official from the United Nations Office in Palestine. This has exacerbated the health sector's worst crisis, with the urgent need for medical supplies due to the critical cases, and thousands of injuries. In addition to a complete power outage and water shortages in most areas, especially hospitals and medical centers. In coordination with humanitarian organizations working on the ground, we are launching the "For Children in Gaza" campaign to secure the necessary medical supplies and support the healthcare sector, along with essential items. With these immense deficits, your support can make a difference, helping to alleviate their suffering and support them in their time of need.

title: Orphans
overview_text: Children are the ones who pay the highest price, and in light of the vulnerability we feel, we have decided to help in any way we can. Today, we are launching a fund dedicated to orphans in Palestine. We hope you would choose an auto monthly payment subscription of $50 to support an orphan in need. Your one-time donation or monthly sponsorship will change and ease their pain.

title: Give Warmth 17
overview_text: Every year, pursuing our goal of providing better living conditions for displaced families, we have the " Give Warmth " campaign. In the 2023-2024 winter, the " Give Warmth 17" campaign aims at providing heating materials and supplies to the largest number of displaced people and camps in northern Syria. Our goal is to protect them from winter conditions and hardships. The share is $65 to provide a heater and charcoal. The $100 NFI basket includes tarpaulin, charcoal, mattresses, a blanket, a carpet, and a heater. The $200 joint share, with 20 people, can help build a house in residential projects. Your donations can significantly ease the distress of displaced families in the winter.

title: Children’s winter clothes 2023
overview_text: Winter seems joyful and evokes warm memories in our minds, however, the image of winter is different within the alleys of the camps and under the roofs of the thin tents. The children’s winter memories are bleak and cold, filled with shivers and frost. With your support, you can change the harsh memories of these young ones and provide them with a less harsh winter. Your kindness will bring warmth to these children, and your $30 donation will contribute to securing a winter outfit including shoes, a coat, a scarf, a woolen hat, gloves, and socks for one child.

title: Food Aid For The Poor
overview_text:
Food Aid For The Poor
The details of their stories break hearts and bring tears to the eyes. The causes of sorrow continue to creep into the hearts of the weary displaced, and the marks of tragedy still manifest on their faces. However, in the face of this tragedy, all we can do is try to lend them a helping hand and alleviate the weight of the disaster on them. That's why we've launched the "Feed the Needy" campaign to distribute meals and food parcels to displaced families. Your support for this campaign will be a source of new hope for those who have endured harsh days and circumstances. You can also contribute to fulfilling the required amounts for feeding the needy, which will be distributed to those in need.

You can also contribute to fulfilling the required amounts for feeding the needy, which will be distributed to those in need.

title: Molham House for Cancer Patients
overview_text:
Molham House for Cancer Patients
A vascular tumor on his innocent face threatens his life... He never had a peaceful childhood, memorizing hospital corridors due to how often he visited. Since birth, young Mohammed has been afflicted with a vascular tumor that grows as he does, stretching from half of his face to his chest, saddening his heart and aching his body, which has been filled with medicines that have exhausted his heart! But what burdens his soul and steals his childhood is his solitude in Turkey for treatment, far from his family. The cost of his treatment in Turkish hospitals is very high, and he needs advanced laser devices to solve his health problem, which is now affecting his psyche in a way that bodes ill! While Mohammed fights his illness, he prays every day for help to relieve him of pain and suffering, longing to return safely healed to the embrace of his family... Help Mohammed and those with him at the Inspiring Team Cancer Patients Center to regain the life they once lived away from diseases and pains. Donate now!

title: Urgent Medical Cases
overview_text: She was named Noor, with the hope that light would be her destiny. From the moment she was born prematurely, facing respiratory challenges, she never experienced a mother's embrace or scent. The medical incubator became her first refuge. Her mother, in tears, shares the immense struggle after Noor's birth. Due to family hardships and Noor's continuous need for medical care, your donation, regardless of the amount, serves as a healing balm for Noor and countless others awaiting your generosity in their journey to recovery.

title: Support Orphans
overview_text: “Whenever I see other children with their fathers, I feel annoyed because I lost mine. Anyway, he is now in paradise, God willing.” It is quite hard to miss our dearest, this is exactly what happened to Amal, who is still young. She has no one to support her. “Fathers play a key role in supporting their families. Amal and her sister live amid harsh living conditions,especially after the death of their father. They have only their mother to support them. Their mother can’t provide for their major necessities as she has an amputated leg. The family lives in a room that lacks the minimum means of life such as heating and power. Amal and her family need your generous donations to help them live a happy and dignified life. You can donate to help change the miserable reality of this family. You can donate for the campaign.

title: Constructing A Mosque
overview_text: This campaign is dedicated to individuals willing to donate and contribute as an endowment for the construction of mosques in residential communities overseen by the Molham Volunteering Team in NW Syria. You can donate to contribute to the construction of a mosque or to complete the finishing, furnishings, service expenses, and maintenance.

title: Simple Dreams Fund
overview_text: Long years of bombing, displacement, and the accumulation of countless misfortunes and disasters in northern Syria, resulted in thousands of unemployed people and families without breadwinners. We know that temporary solutions such as distributing aid and cash assistance aren't sustainable solutions. Sooner or later the situation of these beneficiaries will return to what it was. Therefore, we are launching the “Simple Dreams Fund.” The goal of this campaign is to support families who can work and provide all their needs to establish their projects and help them achieve self-sufficiency. Your donations to this campaign can enhance job opportunities and turn the wheel of the economy in northern Syria. You will also help end the suffering of hundreds of families.

title: Urgent Humanitarian Cases 2
overview_text: Ghalia, just under 11 days old, has been in an incubator since opening her eyes, facing respiratory challenges. Her diabetic mother, needed insulin throughout the pregnancy period. The father is in Syria, working daily to support his wife, children, and the sick daughter. The mother and her daughter are in Turkey, residing with relatives without financial support. After public hospitals refused them, they had to admit the baby to a private hospital to save her life. The hospital expenses have reached around $1300, increasing by $100 each day. The family relies on your assistance, as they have no one else to turn to but the mercy of Allah SWT. Your support could help save a life. "And whoever saves a life it is as though he had saved the lives of all mankind" (5:32).

title: The proceeds from the Istanbul Book Fair 2023
overview_text:
The proceeds from the Istanbul Book Fair 2023
Molham Volunteer Team is participating in the International Arab Book Fair in Istanbul for the year 2023. The proceeds from all products at the fair will go towards supporting the education of children in northern Syria.
details_text: Molham Volunteer Team is participating in the International Arab Book Fair in Istanbul for the year 2023. The proceeds from all products at the fair will go towards supporting the education of children in northern Syria.

title: Winter Response for Arsal Refugee Camps 5
overview_text:
Winter Response for Arsal Refugee Camps 5
Displaced people in refugee camps in Lebanon are struggling with harsh winter conditions. They have been suffering freezing nights, buried tents by snow, and thunderstorms. People there are helpless seeing their children shivering from the cold. This is the case in Arsal, Tripoli, and Bekaa camps. Therefore, we have launched a rapid response campaign. It aims to provide heating supplies (fuel, coal, firewood) and winter clothes to displaced people in these camps. With your donation, we will deliver aid to as many displaced families as possible. Your support can alleviate their suffering and help them go through winter.

Your support can alleviate their suffering and help them go through winter.

title: "Oxygen Campaign".
overview_text: The flow through hospital doors never stops, not even for a moment. Every second brings with it fears, pains, hopes, life, death, smiles, and tears, leaving hospitals as the institutions that are most heavily burdened. On one day it is a pandemic, on another a bombing, and yet another a devastating earthquake—this land witnesses every form of hardship and endures them as if they were part of daily life. All of these challenges have drained the resources of medical institutions, including the oxygen generator at the governorate hospital in Idlib, which supplies oxygen to most hospitals in the region—alongside many other critical devices that have worn down over the years. And because we trust that the love of doing good is inherent in your hearts, we are launching a campaign to provide essential medical supplies to hospitals in northern Syria.

title: Haven Hub
overview_text: In the relentless struggle of the displaced, each step forward is a testament to their resilience amidst pervasive sorrow. Transitioning from tents to the Al-Kut residential complex may offer a change of scenery, but challenges persist. One woman's story mirrors the collective narrative—abandoning the tents, she faces new hurdles in securing a decent life for her three orphans, compounded by the impediment of a torn cartilage in her left lower limb. Committed to uplifting our families and ensuring the well-being of all residents in our residential villages, we inaugurate the 'Haven Hub' campaign, a pledge to provide diverse services and support within our residential projects.

title: Socks
overview_text: We met Muhammad during our usual visit to one of the camps. He was shivering from the cold which told everything about his suffering! When we asked Muhammad about his wish, his answer was shocking: “I wish I had socks to wear and keep myself warm!" For Muhammad and every cold child in northern Syria, we are launching the “Socks” campaign which aims at helping children in camps feel warm in winter. Your 2$ donation can fulfill Muhammad's simple wish and make him feel warm. Your charity can make a significant change.

title: Urgent Cases
overview_text: "The heater exploded in the face of little Ahmad, and the fire raged on his face for about a minute. There was nothing that could describe his screams and pain. The child Ahmad was transferred to Turkey. He waited for hours on the road, and this caused him significant problems in his lungs and kidneys, to the point that the percentage of his death became 80%! Today marks a year and a half since the incident with the child Ahmad. Until now, he can't sleep because his eyelids are now drooping, and he has lost the ability to move what remains of his body. The living conditions for Ahmed and his family are very poor. They are living with two other families, and their ability to secure their necessities and the medical needs of their child is nonexistent. Any donation could be the salvation for Ahmad and his family.

title: Humanitarian Sponsorships 2024
overview_text: Abdulkareem was born with pemphigus that causes him unbearable pain. He needs daily treatment to fight his pain. Abdukareem’s father has a paralyzed hand’s palm following a bombardment on his city. He can’t work to provide for Abdukareem’s treatment necessities such as gauze, ointments, and medicine. Your generous donations will for sure help alleviate Abdulkareem’s suffering. Don’t hesitate.

title: Medical Cases 2024
overview_text: Fawzia is a young kid who knows nothing but sorrow and misery. Her family's extreme needs prevented her from enjoying a lot of life's pleasures and basic childhood rights like food, clothing, and toys. Adding to the problems, a terrible fire destroyed her family's home and all of its things! The small girl suffered severe burns on her face and needed immediate medical attention. Take the opportunity to lend a helping hand to her because her pains are horrible! Today, it is your turn to be a support for Fawzia, to reduce her pain and bring back the smile to her sweet face

title: Broken Childhood 2024
overview_text: Hundreds of children in northern Syria are suffering from difficult living conditions. Therefore, we have launched the “Broken Childhood 2024” campaign to support and sponsor them by securing their basic needs. Donate to children who are out of education and deprived of a normal childhood because they have to work. Your support can change their lives and put them back on the right track by helping them go back to school.

title: Zakat al-Mal
overview_text: Through this campaign, we receive your zakat throughout the year so that it is disbursed to those who deserve it, including the needy, the displaced, the sick, orphans, students, and homeless families inside Syria and countries of asylum, according to the legitimate zakat channels.

title: Molham Giving Day !
overview_text: Your donation today is doubled for this campaign, and every dollar you donate will reach us doubled by our donors. A child is left in a room alone because of his smell. Abdul Rahman is a young child who was born with a rare disease of psoriasis with redness all over his body. Psoriasis causes a lot of suffering for the child, but due to the extreme poverty of the family, they are unable to provide him with the treatment he needs, so they leave him in a room alone. The child is in dire and urgent need of your help to receive the necessary treatment, so do not delay it and be the reason for his release from isolation and alleviation of his pain! In this campaign, a group of donors will match any amount you donate, so if you donate a dollar, we will receive two dollars... and whatever your ability... today the impact of your donation is greater. More children and families will receive aid! Donate today, and bring a smile instead of two! All amounts received on the Inspiring Day of Giving will be spent to secure the humanitarian needs, warmth, shelter, and living expenses of displaced families residing in camps, shelter centers, and homes whose families are suffering from tragic conditions.

overview_text:

A million people in northwestern Syria and thousands in refugee camps outside Syria are waiting for your support. Your donation can significantly impact their lives.

title: Urgent Humanitarian Cases
overview_text: "Fatima was born five years ago. Her mother has been suffering specifically after her husband passed away due to a heart attack two years ago. She, alone, takes care of her three children including lovely Fatima who was born with no legs and deformed hands. Moreover, she can't eat because she suffers from intestinal problems and she can only drink milk. Fatima and her family live in a damp cold shop under tragic conditions. They are helpless and they can't even secure their food. Fatima and her family have been facing heartbreaking days. Your donation can ease their suffering and significantly change their lives."

title: Proceeds from Molham Store products
overview_text:
Proceeds from Molham Store products
Molham Store offers products crafted with love and expertise, designed to resonate with the very essence of humanity we carry within us, no matter where life takes us. Our collection features a curated selection of distinct designs infused with inspiring concepts, each one a reflection of our rich cultural heritage, evoking memories as fragrant as the scent of tradition itself. Every purchase from Molham Store directly contributes to the noble cause of educating and sponsoring orphaned children. With each transaction, you're not just acquiring a unique piece from our store; you're also investing in the future of deserving young lives. Join us in making a difference. Complete your purchase today, and let your support echo through the halls of education and opportunity for those who need it most.

title: Restoring Hope: Support Anas's Physical Therapy Journey
overview_text:
Restoring Hope: Support Anas's Physical Therapy Journey
Mohammed suffered serious muscle atrophy at his youth, causing him to lose his ability to walk, stand balanced, and take part in different bodily activities. Mohammed's health is improving as a result of his treatment at the Molham Centre for Physical Therapy, which provides full medical care. Your donations to the centre benefit Mohammed and many other patients who require assistance. Be a gentle hand that heals their hearts and supports them.

title: Life Savers 3
overview_text: The incredible pain is over Issa's ability, as he is only one year old! Issa suffered burns as a result of a fuel can explosion. The burns had a major effect on the child's health, as his small body was unable to deal with the pain. He requires different drugs to reduce his pain, as well as continuous follow-up care by a doctor to ensure his health. Your donation of a little money for the kid is sufficient to cover the costs of his care, reduce his sadness, and prevent him from further harm. Be a kind hand that removes his suffering and saves him.

title: Food Packaged for Orphan's Families. Ramadan 2024
overview_text:
Food Packaged for Orphan's Families. Ramadan 2024
During the sacred month of Ramadan, as families gather around Iftar and Suhoor tables, it's a time of reflection and gratitude. However, for many families, these tables lack even the most basic necessities, making it a struggle to provide a meal for their children. You can make a meaningful difference by contributing $65 to provide a Ramadan basket for an orphan family. These baskets contain essential food items to cover their Suhoor and Iftar meals throughout the holy month, ensuring that they can observe Ramadan with dignity and sustenance. Join us in spreading hope and compassion during this blessed time.

title: Sponsor an Orphan- Ramadan 2024
overview_text:
Sponsor an Orphan- Ramadan 2024
In the shadows of conflict, every orphaned child carries a story laden with pain and a box of secrets known only to God. As the grip of war tightens, their suffering intensifies, and their dreams shrink to the basic necessities of life—a livelihood and a sheltering roof. In this sacred month, let us extend our hands to these vulnerable children through the "Sponsor an Orphan Child" campaign. Your generous donations will be a beacon of hope, transforming their reality during Ramadan. Do not miss this opportunity to make a profound difference and reap the blessings of your kindness.

title: Ramadan Relief
overview_text: Aunt Iman migrated with her children to Arsal fleeing from the shelling and destruction, and they settled there in a small tent. Her eldest son was arrested some time ago, and they lost all their sources of income. Her second son dropped out of school to work and help with the household expenses, but unfortunately, their income is almost nonexistent, and no one lends them a hand due to the amount of debt they have. Aunt Iman's granddaughter needs medication, and the family needs our support to be able to provide for their expenses and food. Hurry to earn reward by helping them! But with your donations today to the #ReliefCampaign, you will mend the heart of our little Nur and be the light she needs."

title: Tamarind
overview_text: Calling All Tamarind Lovers! Every year, we engage in the age-old debate that has puzzled mankind: tamarind or licorice? If you're a devotee of the tangy tamarind beverage, especially during the sacred month of Ramadan, join us in spreading the authentic taste of this Ramadan staple to families in northern Syria. Contribute just $5 or any amount you feel comfortable with, and together, we'll bring the delight of tamarind to households throughout the month. Let's share the joy of this traditional drink and spread goodness far and wide.

title: Iftar Meals - Ramadan 2024
overview_text:
Iftar Meals - Ramadan 2024
When the tranquility of the family turns into safety and comfort, its gathering in the most beloved and beautiful seasons... the days take on another meaning of happiness.
But it is a meaning that is absent from thousands. Its place is confusion and grief... for families spending their Ramadan without breaking the fast or having suhoor. In Ramadan 2024... we will strive, like every year, to provide collective iftars in northern Syria and countries of asylum and to distribute fresh baskets containing various types of vegetables and chicken, sufficient for the family for two days, as the cost of the basket is only $15. This is an opportunity for you, so do not miss its goodness!

title: Ramadan Food Baskets
overview_text: Ramadan Relief: Feed a Family in Need Join us in extending a helping hand to families in camps across northern Syria during the holy month of Ramadan. Our campaign aims to provide essential food parcels from the first night of Ramadan until its conclusion, ensuring that the most vulnerable and displaced families have sustenance throughout this sacred time. For just $65, you can support a family for an entire month, providing them with basic food items and suhoor essentials. Your contribution will make a significant difference in securing their Ramadan necessities, offering them comfort and relief during this blessed month. Make a difference today by supporting a family in need during Ramadan. Your generosity will be rewarded with immense blessings and lasting good.

title: Feed The Poor Campaign 2024
overview_text:
Feed The Poor Campaign 2024
magine empty days where families struggle to provide even a single meal for their children, their dining tables devoid of food, and their tents filled with sorrow and hardship. For displaced families in northern Syria, this has been their reality for far too long. The "Feed the Poor" campaign seeks to address this pressing need by providing essential meals and food parcels to these families. Your donation, no matter the amount, will make a significant difference in relieving the hunger and suffering of hundreds of families in need. Additionally, you can contribute expiation amounts for feeding the poor, ensuring that those who are most deserving receive the support they urgently require. Together, let's make a difference and bring hope to those facing hunger and hardship in northern Syria. Your generosity will bring comfort and relief to those who need it most.

title: Zakat Alfitr - Ramadan 2024
overview_text:
Zakat Alfitr - Ramadan 2024
As the blessed month of Ramadan approaches in 2024, we are launching a Zakat al-Fitr campaign to gather your zakat and distribute it to those most in need in northern Syria and neighboring countries. During this sacred month, you have the opportunity to fulfill your obligation of Zakat al-Fitr by contributing the specified amount for yourself and your family members. Your zakat will be collected from the beginning of Ramadan and distributed during the last week of the month, ensuring that it reaches those in need before the Eid prayer. Each Zakat al-Fitr package will include essential food items such as rice, bulgur, lentils, and freekeh, along with the monetary value of Zakat al-Fitr per person as determined in your country of residence. In addition to fulfilling your Zakat al-Fitr obligation, you have the option to donate any additional amount above the specified zakat amount, further supporting our efforts to alleviate hunger and hardship in the region. Join us in spreading compassion and generosity this Ramadan by participating in our Zakat al-Fitr campaign. Your contribution will make a meaningful difference in the lives of those who are struggling.

title: Share Your Meal
overview_text: In the holy month of Ramadan, the month of generosity and giving, let us share our tables with families in the camps. During the month of Ramadan, thousands of Syrians in the camps face difficulty in securing their breakfast. With rising prices and scarcity of resources, securing the needs for Ramadan has become a heavy burden on many families. But we can make a difference! This campaign is to share breakfast tables with our people in the camps. You can share the meal you want with a family in need.

title: Daily Sadaqah in Ramadan 2024
overview_text:
Daily Sadaqah in Ramadan 2024
This campaign is dedicated to scheduling a portion of your Sadaqah on a daily basis during the blessed month of Ramadan. You can only participate in the daily deduction during the holy month of Ramadan, even if it is $5. This will ensure the continuity of goodness, as periodic donations will ensure your continued support for the needy throughout Ramadan. How do I participate in donating? With daily Sadaqah? -Specify the amount and click on the “Donate” button. -Choose your preferred payment method. -Specify the days from which you want to be automatically deducted. Note: The deduction ends once the period you specified expires.

overview_text: Molham Team and Mimaria Studio invite the international architectural community to rise to the challenge of designing innovative, sustainable, and culturally sensitive housing solutions for the earthquake victims of Syria. This competition seeks to address the complex crisis in Azaz by creating a new urban quarter that provides shelter and recreates a sense of home, community, and belonging. Registration Details 1- Create an account on the Molham website using a team member's name to proceed. 2- Complete the payment for the relevant category. 3- After the payment is successfully processed, you will receive an automatic email. This email will contain a Google Form link where you can complete the rest of the registration details, including: Team Name Number of Team Members Detailed information for each member Contact Information (Email, Phone Number)

title: Ramadan With Our People In Gaza
overview_text:
Ramadan With Our People In Gaza
Let your goodness shine in Ramadan by joining hands with our people in Gaza. Thousands of exhausted families, who are struggling through the hardships of war and dire living conditions during the holy month, are in need. The volunteers of Molham Volunteering Team in Gaza work tirelessly around the clock to alleviate the suffering of our people, who are displaced within the region. They provide neecessities through charity kitchens, distributing food items (vegetable baskets and canned goods), distributing water, and assisting with humanitarian cases. You can contribute and donate to help alleviate their suffering as well.
And rest assured that a few of you can always make a difference.
A fasting breakfast meal for $5 (from the items that are available in the sector such as pasta, beans, potatoes, tomatoes and meat, lentils, and rice and meat)
Securing fresh drinking water for a family for $5
Supporting a family with a sum of money during the holy month - $150
Vegetables basket $30 (tomatoes, cucumbers, peppers, onions, potatoes, eggplant, and any other items according to what's available in the market)
A basket of canned food items for $50 (cheese, tuna, beans, chickpeas, halva, molasses, sorghum, rice, salt, and any other items according to what's available in the market)

title: LET'S GO ON
overview_text: Desiring nothing more than a diagnosis to initiate treatment, searching tirelessly for a doctor to alleviate the burdens of illness, and experiencing a whirlwind of emotions from fear to hope, the plight of patients in northern Syria is dire. With many specialized doctors having left the region, countless individuals suffer from untreated diseases, enduring tragedies in hospital rooms while awaiting transfers for treatment abroad. In response to this crisis, various organizations have united to train medical graduates from local faculties using available hospital resources. As part of our initiative, the Molham Volunteering Team has launched the "LET'S GO ON" campaign, aiming to cover the monthly fees of medical students—$250 each—under the supervision of Free Aleppo University across various specialties. Remarkable progress often stems from modest beginnings. With a small donation, you can provide a student with the opportunity to pursue their education and offer a patient hope for their treatment. Join us in supporting a nation in desperate need of healing.

title: Hope For Children in Gaza
overview_text:
Hope For Children in Gaza

Every contribution helps ensure access to food, clean water, education, and healthcare for children facing unimaginable challenges. Together, let's make a difference and bring hope to the youngest victims of adversity. Donate now to support Malak's cause! https://www.instagram.com/malakfada2003

title: Project Bright Future: Building Hope in Idlib
overview_text:
Project Bright Future: Building Hope in Idlib
Join us in our mission to build a school in Idlib that will provide education for over 1000 students! In war-torn regions like Idlib, access to education is limited, leaving many children without the opportunity to learn and thrive. With your support, we can change that by constructing a school that will serve as a beacon of hope for the community. Every child deserves the chance to receive a quality education in a safe and nurturing environment. By donating to our campaign, you will help create a space where children can learn, grow, and build brighter futures for themselves and their families. Let's come together to make a lasting impact on the lives of these children and give them the gift of education. Your contribution, no matter how big or small, will make a difference in shaping the future of Idlib.

title: Dressing Dreams for Eid!
overview_text: This Eid, let's ensure every child feels the joy of new clothes with our campaign to provide Eid outfits for kids! For just $35, you can give a child the gift of a brand-new outfit, allowing them to celebrate Eid in style and dignity. Many families struggle to afford new clothes for their children during this special time, but with your support, we can make their Eid brighter and more memorable.

title: Spread the Sweetness of Eid!
overview_text:
Spread the Sweetness of Eid!
This Eid, let's come together to bring joy to displaced families by sharing the sweetness of the season! Many families have been displaced from their homes, facing hardships and uncertainty. But with your support, we can make their Eid a little brighter by providing them with delicious desserts to enjoy during this special time. Join our campaign to give displaced families Eid desserts! Your contribution will bring smiles to their faces and warmth to their hearts. Together, let's make this Eid a truly memorable and sweet celebration for everyone.

title: Eid Toys !
overview_text: This campaign is dedicated to bringing smiles to children's faces on Eid. With only hours left until the Eid prayers begin, we must remember that a child's joy is incomplete without an Eid gift! We will assist you in choosing the toys you want to gift to the children on Eid. Through this campaign, after clicking on the donate button, you can choose one or more toys to be sent to a displaced child in northern Syria or Gaza.

title: Loaf Of Bread 5
overview_text: As living conditions in northern Syria are getting harder, displaced people are struggling to secure their basic needs. All their dreams and hopes have gradually vanished and even securing the bread for the day has become a dream for some of them. Bread is traditionally the basic food for Syrian families. The " Loaf of Bread 5" campaign aims at securing bread for displaced and poor families. Your donation of 12$ can provide them with bread for a month.

title: Molham Academy
overview_text: We are constantly seeking to build our nation with knowledge. Last Ramadan, we launched the first Molham Academy programs in teaching programming to students under the age of fifteen. In “Molham Academy” project, we seek to raise the level of applied and creative education among several groups in northern Syria. The first stage will begin with investing free time, developing skills, and learning the skills of research, innovation, and project design, which will be supervised by well-experienced trainers from the Molham Volunteer Team within the Molham Team schools, hoping to expand in the coming stages to include larger segments of the Syrian people. During the first phase of the “Molham Academy” project, we aim to raise 50 child programmers and to work with 500 creative students, male and female, by the end of next summer in various fields that mainly include web programming and robotics programming, developing English language skills, chess, drawing and music, football, and basketball. We have allocated this campaign to secure the operational and logistical costs of the Molham Academy project, which will cover minor costs including teachers’ wages, student transportation, and other required materials. We hope for your support and contribution to the success of this great project.

title: Urgent Medical Cases !
overview_text: Arwa's life was peaceful until a fire broke out in their tent which changed her life upside down! The girl suffered severe burns due to the fire. Arwa's little body is experiencing severe pain which her body can't withstand. Our little one needs medication and medical expenses, but her family's living conditions prevent them from alleviating their daughter's suffering. Be a kind hand that alleviates her pain, as your donation is important to cover the costs of her treatment and alleviate some of her pain.

title: Empower Dreams: Sponsor a Child's Education for $25
overview_text:
Empower Dreams: Sponsor a Child's Education for $25
Every child deserves the opportunity to receive an education, yet many, especially those in camps, are deprived of this fundamental right. Drawing from our experience of supporting 350 children in the Arsal region, we recognize the pressing need to expand our efforts and provide educational support to an even larger number of children. Today, we're launching a campaign to support and secure education for children who are deprived of this basic right. Your contribution of just $25 can sponsor a student for an entire semester, helping them access the education they deserve and empowering them to pursue their dreams. Together, let's extend a helping hand to these children and ensure that they have the chance to build a brighter future. Join us in empowering dreams and making education accessible to all.

title: Bright Futures: $25 Sponsorship for Orphan Students
overview_text:
Bright Futures: $25 Sponsorship for Orphan Students
Meet Iman, a resilient and ambitious child with dreams of becoming a lawyer. Despite the tragic loss of her parents in the 2023 earthquake, Iman remains determined to pursue her education and make a difference. Currently under the care of her struggling aunt, Iman's story mirrors that of countless orphaned children facing adversity. Recognizing the importance of providing opportunities for children like Iman, the Molham team has launched a campaign to support orphan students. With just a $25 sponsorship, you can make a meaningful impact in the lives of hundreds of orphaned children, providing them with educational and living opportunities. Join us in empowering dreams and supporting orphan students like Iman on their journey to success. Your contribution will help create brighter futures and ensure that every child has the chance to thrive, regardless of their circumstances.

title: Empowering Dreams: Support for Children's Talents
overview_text:
Empowering Dreams: Support for Children's Talents
In the face of displacement and adversity, an entire generation of children has been deprived of their basic rights, including the opportunity to nurture their talents in sports, arts, and literature. These talents are integral to shaping their personalities and fostering resilience in the face of challenges. Our campaign aims to fill this gap by providing support and resources to develop the talents of disadvantaged children and youth in refugee camps and host countries. Through your generous donations, we can empower these young individuals to unleash their full potential and rebuild their lives. Join us in empowering dreams and building a brighter future for the next generation. Your contribution will make a meaningful difference in the lives of these children, helping them overcome obstacles and achieve their aspirations. Together, we can create a strong and resilient generation capable of rebuilding what has been lost.

title: Unite for Orphans: A Campaign of Compassion
overview_text:
Unite for Orphans: A Campaign of Compassion
Every day, I imagine them here with us, telling them about my day, what I did, and how I made it out from under the rubble with my siblings... I wish they had stayed by our side... I miss them so much." These words came from Rayan, the little girl who has lived through the bitter pain of losing the support and safety of her parents in the earthquake disaster. She now faces the heavy sorrow of loss with tremendous pain. Rayan is living through her hardest days and moments with her siblings. She needs your support and sponsorship. With your monthly sponsorship for Rayan and hundreds of other orphaned children, you can help provide them with support and ease a part of their pain

title: Rizq Campaign
overview_text: Imagine working all day long in very difficult conditions just to secure a meal for your children in exchange for a maximum wage of 150 Turkish lira, which is approximately just $4! This is the situation of hundreds of day laborers and low-income earners in northern Syria, who suffer from very poor living conditions. Among them is Mahmoud. Mahmoud is one of those people who live with the goal of providing for their daily needs despite the very poor living conditions! With the difficult circumstances and the increasing hardships of life, Mahmoud finds it increasingly difficult to provide for all the needs of his family with an income that does not exceed $100 monthly. Despite this, Mahmoud and many other workers whose stories are similar, decide to challenge all circumstances to ensure they eat their meal lawfully. These are the people who deserve our support and to make them happy. Through your donation to the "Rizq" campaign, we can help the largest number of day laborers in northern Syria by providing them with financial amounts sufficient to meet their families' needs for certain periods, and to ease their hearts from the fatigue and worries they are experiencing so that they can secure their living expenses.

title: Zakat for Change: Empowering Lives Through Your Contributions
overview_text:
Zakat for Change: Empowering Lives Through Your Contributions
Join us in a noble cause dedicated to receiving and disbursing zakat according to the legitimate means prescribed by Islamic law. Your zakat has the power to transform lives, providing essential support to those in need and making a meaningful difference in their lives. Through our campaign, we aim to collect zakat contributions and ensure that they are distributed to those who are eligible to receive them, following the principles of zakat. Your generous donations will help alleviate the suffering of the less fortunate and empower individuals and families to overcome their challenges. Make a lasting impact with your zakat contributions. Together, let's empower lives and foster positive change in our communities. Join our campaign today and be a part of something truly meaningful.

title: Shawarma 2024
overview_text: Shawarma links us with the past and makes us feel over the moon, especially as it is preferred by both the young and old, and, is edible in different places and fits in all times. Unfortunately, there are children who can't afford even Shawarma due to their harsh living conditions. Given that, we liked to share Shawarma with those children to offer them the chance and ecstasy of enjoying a sandwich. The aid of this campaign is to periodically distribute "Shawarma" sandwiches to children and those who can't afford it. You can donate $10 to buy 5 sandwiches, or any money.

title: Urgent Cases - Gaza
overview_text: This campaign is dedicated to aiding humanitarian and medical cases in Gaza. Days, then weeks, and months have passed—it has been a long time and the war in Gaza is still raging, where people live between skies raining bombs and land blazing hot. A prolonged war that has left—and continues to leave—thousands injured and hundreds of thousands displaced. In addition to the war, they endure siege, starvation, and the cutting off of supplies. The war compels us to extend a helping hand and assist our people by alleviating their needs and easing their conditions. Despite the limited resources within the sector due to the siege, we launch this campaign to provide humanitarian and medical aid to our displaced people in Gaza. Be a partner with us and contribute any amount that suits you, for you may relieve someone in need and help those who are desperate.

title: Secure Shelter: House Rent Support for Displaced Families
overview_text:
Secure Shelter: House Rent Support for Displaced Families
Secure Shelter: House Rent Support for Displaced Families Countless displaced families are struggling to keep a roof over their heads. Forced from their homes, they now face the harsh reality of paying rent for temporary shelters with limited resources. We are launching a campaign dedicated to securing house rents for these families, ensuring they have a safe place to live. You can contribute with any amount. Every donation, no matter how small, brings us closer to providing stability and security for these families in need. Join us in making a difference. Your support can help alleviate their burden and provide a sense of normalcy and safety in these challenging times. Donate now and be a beacon of hope for displaced families!

title: Beat The Heat 4
overview_text: As summer temperatures soar, those living in camps face unbearable heat and dire conditions. We're launching a campaign dedicated to distributing fans, ice blocks, and water to help these families stay cool and hydrated. Your contribution can make a huge difference: $20 can provide a fan for a family living in a tent. $30 can supply a 60-amp battery. $50 can ensure a 165-amp solar panel. $15 can provide a 20-liter water container. $2 can supply an ice block to keep perishables safe. Together, we can bring relief and comfort to those enduring the scorching summer. Donate now and help us beat the heat! Donate Today and make a difference in the lives of those who need it most.

title: Eid Al Adha Sacrafice 9
overview_text:
Eid Al Adha Sacrafice 9
Every Eid, we strive for them, for their children, and their smiles. The goal of this year's sacrifice is to reach the largest number of displaced families. The cost of the sacrifice for sheep and cattle is as follows: Calf weighing 500-550 kg: $2300, including slaughtering and cutting. Calf weighing 600 kg and above: $2500, including slaughtering and cutting. Sheep weighing 50-55 kg: $315, including slaughtering and cutting. Sheep weighing 55-60 kg: $330, including slaughtering and cutting. Several people can share the cost of slaughtering and distributing a calf. The team will document all sacrifices with the donors' names and send a video to each donor via email after completion. In Gaza, the ability to execute depends on the availability of sacrificial animals in the local market. The cost of a complete sacrifice, including cutting and distribution, is $650 for a sheep, depending on available resources and current circumstances. Your help could make someone experience the joy of Eid for the first time! Be the reason for creating more happiness...

The "Eid Gifts" campaign aims to make a difference for the children, granting them joy and bringing happiness directly from your hearts to theirs!
