title: Eid Desserts - 8
overview_text: Years pass by with their sweet and bitter moments, through wars and disasters, yet holidays remain a symbol of joy and happiness in people's hearts, even in the most difficult and harsh circumstances. One of the unique traditions of holidays is providing special sweets and foods. Therefore, we are launching the "Eid Sweets 8" campaign to secure sweets for displaced and refugee families. With just $7, you can bring joy and happiness to our people in northern Syria, refugee countries, and Gaza. Your donation today will make a difference and bring joy to their weary hearts.

title: The Survivors ( female detainees )
overview_text:
The Survivors ( female detainees )
How many female detainees have been released, hoping to mend what was deliberately broken in detention, only to find themselves facing a difficult life and overwhelming circumstances? Thousands of women who demanded freedom and dignity lost years of their lives in the regime’s detention centers, where jailers excelled in verbal and physical torture. After surviving, they face significant challenges and harsh living conditions. Many survivors live with fragile psyches and broken hearts, struggling to afford rent and basic necessities. Aunt Huda is one of the survivors of Assad’s prisons, where she endured the harshest forms of torture and lived through the toughest days, emerging with a tired psyche and a debilitated body. For Aunt Huda and other survivors, we launch the "Survivors" campaign to help them pay rent and secure their essentials. Help, even a little, to give them a life that makes them forget the bitterness of detention.

title: Ten days of Dhul-Hijjah
overview_text: The best and greatest days of the year have arrived... the most beloved to Allah SWT. Don’t let them pass without taking full advantage of them! How can you take advantage of them? By reviving the Sunnah of Allah SWT, dedicating a portion of your charity to those in need, and supporting our struggling families. We’ve launched the "Zakat and Charity - The Ten Days of Dhul-Hijjah" campaign to ensure your Zakat and charity reach those in need in northern Syria and Gaza during these blessed days. Simply click the donation button and choose how you wish to donate: - Zakat - Charity - Sacrifice You can also choose "Repeat donation daily" throughout these blessed days, allowing a daily deduction from your account automatically until the end of the ten days of Dhul-Hijjah. Be a support to our families in northern Syria and Gaza during these days that won’t come again.

title: Building Futures: Donate to Educate Syrian Scholars
overview_text:
Building Futures: Donate to Educate Syrian Scholars
The Molham Volunteering Team, in cooperation with the "Together" Educational Foundation, is launching a campaign to collect donations for Syrian students preparing to study at Turkish universities. The campaign aims to provide much-needed support for these students, offering various sponsorship opportunities: Donation Share: $10 Sponsorship of a Medical Student's Tuition: $3,000 per academic year for students studying specialties such as human medicine, dentistry, or pharmacy (5-6 years). Sponsorship of a Non-Medical Student's Tuition: $1,500 per academic year for students studying specialties lasting four years or less. Sponsorship of Student Housing: $1,500 for one year. Financial Support Sponsorship: $1,000 for one year. Your contributions can make a significant impact on the lives of Syrian students, helping them pursue higher education and secure a brighter future.

title: Life Campaign !
overview_text: Omar is a member of a humble family. His father was martyred in 2016 due to an airstrike by the Assad regime on the eastern neighborhoods of Aleppo, leaving his mother as the sole provider for him and his siblings. Omar miraculously survived his burns after spending more than a week in intensive care, while his mother has been struggling ever since to cover their essential expenses. Omar’s mother tries to ease her son’s pain, but her heart aches as she watches him suffer from his injuries, not knowing how to afford his treatment and medications. Even a small donation can bring relief to Omar and his mother.Hurry to contribute and help Omar recover.

title: Be With Them 2: Bringing Hope to Those in Need
overview_text:
Be With Them 2: Bringing Hope to Those in Need
"I’m now 80 years old, At my age, children should be taking care of me and easing my old age. But I have three children, the oldest is 45, and all of them have special needs." There are days when we have nothing to eat except what we get on credit... I have no source of income, nothing to ease our situation in this tent." An elderly widow living in one of the camps in northern Syria shared her story with us Widad is a widow, and her hope is in God, and then in you, to help her and ease her burden. donate to the "Be With Them" campaign to assist as many families with special needs as possible

title: A Helping Hand
overview_text: As the hard times go by, worries increase robbing peace from the lives of distressed families. This is the case of breadwinners who have accumulated debts to shops and pharmacies. Due to their harsh living conditions, these breadwinners had to buy in debt to secure the basic needs of their families. Molham Team has launched " A Helping Hand" campaign to help these families pay their debts. We aim to ease the distress and worries of them.

title: Support Tamra Al-Khair Group's Charitable Efforts
overview_text:
Support Tamra Al-Khair Group's Charitable Efforts
Tamra Al-Khair Group aims to extend a helping hand and provide assistance to displaced and needy families through charitable projects and seasonal relief campaigns. In addition, we take care of individual medical cases and orphans. Through this fund, you can donate directly to support Tamra Al-Khair’s campaigns in various implementation areas. In cooperation and coordination with the Molham Volunteer Team, you can contribute in the following ways: - **Share to feed a poor person for a family of five**: $25 - **Food basket for a family of five**: $65 - **Take care of a family’s expenses for a month**: $200 - **Share to take care of a medical condition**: $250 - **Share to public charity**: $100 - **Monthly orphan sponsorship**: $50 (You can review the orphan sponsorship page on our website to sponsor an orphan on a monthly basis.) You can also donate any other amount you deem appropriate, and we will ensure it reaches those in need. Thank you for your generosity and support!

title: Until the Last Tent: Join Us in Our Mission
overview_text:
Until the Last Tent: Join Us in Our Mission
We are proud to share the success of our initial housing projects, which have transformed the lives of many by moving them from camps to secure, comfortable apartments. However, our journey toward ending displacement and suffering is far from complete. Through our “Until the Last Tent” campaign, we aim to provide more families with the warmth and security of a real home. Join us in this crucial humanitarian mission. By contributing $5,000, you can fund an entire apartment, or by donating $200, you can purchase a construction share alongside others. Every contribution, no matter the size, helps us move a family from a tent to a stable home, offering them a chance for a brighter future. We are committed to continuing this project, ensuring that displaced individuals in Syria find the dignity and stability they deserve. Your ongoing support lights their way, providing hope and helping us build a future where everyone has a place to call home.

title: Molham House For Cancer Patients
overview_text:
Molham House For Cancer Patients
During her pregnancy, Khadija had tumour in her jaw area. It has been later diagnosed as cancer. After giving birth, she was transferred to Turkiye for treatment, leaving her baby with his young sister because her husband, who has special needs, cannot provide care for them. Currently, Khadija is staying in Molham Center for Cancer Patients in Turkiye, where her condition is closely monitored. However, her situation is critical, and doctors have indicated that even if the cancer is removed, it may return worse than before. Khadija is experienceing significant pain, inflammation, and the discomfort of dealing with a growing tumor. Supporting Molham Center for Cancer Patients can alleviate her suffering and that of many others in similar need of compassionate care.

title: Help Save Eman's Life
overview_text: A humanitarian story has reached me, and after verifying its authenticity, I am sharing it with you. Your trust in me and your continuous generosity have been instrumental in helping us transform lives and relieve the distress of many in need. Today, I am asking you to extend your kindness once more by donating to save Eman's life and fund her heart surgery. Your contribution can make a world of difference. Thank you, Ghazal Baghdadi

title: Influencers for humanity !
overview_text: In the heart of each of us, there is a pulse that aches for the children who know nothing but the sound of war in Gaza, find only destruction in Yemen, live in poverty in Sudan, and struggle to survive in Syria. Let us come together today to be their voice and light in the darkness. Your donations can be the difference between life and death, hope and despair. Let us be the hope they are waiting for.

title: Beit Al-Mouna
overview_text: Beit Al-Mouna project is a profitable development project whose proceeds are used as an endowment for humanitarian work. It employs more than 40 women who have lost their breadwinners as well as mothers of orphans. The project aims to develop these women's basic skills to produce high-quality local products and improve their marketing and production capabilities. By supporting this project, you will achieve sustainable aid for these families and ensure their needs are met through the financial returns they earn from their work.

title: Urgent Humanitarian Cases !
overview_text: Ritaj, a two-month-old infant, faces struggles far beyond her tender age. She was born with a cleft lip, an enlarged spleen and liver, and an ectopic kidney. She is fed through a tube. Her father, a daily laborer earning no more than $50 a month, is unable to provide for her specialized milk and medical treatment. The family lives in a simple room lacking basic necessities, while Ritaj spends her days crying from intense pain. She urgently needs medical tests, treatment, and ongoing care. Let us be the hand of hope that eases her pain and restores her life

title: Humanitarian Sponsorahips 2024
overview_text: A landmine disfigured his face, robbing him of his eyes and a limb❗ Abdulrahman was tending his sheep to help his father and mother make a living. Suddenly, a landmine exploded, changing the course of his life and leaving deep scars on his body. Today, Abdulrahman lives alone after the death of his parents, which compounded his tragedy. On top of this pain, he has accumulated debts and is in dire need of medical and living expenses. Abdulrahman has no one to support him in his ordeal, nor does he have an income to meet his basic needs. However, your monthly sponsorship of just $100 will be a lifeline during his tragedy. Your support will help Abdulrahman and dozens of others like him who desperately need it.A landmine disfigured his face, robbing him of his eyes and a limb❗ Abdulrahman was tending his sheep to help his father and mother make a living. Your support will help Abdulrahman and dozens of others like him who desperately need it.

title: Food Aid For The Poor 2024
overview_text:
Food Aid For The Poor 2024
For those who lost everything, time passes slowly. In northwest Syria and countries of asylum, Syrian displaced families are facing tragic conditions that some of them can't secure their food. The "Food Aid For The Poor 2024" campaign aims to change the conditions of these families by providing fresh food baskets to them. Your donation today can put a smile on the faces of children who have not experienced happiness for a long time. Whether it is a simple donation or a required "Kaffara", your contribution will reach those who need it most. The cost of the fresh food basket is $15 (vegetables + chicken or half a kilo of meat). The cost of a complete food basket is $65 (various food items).

title: Loaf Of Bread 6
overview_text: Over the long years of war and displacement, the worries and challenges of displaced people in northwest Syria have grown. Every day, they think about their lost dreams. Even securing the bread for their families has become a dream hard to achieve. To alleviate their distress, the " Loaf of Bread 6" campaign aims to provide bread for displaced and distressed families. Your donation of 12 $ can secure bread for a month to a displaced family.

title: Water for Camps 4
overview_text: In camps where water is one of the daily challenges, children walk long distances just to bring a small amount of water as families are eagerly waiting for long-delayed water supplies to arrive. The Molham Volunteering Team campaign to secure water continues to alleviate this suffering and provide clean drinking water to hundreds of families in the camps. Through this campaign, you can be part of the solution, whether by making a direct donation or by contributing to a permanent endowment by digging a water well that will provide life for generations to come. For communication and more details, you can contact us via WhatsApp: 00905367026447

title: Food Supplies Basket
overview_text: "Life has turned upside down for us, and now we long for a bite of food. Our biggest worry is how we can afford it. I miss the days of preserving food and the time I used to spend at work... But after being displaced and living in this tent, there's no room to even think about storing food. It has become a luxury." With these words, Amal shared her story with us. The lump in her throat and the tear in her eye were enough to convey the state they are in, after their circumstances changed and their lives were turned upside down. For Amal and hundreds of similar families, we launched the campaign #FOOD_SUPPLIES-BASKET By donating today, with any amount, you can become their hope again and help us provide essential supplies, so we can try to bring them joy and stand by their side.

title: A Heart Joy
overview_text: Children's laughs are priceless. Their happiness makes our world lovelier. Molham Team has launched a campaign to share joyful events with displaced people in Northwest Syria. Your support of the campaign can have a significant change in their lives and help them have happier days.

title: Small Business Development
overview_text: In northern Syria, where dreams are distant and opportunities are scarce, we launch the campaign #Support_Small_Projects. To bring dreams closer and to change the reality for hundreds of families. 💙

title: Urgent Medical Cases
overview_text: "I watch her suffering, and my heart aches for her. She’s so young and doesn’t even understand what pain means." In a heartbreaking tone, Rylas’s mother shared her daughter’s struggles since birth. Rylas was born with ichthyosis, a condition that causes severe skin scaling and intense pain, overwhelming her tiny body’s ability to cope. Currently, the newborn is in an incubator, needing various medical supplies, tests, and specialized nutrition. Unfortunately, her family's difficult circumstances prevent them from securing the care she needs to ease her pain. Little Rylas urgently needs your support!

title: Soul Campaign
overview_text:
Jouri on the Ventilator… Don’t Leave Her Alone

details_text:
Jouri on the Ventilator… Don’t Leave Her Alone

Baby Jouri, the youngest and the joy of the family that never came to be complete, was immediately taken after a difficult C-section to be placed on a ventilator in intensive care.

Her mother is still under the effects of the operation and its pain, unaware yet of her baby’s critical condition. Jouri is in the ICU, while her parents are overwhelmed with worry — the mother exhausted, and the father burdened and weary, not knowing how to cover the hospital costs and expenses.

Your donation of $500 can cover the hospital bills and ease this family’s distress. Do not hesitate to help.

title: Help Feed Families in Gaza
overview_text:
Help Feed Families in Gaza
Families in Gaza are facing unimaginable hardships, struggling to provide even the most basic necessities for their children. In response to this dire humanitarian crisis, we are launching a food basket campaign to deliver essential food supplies to thousands of families in desperate need. With a donation of just $30, you can provide a family with a complete food basket, filled with staple items and fresh vegetables. This basket will sustain them for several days, offering relief from the constant struggle against hunger and deprivation. Your contribution can bring hope and nourishment to those who need it most. Together, we can make a difference.

title: Fight Famine in Gaza: Provide a Lifeline
overview_text:
Fight Famine in Gaza: Provide a Lifeline
In Gaza, thousands of our people are facing a severe famine that threatens their lives every day. For small families and innocent children, finding enough food to survive has become a desperate struggle. Many are unable to secure even a single meal to get them through the day. In response to this urgent need, we are launching a food donation campaign to be a lifeline for those in need. Through this campaign, we aim to bring hope and relief by providing hot meals at the low cost of just $2 per meal, which is enough to feed two people. Your contribution can make a real difference in the lives of those who are suffering. Be the caring hand that helps keep them from the brink of hunger.

title: Help Gaza's Displaced: Alleviate Their Suffering
overview_text:
Help Gaza's Displaced: Alleviate Their Suffering
A bare-footed little girl carries her injured younger sister to the hospital for foot treatment. Though young, she walked for kilometers, persistently carrying her sister for a full hour despite her fatigue. Tens of thousands of children in Gaza urgently need funds for medical care, clothing, and essential supplies. Your donation, no matter how small, to the Gaza Children’s Campaign will help alleviate their suffering. Click here to watch the heart-wrenching video and donate.

title: Support Gaza's Orphans
overview_text: It's incredibly difficult to be a refugee in search of safety, only to be bombed and left buried under the rubble.” Mariam and Moussa's home in Gaza was hit by an airstrike, resulting in the loss of their father. Now, they are orphans, cared for by their mother without any support. They were forced to leave their destroyed home and seek shelter in a school, trying to cope with their fear of the ongoing bombings and devastation. However, the school was bombed last night, and the children were pulled from the rubble with external injuries on their fragile bodies. Our children desperately need your love and compassion to help ease their pain and suffering and to lift them from their challenging circumstances. Your support of just $100 can make a significant difference in their lives during this difficult time.

title: Water for our people in Gaza!
overview_text:
Water for our people in Gaza!
Amid the rubble of besieged Gaza, the cries of thirsty children echo through the streets. As the assault intensifies and resources dwindle, young ones line up in long queues, hoping to secure a few drops of water for their exhausted families. This is why we are launching a campaign to secure water for our besieged people. For just $2, you can make the difference between life and death, as this amount is enough to provide drinking water for an entire family for one day.

title: Zakat Al-Mal for people in Gaza
overview_text:
Zakat Al-Mal for people in Gaza
**Do you want to deliver your Zakat to people in Gaza?** Every day that passes in Gaza sees many martyrs and wounded, including children, women, and the elderly. Hundreds lose their basic means of life and find themselves facing daily struggles that exceed their ability to endure. **Our need to donate our Zakat surpasses their need for it, and we always seek out those who are truly deserving of this Zakat.** You have the opportunity to donate your Zakat and ensure it reaches those who deserve it in Gaza, to alleviate part of their suffering and stand by their side. Be a source of hope and change in their lives. Your Zakat donation is a humanitarian and religious duty that could change the lives of our afflicted people in Gaza.

title: Supporting Medical Facilities in Gaza
overview_text:
Supporting Medical Facilities in Gaza
**"Sick and Wounded - Numbers Written and Reported Every Day"** Have the injured and wounded become mere numbers we read about, leaving us helpless to assist them? Hospitals are being deliberately destroyed, and health centers lack the necessary equipment to prevent our people in Gaza from enduring and receiving treatment. Let us play our part in standing by our people there, and contribute to providing for their primary needs, especially the medical ones. A child screams in pain, and a man cries in despair over his child; this is the situation in Gaza right now. There is a significant shortage in health centers and field hospitals amidst the large-scale escalation the city is experiencing. **Your donation may save a life or rescue a family. Allah Almighty said: "And whoever saves one life, it is as if he had saved mankind entirely."** **Be a support for them and hasten to donate to save their lives.**

title: Heal A Broken Heart
overview_text: We frequently encounter tragic cases in urgent need of help. A woman reached out to us because her husband is detained due to his inability to pay residency fees. Another woman needs assistance to cover her childbirth expenses. A man seeks help to pay off his debt, or he will face prosecution. A student requires support for her final tuition payment to graduate. These cases are sent to us via email, and we verify them through our field team. We strive, with your help, to secure the necessary aid. Your donation, no matter the amount, will help ease their burden and bring relief during these catastrophic times in the region.

title: For a better tomorrow !
overview_text:
For a better tomorrow !
A lifetime dream is achieved step by step until one reaches their goal. Big dreams fill the heart of every student as they strive to achieve them, despite the harsh circumstances of their lives. The dream of a primary school student is no less important than that of a university student, but in the end, the journey becomes more difficult, leaving them helpless in facing the challenges of continuing their path. We have launched the "Better Tomorrow" campaign to symbolize a brighter future for students, coinciding with the beginning of September—a month of new beginnings for every dream. It's the time for children to prepare for their school year and for young men and women to return to their university classrooms with excitement. Don't hesitate to donate to them. Your little contribution can change a student's life for the better and support them in continuing their journey. A gentle touch from you is enough to lift the burden off their shoulders!

title: For their hearts
overview_text: "Afraid my heart will stop, and I’ll be deprived of the call to prayer" There is no greater fear for Uncle Abdul Razzaq than this. For thirty years, his melodious voice has filled the village with every call to prayer, bringing peace and serenity to everyone who hears it. Today, however, Uncle Abdul Razzaq is suffering from a heart attack, and after being rushed to the hospital, it was discovered that he has a myocardial infarction and urgently needs a heart stent procedure to avoid even greater risks to his health. Our elders, whose mere presence gives us comfort, face daily struggles with their health. That’s why we’ve launched the “For Their Hearts” campaign, aiming to perform two crucial procedures—cardiac catheterization and the placement of heart stents. Each catheterization costs $65, and each stent costs $200. Your donation will give their hearts the chance to keep beating with love, easing the suffering of many patients. Donate today and be their healing balm. 🙏🏻

title: Urgent Response - 2024
overview_text: “Her screams and fear have been with me all the time. Every time I see her in that state, my heart aches. We escaped the shelling to a shelter to keep her safe, but I didn’t know that what awaited us would be even harder and more painful” •⁠ ⁠Huda’s mother Huda is a Syrian refugee child in Lebanon. She has lost her smile, engulfed in pain and burns that make her endure a suffering greater than her age due to third-degree burns resulting from the bombardment. Our little Huda needs us now more than ever. We can help alleviate some of her pain by covering the costs of her treatment. Your donation, no matter how small, will be the balm that heals her wounds and brings back her sweet smile. The plight of refugees left behind in Lebanon is well-known, and it is our collective duty to stand by their side.

title: Urgent Humanitarian Cases
overview_text: want my dad to get better." Islam's gaze and her tears tell the whole story: Her pain, her anguish, and her constant fear of losing her first love and source of safety! At such a young age, she's experiencing pain far beyond her years, and her heart is breaking for her hero and first love—her sick father who frequently loses consciousness. Any donation can help Islam and her family stand strong during these difficult times.

title: Winter Appeal For GAZA
overview_text: In the harsh cold and heavy rain, winter has descended upon our people in Gaza. All they have are worn-out tents that neither shield them from the cold nor stop the rain from seeping through! They live a reality imposed upon them by war, one we have endured and suffered for over a decade. Understanding the sting of cold and the cruelty of winter on those in tents, we launch the "Winter Appeal for Gaza" campaign from Gaza's camps, striving to provide heating supplies and winter clothing for our resilient, displaced people. Your donation is your share in their survival, their lifeline, and their hope every hour!

title: Give Them Warmth 2024 !
overview_text:
Give Them Warmth 2024 !
Winter arrives with its fierce face and unforgiving claws, and this is what the residents of the camps endure year after year. The issue is not just the constant feeling of bitter cold, but also witnessing their tents collapse in the storms, their belongings ruined by the rain, and their children struggling against the shadow of death. Therefore, we launch the „Give Warmth“ campaign to provide the necessary heating supplies for those in need within Syria and in refugee areas. Your donation is the lifeline they await, and their hope in every moment!

title: Children’s winter clothes 2024
overview_text: A small family lives in a tent, facing the difficult challenges of the cold season every day. Each morning, the child has to confront the drop in temperatures, causing him to shiver and lose feeling in his extremities. However, with your simple donation of $20, you can make a significant difference in his life! This amount will provide him with shoes, a coat, a scarf, a hat, gloves, socks, and pants. Your contribution to this campaign gives the child a greater chance of protection from the dangers posed by this harsh weather, allowing him to feel more comfortable and secure.

title: My Right to Learn
overview_text: Every great dream begins with a single step, the first step toward success. Many children and young adults have been deprived of their most fundamental right, education. Whether it’s a child in school or a young adult pursuing higher education, both stages are equally important. Despite their difficult circumstances, these students hold onto big dreams. With courage in their hearts, they strive to overcome hardship and pursue their ambitions through education; a basic right they deserve. Your kind donations to My Right to Learn campaign can be the hopes for a brighter future. Don’t hesitate to give. Be the reason someone takes their first step toward success.

title: Urgent Medical Cases !
overview_text: What began as a moment of joy turned into heartbreak when little Mohammed and his twin were born. Both babies were delivered with underdeveloped lungs, facing severe pain and difficulty breathing. One of them even required a surgical procedure to place a drain in his abdomen. The family is struggling desperately to cover the cost of their treatment but has reached their limit. Your donations can provide the care these babies need and give them a chance to live and grow with their family. Please don’t hesitate to ease their suffering!

title: Make It Your Charity
overview_text: Allah SWT says “The example of those who spend their wealth in the way of Allah is like a seed [of grain] which grows seven spikes; in each spike is a hundred grains. And Allah multiplies [His reward] for whom He wills. And Allah is all-Encompassing and Knowing” (2:261) Allah has given His servants the gift of charity to ensure that no one facing hardship is left alone. The true power of charity lies not only in how it supports those in need but also in its profound impact on the giver; cleansing the heart, erasing sins, and bringing countless blessings. This campaign is dedicated to extend your generosity, with all contributions going directly to support displaced families in northern Syria, refugees in surrounding countries, and families in Gaza and Lebanon. Let us seize this opportunity to earn the reward and blessings from Allah SWT. “Indeed, those men and women who give in charity and lend to Allah a good loan will have it multiplied for them, and they will have an honourable reward.” (57:18)

title: Corneal Patients in Syria
overview_text: Aya… two tiny eyes, engulfed in darkness. Aya has not yet reached her third birthday, yet darkness reached her before she could. A cataract has covered her innocent eyes, and months of treatment have borne no hope… She has completely lost her sight, and darkness now dwells in her little eyes. Her only remaining chance to regain her vision is through a corneal transplant and an artificial lens in her right eye. Aya and many other children like her are waiting for you… to bring back the colors of life to their world, and surround their childhood with a new light.

title: Emergency Response For NW Syria
overview_text:
Emergency Response For NW Syria
The most devastating humanitarian crisis in years is unfolding in northwest Syria. Over 8,000 families have been displaced once again due to relentless bombings, finding themselves trapped in a cycle of suffering. These families are facing harsh winter conditions, lacking shelter to protect them from the storms, food to alleviate their children's hunger, and heating sources. Meanwhile, children, women, and the elderly are forced to sleep on the streets In response, we are launching an Emergency Relief Campaign and are working around the clock to alleviate their suffering and provide essential aid. Join us in rescuing the most vulnerable families. every donation, no matter how small, can make a significant difference in their lives.

title: For Aleppo !
overview_text: And Who Will Be There for People Other Than Their Own? With the repeated aerial bombardments by the forces of tyranny and oppression targeting residential neighborhoods and civilian gatherings in the recently liberated city of Aleppo, our presence and urgent response to provide treatment and emergency aid and food kits and winter supplies to the people became an absolute necessity. For this reason, we are launching the campaign "[for Aleppo]," through which we will take it upon ourselves to secure urgent medical and emergency supplies, as well as the essential medications that are currently unavailable in the region. Be a support and aid to our people, for they are in dire need of us today.

title: Your Support Brings Warmth
overview_text: Your Support Brings Warmth: A Lifeline for Gaza The people of Gaza face dire conditions where even the basic necessities of a dignified life are out of reach. This urgent reality makes your support more critical than ever. Your Support Brings Warmth steps in to provide: - Hot meals to sustain families during the most challenging times. - Winter clothing for children, adults, and women, offering warmth and security. - Heaters and shelters to protect families from the biting winter cold. Through the Malak Fund Program, the Children's Paradise Foundation is launching this campaign to ease the suffering of Gaza’s residents during the harsh winter season. Why Gaza? Gaza endures a crippling blockade and a severe shortage of essential resources, making winter an overwhelming challenge. Many families are forced to live in tents or the remains of destroyed homes, where warmth is a luxury they cannot afford. How Can You Help? Your donation can change lives. By contributing, you can: - Bring hope and comfort to families in distress. - Provide essential warmth for children, who are the most vulnerable in these harsh conditions. - Improve the living conditions of families in urgent need. Be the warmth they need this winter—join us in the Your Support Brings Warmth campaign.

title: Wasil Initiative!
overview_text: Through the Wasil Initiative, you can support your loved ones in Aleppo via the Molham Team. If you have family members or loved ones in urgent need of help in Aleppo, you can now provide support easily: - Donate the amount you wish to send. - Fill out the form with details about the case you want to assist by clicking here. - Within 72 hours, the Molham Team will deliver the assistance directly as financial support. Important Note: We prioritize the most urgent cases, such as medical treatments or cancer medication, to ensure help reaches those in dire need as quickly as possible. Other cases will be addressed gradually based on need and urgency. If the team determines that the case is not critical or does not meet the criteria, the donated amount will be refunded. Let your generosity touch their hearts. Molham is in Aleppo for you and your loved ones.

title: A New Homeland Initiative
overview_text: Dr. Bara Tayara, along with a group of young men and women from Idlib, Aleppo, and the recently liberated cities, is launching this campaign to work on the ground and provide support to the people within a national and humanitarian framework.

title: Bread for Every Syrian Family
overview_text:
Bread for Every Syrian Family
With our joy for the liberation of all our Syrian lands and the cessation of temporary bakeries, we are currently working tirelessly to secure bread for our people through all possible means. Your donation can make this possible.
details_text: With our joy for the liberation of all our Syrian lands and the cessation of temporary bakeries, we are currently working tirelessly to secure bread for our people through all possible means. Your donation can make this possible.

title: Loyalty to the Detainees!
overview_text: Sednaya… a name soaked in blood, fear, and tales of horror and brutality. A dark abyss that has swallowed tens of thousands of detainees, both above and beneath the ground. Today, thousands of free innocent detainees who thought they had been forgotten or counted among the dead. They emerge with frail and exhausted bodies, scarred and wounded, suffering from mental illnesses. And to what reality do they return? Homeless and without income, left to sleep on cold winter streets, facing harsh living conditions, severe psychological trauma, and even the inability to recognize their families due to memory loss. It is our duty—at the very least—to extend our arms to our detained brothers and sisters, to ease their suffering and provide them with the most essential needs during this critical phase, starting with medical and basic living supplies. Donate now!

title: The National Initiative for Syria
overview_text:
The National Initiative for Syria
The land is ours, even if it has been taken from us; for within it, our seeds were sown over a thousand years ago, and our roots stretch deep within its cracks. Yet, five decades under the Assad regime have left behind countless years of suffering, tearing apart the fabric of Syrian society, robbing an entire generation of youth, and destroying the nation’s infrastructure. This dark legacy has brought the decline of education and healthcare, displaced millions into tents, and stripped our land of its beauty. Once a vibrant tourist destination, Syria has become a land marked by danger and insecurity. Today, we rise to tell the story of stolen years and wasted lives. Today, displaced generations return to rebuild and restore. Driven by an unwavering belief that Syria is the cradle of civilizations, we pledge to reclaim its brilliance, restore its glory, and build its future with determination and hope. With this vision, we launch the campaign "We Will Rebuild It" — the National Initiative for Syria. We call upon experts and entrepreneurs to invest in this country, which needs us now more than ever. Together, with your efforts and ours, we will breathe life back into liberated Syria. Let us give back what was stolen, rebuild what injustice has destroyed, and revive hope in weary souls. Take the initiative today and donate—no matter the size of your contribution—to help restore the years stolen from Syria. Donate now and be part of rebuilding our homeland!

title: Saif in Syria
overview_text: 15 years later, Saif is finally able to come back to Syria. But this is not just a normal visit. Saif is teaming up with Molham Team to help raise money for Syrians in need. Saif can’t do this alone, however, with your help, we can reach our goal. Donate now to be a part of this historic journey and help make Syrian lives better.

title: With Education, We Thrive
overview_text: Out of the rubble, Anas dared to dream again. His city was under siege. His father died under torture. And just when it seemed like life couldn’t take any more from him, a missile hit their home in Idlib. Anas watched his little brother die in front of him. He survived the blast, but with devastating injuries. His hand was gone. Shrapnel had pierced his brain. But Anas chose to rise. With the help of Molham School, he found his way back to the classroom. The pain in his head never really goes away, and writing with his other hand is a daily struggle, but his determination is unwavering. He refuses to let go of his future. Anas’s story is not the only one. It speaks for thousands of children who still carry hope in their hearts, even when everything around them says they shouldn’t. What they lack in resources, they… Read more

overview_text:
Feeding Families In Need 2025

To help ease their burden, we recently launched "Feeding Families in Need" campaign to provide meals and food packages to those who need them most. Your support can bring hope to families facing tough challenges and economic hardships. You can also donate your expiation (kafarah), which will be used to provide food for those who qualify. - $15 Fresh Basket: Includes fresh vegetables and chicken, enough to feed a family for two days. - $50 Essential Food Basket: Includes basics like legumes, pantry staples, oil, and canned goods, enough to last a family two weeks.

title: Gaza School
overview_text: Molham Village in the Azaz countryside has become a refuge for hundreds of families, including orphaned children, all dreaming of continuing their education. To support this dream, Gaza School was established, now providing a safe learning space for these students, many of whom have lost their families during the war. With just $25, you can sponsor a student for an entire month and help them work towards a brighter future.

title: Emergency response to Deir Ezzor!
overview_text:
Emergency response to Deir Ezzor!
Deir Ezzor, a city that’s been through so much—oppression, displacement, and tough living conditions—has always stepped up to help others in northern Syria, even when they barely had enough for themselves. Now, it’s our turn to support them. We’re sending the first humanitarian convoys with essentials like flour, food, and medical supplies to help hospitals, healthcare workers, and the people who need it most. You can support this campaign by donating through the direct link or providing in-kind contributions to the convoy from within Syria. title: Emergency Humanitarian Cases - 2025
overview_text:
Emergency Humanitarian Cases - 2025
Under the tattered cover of a tent that neither shields from the scorching heat of summer nor the biting cold of winter, Widad and her family live a life that feels like a journey with no destination, trapped between poverty and despair. But this tragedy was only the beginning. When their little girl, Widad, opened her eyes for the first time, she unknowingly brought another heartbreak to her family—she was born with hydrocephalus. A severe brain condition that nearly cost her life. The hospital became her only world, where she knew nothing but the beeping of breathing machines and the trembling touch of her mother’s hands as she tried to give her warmth and hope, even though hope itself seemed to slip away each day. She underwent a critical surgery to implant a brain shunt, but her journey is far from over. Widad still needs continuous treatment and daily medication. She needs a chance to live, yet her family struggles just to afford the basics of survival.

overview_text:
Help for a New Beginning in Syria
Help for a New Beginning in Syria Building the Future Together Dar Al Farah seeks to bring joy back to Syria. After years of suffering, the country needs our support. Homes have been destroyed, livelihoods wiped out, but hope remains. With your donation, we can help provide people with a roof over their heads and a new chance at life. Let us make the dream of rebuilding a reality together. Every contribution makes a difference toward a better and brighter future. Thank you for bringing hope and joy.

title: Half Century Ramadan
overview_text: The streets are filled with the scent of spices, the call to prayer (Adhan) echoes through Syria, and families gather around modest tables—but for too many, the plates remain empty. After half a century of hardship, this Ramadan marks a turning point. It is the first Ramadan in a liberated Syria that many dream of seeing whole again, yet thousands still face hunger, loss, and uncertainty. The traditions of togetherness, of breaking bread at Iftar, remain a distant memory for families displaced, for children orphaned by war, for the elderly left to fend for themselves. This is why we are launching Half Century Ramadan. A campaign not just to provide meals but to restore the dignity of shared moments. To ensure that when the call to Maghrib is heard, no one has to wonder where their next meal will come from. Through this initiative, Malakeh, a Syrian chef who has carried her country’s flavours across the world, returns to Syria to cook for the people who need it most. Together with our partners, we aim to deliver 60,000 meals to orphans, widows, and struggling families. Every plate shared is a message: You are not forgotten. This Ramadan, let’s pass the plate forward. Donate now. Be part of a Ramadan that rewrites the story of resilience.

title: Campaign to Restore Syrian Schools
overview_text:
Campaign to Restore Syrian Schools
Education is the foundation of a brighter future, yet countless Syrian children are being deprived of their right to learn due to the destruction of schools caused by years of war. Classrooms once filled with dreams and ambition now stand in ruins, leaving children with nowhere to study, grow, or hope for a better tomorrow. With your support, we can rebuild and restore schools providing children with a safe environment, proper learning materials, and the opportunity to reclaim their education. Every contribution helps bring back desks, books, teachers, and most importantly, hope. 🔹 **Join us in rebuilding the future of Syria!** 🔹 **Give children the education they deserve!** 🔹 **Be a part of this journey—every donation makes a difference!** Together, we can **restore hope, rebuild schools, and reshape the future of an entire generation.** Will you be a part of this mission?

title: Life Savers 4
overview_text: A single hardship can make life incredibly difficult and break one’s spirit—so how can a young girl face such challenges on her own? Iftikhar was born with a condition affecting her eyes: her right eye is completely clouded, and her left eye struggles with vision. This has impacted her academic performance and her relationships with others, as she is sometimes subjected to bullying. Let’s extend a helping hand to Iftikhar so she can continue her educational journey with hope—and achieve her dream! Any donation can shape the future of Iftikhar and hundreds of other children. Contribute to sponsoring a student and earn the reward of an ongoing charity (Sadaqah Jariyah). In the last ten nights of Ramadan, you can sponsor Iftikhar’s education for a full year with just $300—and support the education of many other students as well!

title: Ramadan Relief
overview_text: In this blessed month, when hearts are filled with faith, a small tent is lost in darkness… Inside, little Nour rests in her mother Hayat’s arms. She is weak from illness and hunger, needing medicine, diapers, and food. But poverty has taken everything from them. As the sun sets, our children enjoy their iftar meals, while Nour’s tent remains cold and empty. No electricity, no warmth, and no helping hand to ease her pain… Just $300 can give Nour and her family the basic needs to make their days a little easier in this blessed time.

title: Paying off the debts_Ramadan 2025.
overview_text:
Paying off the debts_Ramadan 2025.
We reached out to the family of the martyr Fahd after hearing his story and seeing posts about his bravery and subsequent martyrdom while defusing mines planted by the regime in the countryside of Idlib. He wanted to dismantle the mines so people could return to their homes from the camps. Fahd lived as a displaced person after being injured in an airstrike in 2016. He was a volunteer schoolteacher with expertise in mine dismantling. Despite his debts, he left everything behind and volunteered for this mission until he was martyred. His brother told us that Fahd had debts amounting to $2,500, including the debt he incurred to purchase the demining device. Through this email, we aim to show our solidarity with his family, sponsor his four children, and settle his debts. This is the least we can do for a man who sacrificed for us and for his country.

Because Ramadan is a month of giving and compassion, and because kindness always brings us together, we are launching the 2025 Food Parcels Campaign to extend a helping hand to those in need. Your contribution of just $60 will provide a complete food parcel containing essential items that can sustain a family in need throughout the holy month. With a simple donation, you can be the reason behind a family's happiness. Let’s ensure that no night passes in this sacred month without bringing a smile to someone's face through your generosity."

title: Iftar Meals - Ramadan 2025
overview_text:
Iftar Meals - Ramadan 2025
The Prophet (ﷺ) said, "He who provides a fasting person something with which to break his fast, will earn the same reward as the one who was observing the fast, without diminishing in any way the reward of the latter." The joy of Iftar is complete when everyone has a share of goodness. However, some families do not have enough to prepare a warm meal after a long day of fasting, waiting for a helping hand to allow them to experience Ramadan as it should be. For just $30, you can provide a fresh food basket filled with vegetables, fruits, and essential ingredients that families need to prepare their daily meals. A basket you prepare for them, earning you the reward of their fasting and Iftar.

You can give your Zakat al-Fitr from the beginning of the holy month for yourself and your family. Our field team will distribute it during the last week of Ramadan until before the Eid al-Fitr prayer in the form of essential food supplies, including rice, bulgur, lentils, and freekeh, sourced from local staples. title: Ramadan in Gaza
overview_text: Let your generosity in Ramadan reach our people in Gaza. Thousands of families, exhausted by the hardships of war and dire living conditions, are struggling during the holy month. Molham Volunteering Team in Gaza is working around the clock to ease the suffering of displaced families within the strip. They are providing essential needs through the charity kitchen, distributing food supplies (including vegetable baskets and canned goods), delivering water, and assisting urgent humanitarian cases. You can also donate and contribute to alleviating their hardship. Additionally, we are striving to cover the needs of some medical cases evacuated for treatment outside Gaza, whether through medical expenses or living costs. Remember, even your smallest contribution makes a difference.

title: Molham's First Campaign in Jableh
overview_text:
Molham's First Campaign in Jableh
As the holy month of Ramadan begins, the Molham Team is launching a special campaign for the people of Jableh—our very first campaign for the city of Molham. Through this initiative, we aim to provide food parcels and financial support to hundreds of families in the city, in collaboration with the Al-Birr and Social Services Association. The idea behind this campaign is for local merchants and expatriates to donate any amount, while the Molham Team will match the donations until we reach a total of $100,000. For example, if you donate $50, which covers the cost of one food basket, the Molham Team will contribute an additional $50, securing food for two families instead of one. If the campaign reaches $100,000, the Molham Team will allocate another $100,000 to support the initiative. You can donate from abroad through the Molham Team website and designated banks listed there. For donations from within Jableh, you can use Syriatel Cash, MTN Cash, or contact us via WhatsApp at +90 501 140 2222.

title: Together for Gaza&Syria
overview_text: The suffering of Palestine and Syria were once headline news although their struggles have faded from the world's attention, but their pain has not disappeared. Families are still homeless, children are still hungry, and entire communities are still fighting for survival—yet the world has largely moved on. With your donation, we can provide food for the hungry, medical aid for the wounded, and shelter for the homeless. Every donation, no matter the amount, will provide hope where it is needed the most. As we enter the blessed month of Ramadan, we have an opportunity to make a real difference. The Prophet Muhammad (ﷺ) said: "The best charity is that given in Ramadan." (Tirmidhi). Be sure to support your suffering brothers and sisters this Ramadan. Let’s remind them that they are not alone. Donate today—because their pain is real, and so is our power to help.

title: From Flint To Syria !
overview_text:
From Flint To Syria !
Children's Dream in Syria: Education and a Bright Future
In our country, Syria, children dream of continuing their education to achieve a bright and prosperous future. Unfortunately, their dreams often clash with a reality filled with difficulties and challenges. Yet, their spirits remain full of hope.
Recognizing that education is both a right and a tool for building nations, we, the residents of Ohio, are launching a fundraising campaign aimed at renovating schools in Syria to help Internally Displaced Persons (IDPs) return home.
This initiative primarily focuses on schools in cities and neighborhoods experiencing the return of refugees and displaced people. By ensuring these schools have what they need, we aim to gradually return children to their classrooms, securing a bright future for them and for our country.
Every donation, no matter how small, contributes to building the future!

details_text:
📢 The "Molhamiyou Al-Dakhil" Campaign – Continuing the Path of Giving 💙

The people of Palestine inside have always been among the most responsive to doing good. Over the years, your generous donations have helped save the lives of hundreds in need and brought smiles to the faces of thousands of orphans and vulnerable children.

The residential buildings and villages established in the streets and neighborhoods of northern Syria stand as a testament to your generosity, as the people of Palestine inside have played a vital role in ending the suffering of tent dwellers entirely.

🔹 Today, we launch the "Molham in Palestine Campaign" to continue this journey of goodness

We are collecting your donations and Zakat throughout this blessed month to deliver them to the most deserving cases, including those in urgent humanitarian need, internally displaced persons, and refugees.

🌟 Ways You Can Contribute to This Cause:

  • 📦 Ramadan Food Basket – $60
  • 🍏 Fresh Food Basket – $30
  • 🍽 Iftar Meal for a Family – $10
  • 📚 Sponsorship of a Student – $100
  • 💙 Sponsorship of a Humanitarian Case & Crisis Relief – $100

Additionally, you can donate your Zakat al-Fitr or Zakat al-Mal directly through designated campaigns within the Zakat Fund, and we will ensure it reaches those in need during this blessed month.

💰 You can also contribute with any amount that suits you through our official donation channels via the team’s website or our list of representatives inside Palestine.

✅ Be part of making a difference – your generosity can bring hope and relief to those in need this Ramadan!

title: Victory Festival in Proud Homs.
overview_text:
Victory Festival in Proud Homs.
For a moment we have long dreamed of… it will come true in Homs, the capital of the Syrian revolution. Join us at the **Victory Festival** with the revolutionary artist **Wasfi Al-Maasrani** on **Friday, April 4, 2025, at 8:30 PM** at **Homs Municipal Stadium**. An artist who sang at the very beginning of the revolution, his voice joined the voices of the martyrs and reached every true revolutionary home. Be with us on a day when voices reunite with memories!

title: Contribute to Restoring a Mosque in Ramadan
overview_text:
Contribute to Restoring a Mosque in Ramadan
The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Whoever builds a mosque for the sake of Allah, even as small as a bird’s nest, Allah will build for him a house in Paradise."(Narrated by Ibn Majah). How many mosques in Syria once brought hearts together, only to become shattered walls and painful silence? These mosques, where the calls to prayer and worship once echoed, now need your help to be restored as beacons of light, knowledge, and faith. Ramadan is the month of giving—make your donation to a lasting charity that revives mosques destroyed by oppression and provides worshippers with a place to gather once again. Contribute now, so the call to prayer may rise once more in the skies of Syria!

title: One Nation Campaign.
overview_text: After the recent events and attacks by the remnants of the regime, the people of the coast are facing difficult conditions, and we are here to stand by them. Today, we launch a campaign to assist the affected civilians and provide them with urgent humanitarian support. We aim to secure immediate and direct aid, ensuring essential life necessities for the residents. Your donation will help us reach as many families as possible in the coastal region. Donate now! every contribution matters in these critical moments!

title: Supporting the Wounded and Families of the Fallen Security Forces.
overview_text:
Supporting the Wounded and Families of the Fallen Security Forces.
Our country is dear to us... and so are the sacrifices of its people! Our nation could never forget those by whose hands victory was achieved—the ones who endured fourteen years in camps, under bombardment and the shadow of death. And yet, at the moment of triumph, they did not turn to celebrations but instead dedicated themselves to our protection, staying vigilant to ensure our safety and security. Today, they have given their lives for our homeland without hesitation, leaving behind families and loved ones. As we remember their sacrifices, we also pledge never to abandon their families or neglect their needs. Therefore, we are launching the "Hand in Hand" campaign to support the wounded members of the General Security forces and extend a helping hand to their children. Our goal is to provide immediate and direct assistance, ensuring that the families of these dedicated servicemen receive the essential support they need during this critical period so that they can continue safeguarding our beloved nation.

overview_text: In the holy month of Ramadan, the month of generosity and giving, let us share our tables with families in the camps. During the month of Ramadan, thousands of Syrians in the camps face difficulty in securing their breakfast. With rising prices and scarcity of resources, securing the needs for Ramadan has become a heavy burden on many families. But we can make a difference! This campaign is to share breakfast tables with our people in the camps. You can share the meal you want with a family in need.

title: Wishes 6 - Mothers Day Campaign !
overview_text:
Wishes 6 - Mothers Day Campaign !
To those who have given their dearest for the freedom of their homeland, to those who stood with overflowing tears and heavy hearts, comforting the wounded and uplifting the weary, to those to whom we owe our victory… to the mothers of the martyrs. For them, we launch this campaign—"Wishes"—to stand by their side on Mother’s Day, to steal a brief visit that fills us with inspiration and love, and to fulfill part of the heavy trust the martyrs have left upon our shoulders. We will honor their mothers, provide for their needs, and offer them flowers and endless gratitude. We have vowed to be devoted children to the mothers of the martyrs, and today, we shall not break our promise.

overview_text:
To the Mothers of the Martyrs
To those who carried pain in their hearts without complaint, to those who shed tears in silence yet stood tall, to those who bid farewell to their dearest sons at the gates of martyrdom without breaking… To the great mothers of Syria, the mothers of our noble martyrs.
In a few days, it will be the first Mother’s Day for Syrian mothers who sacrificed their beloved sons for our homeland, now free. To them, we dedicate this campaign—to stand with them on this special day, to fulfill part of the heavy duty left upon our shoulders by the martyrs, to honor their mothers, provide for their needs, and offer them flowers and boundless gratitude.
350 of Syria’s finest young men gave their lives to protect us and our people.
, to be the family they lost, and to grant their hearts strength in these difficult times.
Contribute what you can… for perhaps a mother’s prayer in these blessed days will lift a hardship from your life!

title: Educate to Rebuild
overview_text: Together, to Sponsor 50 Orphaned Students and Secure Annual Sponsorship for 50 Orphaned Students. Because we believe that education is the foundation of everything and that it is a right for every child... And because education is a means to turn pain into hope. When we sponsor an orphaned student, we do not only provide them with an opportunity to learn, but we also open doors to their future. We give them the tools they need to build their lives with dignity and strength, and to become a cornerstone for rebuilding and prospering their country. This is our collective opportunity to make this month a month of giving and goodness, and to extend this generosity to our orphaned students. How Can You Contribute? $25 USD monthly covers the educational costs of an orphan student. $250 USD ensures their education continues for an entire year. Donate any amount to support their educational journey.

title: A Day of Mercy !
overview_text:
A Day of Mercy !
This campaign is dedicated to urgent and emergency cases, and is not limited to just one individual. The uncle told us when we visited him at the hospital: "They threw me on the sidewalk because I couldn’t afford the treatment." This man was detained for 8 years, many of which he spent in an underground solitary cell. Later, he had one of his fingers amputated in Sednaya Prison due to untreated diabetes. We received news of his case while he was in the hospital, completely unable to cover the cost of treatment. His foot became severely infected due to lack of medical care. He urgently needs $1,000 for treatment before his condition worsens.

title: Eid Clothes Campaign
overview_text: This Eid is unlike any other… It is the first Eid after the victory of the revolution, an Eid that blossoms in the land of Syria, which has regained its dignity. However, there are children whose smiles were stolen by war for far too long, and this Eid, we will bring them back. For them, the “Eid Clothes Campaign” campaign comes as a lifeline of joy, restoring the festive spirit they have been deprived of. We will work to provide Eid clothes and gifts for hundreds of children in northern Syria, refugee-hosting countries, and Gaza, giving them the moments of happiness they truly deserve. With just $40, you can gift a child new clothes, allowing them to experience the true joy of Eid. Stay tuned for heartwarming moments of laughter and joy from our children!

title: Eid Desserts
overview_text: Eid comes to bring joy and happiness to every home, uniting families and children in the spirit of celebration and hope. But in the camps of northern Syria and Syrian cities, Eid returns to find many still struggling with the hardships of displacement—a struggle that began with their forced migration and has yet to end. Every year, we launch this campaign to reach hundreds of families, transforming sorrow into joy and despair into hope. With just $10, you can help bring the spirit of Eid to a displaced family by providing them with traditional Eid sweets. Eid is joy—don’t forget those in the camps from its happiness!

title: Relief a Family !
overview_text: Ismail, a nine-year-old boy, spends his days in the hospital, bravely battling cancer with patience and pain. He once lived a peaceful childhood in Syria—until illness turned his world upside down. His mother had to leave behind his siblings and father, carrying her heavy heart across the border into Turkey in search of life-saving treatment. But the journey has not only been painful—it has also become an unbearable financial burden. Today, she needs just $350 to secure his medication and cover essential expenses. Donate now to help save this child's life!

The campaign will operate across different Syrian provinces.

details_text:
🌿 Beautiful, My Country 🌿

A Campaign by the Molham Volunteer Team

We’ve all witnessed how our country was neglected under the former regime — its public spaces abandoned, forgotten, left to fade with time.

After years that weighed heavily on all of us, our towns deserve to breathe beauty again — to be full of life, clean, and ready to welcome everyone who walks their streets.

✨ Why We’re Launching This Campaign

“Beautiful, My Country”
An initiative to restore and care for our public spaces once more — the parks, streets, and walls that were once part of our country’s vibrant identity, before neglect left its mark.

🏡 Rebuilding Belonging

“Beautiful, My Country” is more than cleanup —
It’s a step toward rebuilding a sense of belonging.

Because when people see their surroundings improve,
they begin to feel that this is truly their country —
One worth caring for. One worth protecting.

💙 Join Us

Help us bring life back to our land.
Let’s make it look the way we’ve always seen it —
in our hearts. 🙏🏻💙

title: Urgent Humanitarian Cases !
overview_text:
A home burned down… and a father’s heart burns for his son every day.
A fire caused by a heater consumed everything Ali’s family owned—furniture and personal belongings—and spread to little Mustafa’s body, leaving painful scars on his neck and hand, and causing a permanent disability.
Ali, the father, stands heartbroken over what remains. He is a displaced man who had already lost everything in Aleppo, and now he has lost not only his home and belongings but also his young son’s health.
Mustafa urgently needs reconstructive surgeries for his body and neck.
The family was already living in extreme poverty before the incident, and now their situation has worsened even more.
Let us help the child live a life without pain.
With just $300, you can be a lifeline for a father who now has nothing left but his prayers.

title: Heal Burns Campaign
overview_text: In a tragic incident, little Maymouna suffered severe burns on her face, hands, and back. The pain was not only physical but also a psychological shock for both the child and the family, who stood helpless in the face of the severity of the injury and the lack of resources, especially since her father suffers from heart disease. Maymouna's health requires urgent intervention to alleviate the effects of the burns and protect her small body from complications. Through the "Najah" campaign, our little one can have a chance to recover.

"Zein and Obaida… Childhood Without Legs, and a Home Without a Roof"
It was an ordinary day… the sound of
filled the neighborhood as they played in front of their home, unaware that death was approaching with the roar of a plane.
In a single moment, their lives were turned upside down: heavy shelling destroyed their house, took the lives of two of their siblings, and left Zein and Obaida wounded—both of them losing their legs, their eyes filled with shock and pain.
Today, they live in a rented home. Their father, suffering from
, is unable to work or provide for the family’s basic needs.

details_text:
"Zein and Obaida… Childhood Without Legs, and a Home Without a Roof"

It was an ordinary day… the sound of Zein and Obaida’s laughter filled the neighborhood as they played in front of their home, unaware that death was approaching with the roar of a plane.

In a single moment, their lives were turned upside down: heavy shelling destroyed their house, took the lives of two of their siblings, and left Zein and Obaida wounded—both of them losing their legs, their eyes filled with shock and pain.

Today, they live in a rented home. Their father, suffering from heart and vascular disease, is unable to work or provide for the family’s basic needs.

They lost their siblings, they lost their home, and they lost the ability to walk… but they have not lost hope.

Our hands can bring life back to them—by providing treatment, prosthetic limbs, and the warmth of a safe home.

Your donation today could be their new beginning.

title: Clean Water for Camps !
overview_text:
Clean Water for Camps !
Survival has forced many families to live in tents or any place they can find, even if it lacks the basic necessities of life. Among the harshest of these challenges is the scarcity of clean water. Parents live in constant worry as their children are left to drink from unsafe sources... And children walk for miles in search of a sip of water to quench their thirst... As summer arrives with its scorching heat and dryness, thirst becomes even more unbearable, and families hang their hopes on a drop of water to relieve their suffering. Molham Volunteering Team is launching a campaign to secure clean and safe water, especially in camps and other areas that lack access to it—aiming to provide a safe drink that quenches thirst and saves lives. With your contribution to our campaign, you could help fill a tank or dig a well that serves generations to come... With a single drop... a human life could be saved. Stand with them and help quench their thirst by supporting our campaign."

title: Urgent Medical Cases
overview_text: A great trial has struck Uncle Mahmoud after he fell ill and lost his voice, only to be diagnosed with laryngeal cancer. Today, he lives in a home that lacks almost all basic necessities—no refrigerator, fan, or even a washing machine. The windows and doors are covered with curtains, and the roof is just a plastic tarp. His living conditions are extremely harsh, and his health situation is just as dire. Today, he needs us by his side to ease his suffering and help cover the cost of his urgent medical treatment. This campaign is dedicated to supporting urgent medical cases!

"Hearts of Gold" is not just the name of our new campaign — it’s a true reflection of our little guests: our brave children with Down Syndrome 🤍 Through this campaign, we aim to spend meaningful time with them, exploring their interests and talents through a variety of activities that will take place over 7 days, in cooperation with several humanitarian organizations in the city of Aleppo. Your participation in this campaign will have a special impact, as we create beautiful moments with these amazing kids.

title: Deserts !
overview_text: With the lifting of restrictions and the return of hope, we are launching the #Halwan campaign for you! We have long awaited these historic moments—the lifting of sanctions and the end of fear and siege in our beloved Syria. Today, as our country exhales in relief, the #Halwan campaign is launched to share our joy with all our families in Syria. Now that the country is liberated and the roads are open, we are determined, with God’s help, to reach every village, city, and neighborhood in free Syria, to share sweet treats of joy with the families who have endured and persevered for so long. Join us in spreading happiness and creating beautiful memories with our loved ones, who are filled with hope with the lifting of sanctions and the return of life to normalcy.

title: Paying off the debts
overview_text: Debt — its shackles are suffocating thousands of families in Syria, families who were forced by displacement and the harshness of life to rely on borrowing as a last resort to feed their children and secure basic necessities. Today, as the country begins to heal and the jailer's grip is broken, it is time for us to extend our hands as well — to help free those imprisoned due to mounting debts. Your donations can free a prisoner and reunite a missing loved one with their family. In doing so, you not only return a cherished member to their home, but also offer the entire family a renewed chance at a better life.

title: Life Campaign !
overview_text: Severe malnutrition and extreme dehydration have accompanied our little Suleiman since his premature birth. He was taken from his mother’s embrace, and the narrow space of the incubator became his entire world. Suleiman is in urgent need of treatment and medical tests, in addition to essential medical supplies—costs that his father, who struggles while suffering from a severe disc injury, and his mother, who endures exhausting seizure episodes, simply cannot afford. This Friday, an amount of $200 could be the warmth that brings him back to his mother’s arms, and returns to him a childhood free of pain.

In an instant, that fragile safety turned to ashes.
Clothes burned. Toys melted. Dreams suffocated in merciless flames.
Everyone survived — but they emerged barefoot, hungry, and stunned… with nothing left.
Today, we call upon you — not for charity, but to awaken your humanity.
We are not just collecting money. We are gathering
In the hands of mercy, even the smallest gift can

title: Urgent Humanitarian Cases !
overview_text: A girl suffered extensive burns on her face and limbs❗ Alaa, a sweet young girl and a beloved princess for a family that has endured numerous struggles in recent years, from displacement to bombing, ultimately ended up in a tent that offers no protection from severe weather. Months back, Alaa was trapped in a fire caused by a heater explosion in their tent. Alaa harmed her arms and face and has been enduring persistent pain as her family struggles to obtain her medical care. The hot weather and poor living conditions have further complicated her condition. Her father continually battles to obtain the money Alaa needs for her treatment. With your help, we can alleviate Alaa’s pain. Don’t hesitate to provide a helping hand.

title: Bring Them Home !
overview_text: "We’ve been away from home for years… We miss the shade of our walls, the call to prayer from our village’s minaret, the smell of bread from the neighborhood oven, and the warmth of family and neighbors gathered around one table… We miss life itself." Their hearts hold a thousand stories of home, and their eyes burn with an unquenchable longing. Our people didn’t choose to leave, nor were they refugees by choice. It was the bombing, the arrests, and the desperate search for safety that tore them from their homes and left their days folded between tents, camps, and an endless ache. But today, return is becoming a reality—a dignified return, without fear, without bombings, without yet another displacement. The “Together, Back Home” campaign is a promise of return—a real step toward bringing our people back to their homes after years of exile and suffering. With your support, we can secure transportation costs and cover the journey home… Every contribution is a key to a home that’s been locked for years.

title: One Pulse, One Heart
overview_text: In the summer of 2025, a large volunteer medical delegation—featuring doctors and surgeons from around the world—will reach thousands of patients in Syria who have been waiting for months, or even years, for a chance at life-saving treatment or surgery. This humanitarian mission is organized by the Syrian-German Medical Association (SGMA) in collaboration with Molham Volunteering Team, and will target wide regions and several provinces. The goal is to perform hundreds of free surgeries, including cardiac, neurological, orthopedic, gynecological, maxillofacial procedures, and many more. Specialized medical consultations and examinations will also be provided. In addition, the campaign aims to train local healthcare staff, enhance medical capacities, and launch health awareness initiatives. This heartbeat cannot continue without your support. At Molham Team, we launch the campaign “Our Pulse is One” driven by our shared responsibility and the belief that even if you can’t be in the operating room, you can be the reason it opens 💙 Join us and donate to the campaign.

title: A Roof to Call Home
overview_text:
A Roof to Call Home
Mohammad lives on the fourth floor of a humble building in
He shares a small home with his wife and his widowed sister, paying
— a rent that has now become far beyond their means.
Once, Mohammad worked as a cleaner to provide for his family.
Today, he can no longer even afford his medicine.
Gangrene slowly consumed his feet. They tried to save him, but the disease was faster — one leg was amputated, then the other.
He lost his ability to work and now depends entirely on his wheelchair to get through his days.
Mohammad’s struggle is not just with illness — it’s with the daily question:
“How can I provide for my family?”
The rent, the medicine... every day is a painful choice.
Recently, he handed over the rent money with tears in his eyes — because if he didn’t, his family would be out on the street.
“The rent and the medicine broke my back… and burned my heart.”

Hundreds of families fight the bitterness of displacement, enduring in tents that bear witness to their suffering—where no resources nourish life, and no bread fills empty stomachs. Join us—behind every tent is a family we know, and every loaf carries a reward that never fades.

title: Rebuilding Hope: Ismail Al-Rais School Restoration
overview_text:
Rebuilding Hope: Ismail Al-Rais School Restoration
As part of ongoing efforts to support the education sector and improve the learning environment, the reconstruction project of Ismail Al-Rais School has been launched. The school was completely destroyed as a result of bombing by the former Syrian regime forces. The project aims to build a modern school facility that meets engineering and educational standards, including fully equipped classrooms, science laboratories, a library, and safe outdoor playgrounds. This initiative responds to the needs of the local community and ensures children's right to safe and comprehensive education, contributing to restoring hope and building a better future for coming generations.

title: Hope Beyond the Rubble
overview_text: The convoys of dignity began their journey toward the abandoned villages, carrying with them the dreams of their people for a long-awaited return—dreams that have now become reality. But despite the deep longing to come back, the residents were met with a reality heavier than expected; homes and roads remain buried under rubble and debris left by bombing and destruction. The high cost of clearing this rubble is beyond the means of most families, exhausted by years of displacement and poverty. Today, the residents face two painful choices: either remain amidst the debris that blocks their return to normal life, or bear financial burdens they cannot afford to remove the ruins. Committed to standing with them until the very last tent, we must support them and overcome the obstacles preventing life from returning to their villages—making this a true return with dignity. This is where the role of the “Molham” team began in this campaign: to lift the heavy cost of debris removal from the families and open a new door of hope for a dignified life amid safe homes and clean roads.

title: Illuminate Damascus: A Path to Stability
overview_text:
Illuminate Damascus: A Path to Stability
Nawwarat Al-Sham has launched a campaign to light up the unserved main roads in Damascus and its countryside. Many families have returned to their destroyed towns and villages without any services or infrastructure. Lighting the main roads is a fundamental factor in ensuring safety and stability for families returning to these devastated areas. You can contribute to this campaign as ongoing charity (Sadaqah Jariyah) to help ease the suffering of residents. The cost of one solar-powered streetlight, including installation, is $70. You can donate the full cost of a light or contribute $10 as a share toward the campaign. Together, hand in hand, we can make our country bright and safe once again.
